Fellow Patriot, We are living in extremely perilous times and a truly dangerous moment for our Republic. The federal bureaucracy has turned against the American people. It has been completely corrupted into an ideological monolith of hard-left loathing for America. The **fearsome power** of the state is raining down on political dissidents, while violent and vile criminals are released into our communities. We have blatant corruption at the highest levels of government- ignored by the Department of Justice and encouraged by the far-left corporate media. _Our wide open border is a wasteland, a deadly nightmare realm of chaos and catastrophe with ruination unfolding in all directions. There is compassion only for criminals._ **Yes** , we have a federal bureaucracy at every level working against the American people: indoctrination at school, racism in the workplace, gender conversion everywhere, law enforcement weaponized against political opponents, and lawless edicts applied and applauded. **Lawlessness rules. But not for long ... ** America First Legal is here to expose and stop this pernicious rot that has infected our government and our society. We will continue to use aggressive legal action to restore our Constitutional rights and the rule of law for all Americans. [**_We are fighting back in the courts. We are challenging the Deep State and winning victories, but we need your help, we need your support_**** _RIGHT NOW_**** _to Save America!_ >>**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2d88da92d2da4a7080a24ff081c4743f&_e=xCnk-YUteHoS1hnkqlzgpi3LF7JYo5xT5d6CjPuH5E7_A07OGUVH2Z7R-3OtRCeQ2SJnT9rdonVANY80LnrbU5QALBGGkk6Vp6dKkeh4deNYUkMWFhgKNUhKeyZ5cUnCliB3m4-PfGAM9URMk_Dh57N_L2cwjbmC1S3C9UacpvY6PB_etH8VV8BV05PJ_Z_Rj91hfZ5NVmMoh0V4tJbH3PMyQRQt8V7aXkISmYNVjEcCZ1nIQMmhi8N003j56Xm0hTFtcNY_HnINKKHmv3-weWREtmKFLI7B8OEcPWqqQ8-5_pYIun9sNf7F9pxijkFZIe01jTTacHurYsOvBOH8HXKCKLT-PMin4VPoc4ru_iqSVovl4hIMm62-WeoS1a8XMK7_e2C8L8MtmZ_WHUHTrs4gCeTvXFEA5ze9zaHendE4d21D_i_V0wQTII_dCN_8WPVdUp0Ysb-1bBtYQKGWGg%3D%3D)** **

body:
But they believed in the power of opportunity
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7e0bb176ad504e0aa9f6e770f0bbe377&_e=bMFN_MCwo5ajuVwhj7PsdAE7J8Z9NO2QXtBGgBTQNNG_nKQ89e4ZJUi0-kSOHZiZfLBUE-XFXdnRM95aYp5fe5PfIFolCL5KbNb2R4HXXfTPuYgEd17YyQp8gXJwT6CL8a54dUq75rUoMEK86vQihRhYRy7tVs6h7PCTfXPp-p7XQo1qeFCrFlALwaGCcAiqHnQAPaoC9OkY6F_mNxcwNBdqBLV51AUWI2OriSsa0XnlA2DmE3wY212tHaMvBHwVL8AW0-YEgC4IzZ7Nzeq-DEjTaBkqflLqr0vnecIq47kvpzkX2IPMwcD3R7eonxqTupQYSPVvOJ7FLQUljIrAkhk1ZEh5PPXU_Zr3yApfjxcumV3u5KqkUSdwPLBqhGNWtW7qlWvdanQyF7YpgzcRHCAL-LTy1ZKSgzZpDiFPrX-ljW_TUTkTqdeQ7mbA9a5Q)

Peter,

Our political leaders are obsessed with grievance and victimhood. [**Not me.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7e0bb176ad504e0aa9f6e770f0bbe377&_e=bMFN_MCwo5ajuVwhj7PsdAE7J8Z9NO2QXtBGgBTQNNG_nKQ89e4ZJUi0-kSOHZiZfLBUE-XFXdnRM95aYp5fe5PfIFolCL5KbNb2R4HXXfTPuYgEd17YyQp8gXJwT6CL8a54dUq75rUoMEK86vQihRhYRy7tVs6h7PCTfXPp-p7XQo1qeFCrFlALwaGCcAiqHnQAPaoC9OkY6F_mNxcwNBdqBLV51AUWI2OriSsa0XnlA2DmE3wY212tHaMvBHwVL8AW0-YEgC4IzZ7Nzeq-DEjTaBkqflLqr0vnecIq47kGuuyCUi-VPUUyclYYMuwUTFRMGTJyBEB8pcAIb_wefU0-p87cPgXRtJa7iIIBsK2JB6f1vI0ykCOWmnlLeu6az8fNtZiQ6oEJClQPrsWDC5MQOvMkh_3qNnFBSIupj2GDBQcf2G-w3Vy5K1ZrsJ8i)

My parents immigrated to this country with almost no money in their pockets, **but they believed in the power of opportunity.** They worked hard and raised two kids with a focus on education and achievement. _That’s how you get ahead in America._

The woke Leftists that run Washington, DC, are obsessed with race, gender, and sexuality. They’ve told us to celebrate our diversity and differences so much that we’ve forgotten all the ideals that unite us as Americans. _I’m running for President to change that._

Peter, in order to shake the far-Left’s grip on our society, we have [_**to take back the White House AND the Senate Majority**_](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7e0bb176ad504e0aa9f6e770f0bbe377&_e=bMFN_MCwo5ajuVwhj7PsdAE7J8Z9NO2QXtBGgBTQNNG_nKQ89e4ZJUi0-kSOHZiZfLBUE-XFXdnRM95aYp5fe5PfIFolCL5KbNb2R4HXXfTPuYgEd17YyQp8gXJwT6CL8a54dUq75rUoMEK86vQihRhYRy7tVs6h7PCTfXPp-p7XQo1qeFCrFlALwaGCcAiqHnQAPaoC9OkY6F_mNxcwNBdqBLV51AUWI2OriSsa0XnlA2DmE3wY212tHaMvBHwVL8AW0-YEgC4IzZ7Nzeq-DEjTaBkqflLqr0vnecIq47lHO2sY1UnrTDtU8IKDgcfSCm8KcBFXB2a-I1lOZS4oYrayOJoipozgmPmZfiN47OGE1YKw7Ijt78s4JpAxPX5Nxixlm7-nflkyzpj0fRyOA73qhbC7gFXapVA1m3NZMBAMZnyLrT1blNUBN3wXBjWB) in next year’s elections. I know you’re up for the challenge, so I’m asking that you contribute today to help me and other America First candidates win in 2024.

body:
We need to shake their grip on our society
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d2e09e3b8506402eafffa46fa6a3654f&_e=x_jFGCFj0g-daJ5_n1QX6lUepyG8oWC2oJ7V-fgA-I_eL-vXNtpnlFvBmcLmI3Hr5832asD5Gw-uQDkUIsbM2JIcLZ2an3cznA8ghj30PYabbEGxgGMSnFVz5QCSi5ss0Ram0D4PEQoGT87iAMsW0Ok9KJjoG_KBCLWBCfUVfbPLVbw1t60CBeTBf_6t-_OmW4hhCXKM54L2uWamzMa5GPNbYowoR49gsIwA3EosHnjDR3yr4s4taM2zP_euht3U6UrYgAYUtTOJ2e15GA3z2DV0ti6dRtNBumWV7t3shBpSP30xVtjMaJ_sn2tvDFekLR28ODk6xlAaqqnOSLTpR5FhDLbEZmtC61Q2yUi5dXFFpdNYlpVW9kWCqAY2RnsVGky9lridj1vvrKry3sSv9WpcfzBusm5Is4OtEly3Rdde66rx9by-3lsBro-I_ZAn)

Fellow American,

Our political leaders are obsessed with grievance and victimhood. [**Not me.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d2e09e3b8506402eafffa46fa6a3654f&_e=x_jFGCFj0g-daJ5_n1QX6lUepyG8oWC2oJ7V-fgA-I_eL-vXNtpnlFvBmcLmI3Hr5832asD5Gw-uQDkUIsbM2JIcLZ2an3cznA8ghj30PYabbEGxgGMSnFVz5QCSi5ss0Ram0D4PEQoGT87iAMsW0Ok9KJjoG_KBCLWBCfUVfbPLVbw1t60CBeTBf_6t-_OmW4hhCXKM54L2uWamzMa5GPNbYowoR49gsIwA3EosHnjDR3yr4s4taM2zP_euht3U6UrYgAYUtTOJ2e15GA3z2DV0ti6dRtNBumWV7t3shBp-L8IyOJVKUw1etuM2EM-tnS3k0eZC0GYay_WXMhRTQMe9phm-EAp39ewPE6-RdCOt9i0y0Fx5IDdxoQ4eIVPDLqmG6E_uMytxWUw5WdhSXgr3OQvfRfEfT8z6FQB2eV8M5Wc4hHmR6k7rDnUBCbh5)

My parents immigrated to this country with almost no money in their pockets, **but they believed in the power of opportunity.** They worked hard and raised two kids with a focus on education and achievement. _That’s how you get ahead in America._

The woke Leftists that run Washington, DC, are obsessed with race, gender, and sexuality. They’ve told us to celebrate our diversity and differences so much that we’ve forgotten all the ideals that unite us as Americans. _I’m running for President to change that._

Fellow American, in order to shake the far-Left’s grip on our society, we have [_**to take back the White House AND the Senate Majority**_](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d2e09e3b8506402eafffa46fa6a3654f&_e=x_jFGCFj0g-daJ5_n1QX6lUepyG8oWC2oJ7V-fgA-I_eL-vXNtpnlFvBmcLmI3Hr5832asD5Gw-uQDkUIsbM2JIcLZ2an3cznA8ghj30PYabbEGxgGMSnFVz5QCSi5ss0Ram0D4PEQoGT87iAMsW0Ok9KJjoG_KBCLWBCfUVfbPLVbw1t60CBeTBf_6t-_OmW4hhCXKM54L2uWamzMa5GPNbYowoR49gsIwA3EosHnjDR3yr4s4taM2zP_euht3U6UrYgAYUtTOJ2e15GA3z2DV0ti6dRtNBumWV7t3shBq2k9S0IZsdxARaK_MeM9vuRG0K2nxbemDEp_c6mwMGv0J-Gq4zjSjjZ5zPYfhW5itJ1GDsTDrQg7tRnODZS_dbdu8PBHKCtXs_fBqEuZnXCB5SP_dtWT3LpsduY-X5W0Q1PMBV8JGRM-vspvu9_gss) in next year’s elections. I know you’re up for the challenge, so I’m asking that you contribute today to help me and other America First candidates win in 2024.

clean_body: We need to shake their grip on our society Fellow American, Our political leaders are obsessed with grievance and victimhood. My parents immigrated to this country with almost no money in their pockets, but they believed in the power of opportunity. They worked hard and raised two kids with a focus on education and achievement. That’s how you get ahead in America. The woke Leftists that run Washington, DC, are obsessed with race, gender, and sexuality. They’ve told us to celebrate our diversity and differences so much that we’ve forgotten all the ideals that unite us as Americans. I’m running for President to change that. Fellow American, in order to shake the far-Left’s grip on our society, we have in next year’s elections. I know you’re up for the challenge, so I’m asking that you contribute today to help me and other America First candidates win in 2024. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zusmj3va936rb73que1n4fl3bv4jsm5c02dahtj0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9gm2ob6c5h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z856gitim4mmv7i6lt2dftcugilqnn5jqr78f18o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9gm2ob6c5h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgr96a5qq1b24tki0a19fpf7pthdfnmc37df8bv8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9gm2ob6c5h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zooa1co21m3a801n1fcc3bn51fug0ln4lf5dnlrg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9gm2ob6c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: We Don't Need Another Big Spender in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
Don't Need 'Em, Don't Want 'Em
| | | |
---
# We Don't Need Another Big Spender in Congress
---
Dina Titus is a career "tax and spend" politician. Since Titus first entered Congress 15 years ago, Federal debt has grown by $23,000,000,000,000 (that's trillions). That is an average of more than $4 billion every day. That's right, while Titus has been in office, the Federal government has printed, borrowed, and spent $4 billion more each day than what they take in. Average daily borrowing has increased by 3,557% compared to the 232 years before Titus took office.
This is nuts! These numbers are too large to comprehend. We can't keep doing this! The result of big-spending politicians is inflation!
Inflation ravages our household budgets and drains our savings. Gas is once again over $5.00 a gallon. Food prices are up over 17% since Biden started the latest spending spree. Dina Titus brags that she is "ridin' with Biden." That ride is taking our family finances to the brink of bankruptcy.
I'm not suggesting that Titus is solely responsible for this debt. Both Democrats and Republicans have gotten us into this mess. As Oliver Anthony sings: "These rich men north of Richmond Lord knows they all just wanna have total control Wanna know what you think, wanna know what you do And they don't think you know, but I know that you do 'Cause your dollar ain't sh*t and it's taxed to no end 'Cause of rich men north of Richmond." Will the same people who created the problem solve the problem? Of course not. WE NEED A CHANGE! We can no longer afford to send "big spenders" to DC.
So, how can we spot a big spender?
Fortunately, big spenders self-identify. You can spot them because they brag about how much money they spend on their campaigns. People who spend big to get to Washington will surely spend big once they get there.
Don't let them get there!
My campaign is spending a fraction of what my competitors spend. However, we've already raised enough to win the primary. Like the last election when we won the Primary, we won't spend money on expensive TV ads or printed mailers. We will conduct a grass-roots campaign by meeting voters where they live. Our message will be carried throughout the district by an army of volunteers.
I'm not a big spender. I spent 20 years as a financial planner helping individuals and families live within a budget. I will take those same principles to Washington.
We need to get rid of Titus, but let's ensure we don't replace her with another big spender.

---
Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: Specifically, what would you do to reduce inflation? -H.S. A. Politicians will make wild promises to fix everything. The truth is, I will be one of 435 members of the House of Representatives. I can't promise what the other 434 members will do, but here is what I will fight for: First, we must control federal spending and work towards a balanced budget. in 1994 when Republicans took control of the House for the first time in 40 years, we had a balanced budget! We can do it again! Second, we must reduce the regulatory burdens on American businesses. Ronald Reagan was able to accomplish this, and it led to a booming economy that lifted all Americans. Burdensome regulations inflate the cost of everything we buy. Third, we must unleash our country's energy industry. Home-grown energy is cheaper and more reliable. Fourth, we must reduce the size of government so that more resources are available to average Nevadans.
Q. Who are you supporting in the Presidential primary? -T.M. A. I've not yet decided. Regardless of who is president, I will be loyal to the Constitution and the people of Nevada's First Congressional District--not to any one person or party.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---

I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. clean_body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Peter, We have exciting news for you! In celebration of two outstanding debate performances and an incredible third quarter, Nikki and our team would like to extend an exclusive merch offer. Today only, you can order a “Nikki Haley for President" campaign t-shirt for just $5. Don’t wait! This offer is only valid until midnight. CHIP IN $5: CLAIM YOUR SHIRT Thanks to grassroots support, Nikki is amplifying her message across America, and she is closer than ever to victory. Now, we need to keep spreading her message and building momentum—and wearing campaign merch is a great way to do it. Whether you’re at the grocery store, pumping gas, or just out and about, showing that we have grassroots supporters like you on our team makes such an important impact. Will you order your t-shirt today? CHIP IN $5: CLAIM YOUR SHIRT You do not want to miss the chance to get your hands on our classic campaign staple! Order your "Nikki Haley for President" t-shirt for just $5 today. Thank you again for supporting Nikki Haley and her fight to save America! - Team Haley GET YOURS NOW VOLUNTEER More About Nikki Haley My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. Will you join me today and help me save our country? DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Fund, Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply.

name: The Flyover
subject: Trouble Brews in the House, Mechanical Monster Wolves, and a Dog in the Driver's Seat
body:
The House and Senate averted a government shutdown at the last minute Saturday by agreeing to a temporary spending bill to keep the government operating for 45 more days. It doesn’t include funding for Ukraine, which Democrats wanted.

## McCarthy's Job at Risk After Shutdown Averted
The House and Senate [averted a government shutdown](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHO2yAURp_G3hzBxcYwMHTJlq4drQtcbCoMFpBEefsqnf_x06cjHZ0_j-2BMcW8_8aTTA9lQ9fjizbOJphAbDB6E4iAxEiGSy1hVpLx8TBezIgavVoUMRsE0548t0EEFhbG9RgNMBCcMWB6EQJuSkun14UvYFcJyg4zIx97qbe_JeZ-UEif8qJ6c-Uckzl6v9ogfg1wH-COV6Z3-17fUXt0iQa4718gn5T71I5n9-Wdp9M5rP34TK7kvVJrU6XraVN0mNu0CrCIyLXTPGjFadYQPCOJq0SLaqzGX--YUmxyHWa2nxjTf6X-Y6B_AQAA__8RDmfF) at the last minute Saturday by agreeing to a temporary spending bill to keep the government operating for 45 more days. It doesn't include funding for Ukraine, which Democrats wanted. Nonetheless, the bill passed in the House largely with the support of Democrats, cutting out Republicans opposed to the deal. Rep. Matt Gaetz, one of the most outspoken of the GOP opponents, vowed to move this week [to oust Speaker Kevin McCarthy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFv8yAUAH8NbETwwNgeGL7FW761o4XxI9BiE5mXRO6vr5q520k3nHQf1_nqc8n77b_f0FGssw-UnzgrKUCAnoGvLiICao5O2dGCGaxUPLml9xAGE2KwatEYVLRqXcGOMcRFdZZnBxK0khLk2GkNl2G0Yew71cHSWxgWZiSumepx-ax5p4SxnPWJxyXUjReXiO6N6X8MJgYTJUy5lF_HYEp1wx1f7Y2PhgwmAxo6ZcTNI32L5s8mEpYi7o-WBFXx2Bt6ElsI_qB0Ckq5iRfiF4OJH269v3IpudmeGXnbfH6nOP055ScAAP__6GFjgw). Meanwhile, McCarthy's allies in the House say they're preparing a motion [to expel Gaetz](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFytCAYAJ8GOxz4UJSC4m_s7m9TOoAfSg7FAXLe5ekzSdrUOzuzs2-3-WZCDMf63-yoq0-zcTU8cOaMAgUxQ7NojwgoGtRcKgndKBlvNm2ROe-NUgMHAaMyjHdCDMpKa_3i-iZoYCA4Y8BULwS0o5JODT3vwQ4SRks6hkuoKbfvKRx1Qx9f6YG5dWlvot5qPQsR_whMBKbrulqfngde5ZsTmM4UQw2uEJi29FGQrumkO-4Wc6EF8U7xeWKkq8H6STMeeOFC65bRVPowzlSkv2I50dwx0905k-v2arJezivEGIocSMfW3YT4U1X_fPQVAAD__6FZa1Y) over ethics issues. The GOP has a slim majority in Congress, and it requires a two-thirds majority to expel a member.
## Baseball Playoff Field Set
Baseball's regular season officially ended Sunday, and all 12 playoff teams have been decided. The post-season playoffs begin Tuesday, leading to the World Series on Oct. 27. [The full playoff schedule is here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2vozAQAH-N6RaZNThQUFxDl2uvRP5Yh70zGNlOUO7XP-XVrx9pRvPnvt4NRz4ev81Ocw1pNa7yi9ZOAgKqFRs_ByIk1dDc6UljP2rZNduMg3XOdc6oXmu0mkbXd8obJV1QdlANzyhRdVKinAalsB0n7abb0A1obxpHK3pJnmvK7d_ER90oxHd6UW5d2ps4b7WeRahfAheBy3VdrbOlnCnX8iEELnu0ApeDriJw-chgjxbOaN4pBLDZuH9U4UylFjIlHbCb6rbnWaC4jfwzEoSU4eLowZnsoVBmKnBx3aAQeT4eEPgwkf-TF7g0efbnxTFy0TfRy8duOH7n1h_nfQUAAP__EqxzIg) The first round of playoffs is a best-of-three series to determine which wild card teams move forward. ## Here's What the Top 1% Make in Every State
How much salary is needed [to be in the top 1% of earners](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsUL1uhDAYe5qwBSVfIJAhQxe269oRhfDlkjY_iMuBePuKzl1s2ZYsy1-P-WFCDPn5aRLq6spsbA0HzpxRoCBmaFbtEAFFg5pLJaEbJeON19at6Jy7sRvdKBc7LL0D3nFjlLKyCRoYCM4YMNULAe2opFVDz3tYBgnjQjqGa6hlb79LyNWji1c5cG9tSU3UvtbtRcQHgYnAdJ5na_Ni75DAdFcTmJgiMAlGYPLlpOltPU0l40Wv8qYZcaW10GR-8OYFaci0-ltslNMNd4u53iYeuF_0VU3F1tcUm12v2xliDC85kI49kwnxb1f996XfAAAA__-K5mix) in your state? In one, it's nearly $1 million. But in another, making $380,000 would qualify for the top 1%. A new analysis by SmartAsset shows the distribution of income of the top 1% by every state in the U.S. and ranks the top and bottom 10 in terms of income needed. Connecticut, essentially a residential suburb for New York City, is No. 1 at $952,000. The lowest threshold is in West Virginia, at under $400,000. [Check the map ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsUL1uhDAYe5qwBSVfIJAhQxe269oRhfDlkjY_iMuBePuKzl1s2ZYsy1-P-WFCDPn5aRLq6spsbA0HzpxRoCBmaFbtEAFFg5pLJaEbJeON19at6Jy7sRvdKBc7LL0D3nFjlLKyCRoYCM4YMNULAe2opFVDz3tYBgnjQjqGa6hlb79LyNWji1c5cG9tSU3UvtbtRcQHgYnAdJ5na_Ni75DAdFcTmJgiMAlGYPLlpOltPU0l40Wv8qYZcaW10GR-8OYFaci0-ltslNMNd4u53iYeuF_0VU3F1tcUm12v2xliDC85kI49kwnxb1f996XfAAAA__-K5mix)to see where your state ranks.

clean_body: The House and Senate averted a government shutdown at the last minute Saturday by agreeing to a temporary spending bill to keep the government operating for 45 more days. It doesn’t include funding for Ukraine, which Democrats wanted. | | | | . | | MONDAY, OCTOBER 2, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in in 1959, Rod Serling's "The Twilight Zone" debuted on CBS. Even today, the four notes of its theme song are instantly understood as a signal that something strange is happening. If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, Have something to say? Head on over to our . Enjoying The Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, "NativePath". | McCarthy's Job at Risk After Shutdown Averted The House and Senate at the last minute Saturday by agreeing to a temporary spending bill to keep the government operating for 45 more days. It doesn't include funding for Ukraine, which Democrats wanted. Nonetheless, the bill passed in the House largely with the support of Democrats, cutting out Republicans opposed to the deal. Rep. Matt Gaetz, one of the most outspoken of the GOP opponents, vowed to move this week . Meanwhile, McCarthy's allies in the House say they're preparing a motion over ethics issues. The GOP has a slim majority in Congress, and it requires a two-thirds majority to expel a member. Baseball Playoff Field Set Baseball's regular season officially ended Sunday, and all 12 playoff teams have been decided. The post-season playoffs begin Tuesday, leading to the World Series on Oct. 27. The first round of playoffs is a best-of-three series to determine which wild card teams move forward. The four teams with the best records get byes for this round: the Braves, Dodgers, Astros, and Orioles. The Atlanta Braves are the at +260 to win the World Series, their second in three years, followed by the Los Angeles Dodgers at +420 and the Baltimore Orioles at +700. Here's What the Top 1% Make in Every State How much salary is needed in your state? In one, it's nearly $1 million. But in another, making $380,000 would qualify for the top 1%. A new analysis by SmartAsset shows the distribution of income of the top 1% by every state in the U.S. and ranks the top and bottom 10 in terms of income needed. Connecticut, essentially a residential suburb for New York City, is No. 1 at $952,000. The lowest threshold is in West Virginia, at under $400,000. see where your state ranks. Enjoy reading The Flyover? mailto:?cc=editor@jointheflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0D%0A%0D%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you%27ll%20love%20it%20too.%0D%0A%0D%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20news%20first%20thing%20in%20the%20morning.%20They%20cover%20important%20and%20interesting%20stories%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0D%0A%0D%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fjointheflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3D83%0D%0A%0D%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will!%0D%0A to share with your friends and family. | ➤ N.Y. Democrat Jamaal Bowman has come under heavy criticism for pulling a fire alarm while Democrats tried to delay a vote on the government spending bill. He says he mistakenly thought pulling the alarm handle would open the door. () ➤ The Supreme Court opens its term today to tackle cases involving gun rights, the power of federal agencies, social media regulation, and more over the next nine months. () ➤ Oprah Winfrey and Meghan Markle have been floated as possible Senate replacements to fill out the late Dianne Feinstein's term. Gov. Gavin Newsom has said he would appoint a Black woman. () ➤ The police chief who led a raid of a small Kansas newspaper has been suspended, the town's mayor said. The August raid of the Marion County Record's office and the publisher's home were sharply criticized. () | Flying together with: Missed the Boat on Ring and Nest? Don't Let RYSE Slip Away! Smart Price: Priced at $169 vs. competitors' pricing of up to $1,000 per window, RYSE is uniquely positioned to bring luxury window shades to every home and business. | ➤ Europe beat the U.S. in the Ryder Cup golf competition, never letting up after taking a big lead the first day. But the real fireworks came Saturday when Rory McIlroy had angry words on the 18th green over hat-waving with Patrick Cantley's caddy. () ➤ Colorado lost to USC by one touchdown Saturday, raising questions about USC's future and praise for Colorado quarterback Shadeur Sanders. The AP Coaches Poll showed the rankings largely unchanged, with Georgia still No. 1. subject: Greater Georgia Newsletter: October Edition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F2QRkXAR5pvSgRptx-IWb01qDP8MUzM72QdGEh6umjOqlavyiAAx4YYdjqzWsSo4doYmHBoLIJSjXNQ0cYNNpwhbVoWpgRg1qmW9caUlB2HrAL6haXHrHwDmnmG_g6lIYBis8nqcNeDBFcL5EKf0DOcAVwCqGpj9&c=nFvXrtyaXoHprawwLijgtbf3jnAiPNTCXlVTUTYU9365TxEuIKC4rw==&ch=izCzLjlIlGH3zX2oENyM8KHtehfOiEcOzz1aXLCy4db1YhWfrKXcPA==)
---
| |
---
| Greater Georgia Newsletter October 2, 2023
Welcome to the latest edition of our newsletter! As we approach the Fall season - and with only a few weeks to go until the November 7, 2023 municipal election - we're thrilled to bring you a summary of everything we've been up to in the month of September. In this edition, we'll be spotlighting several of our voter registration drives, our Hispanic Heritage Month celebrations, some special events, and more.
---
| |
---
| LATEST NEWS
---
| Greater Georgia Partners with Georgia Center for Civic Engagement on High School Voter Registration Initiative
Last week, Greater Georgia announced an exciting partnership with the Georgia Center for Civic Engagement to bring voter registration drives to high schools across the state. Students in participating high schools will compete to register the greatest number of their peers ahead of the 2023 and 2024 election cycles. To read more about this latest initiative, click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F2QRkXAR5pvSgRptx-IWb01qDP8MUzM72QdGEh6umjOqlavyiAAx4V2R-dw8NuTm4UPXYXHt6xc2ajG1oEE8zivASnaFR9HKZaP_vw3mKCGq3GnvfYnVI4tNhufqkrnaygCdEUKVkhG_mTJ6mMvyjkd0vEca48K_T9a5nc386HT91VCT1EWK7G2XmEf3O8mKCAwqEQOjNMM7bBeltVmJm1b3O5xeFsNT7lTvJsMp74E4n4uMAd1FPVrzm_HuPJ5dlLCcX9jMdZimpJxx0Oz4OfjXHpOE1G-9IiHBG_tjtZw=&c=nFvXrtyaXoHprawwLijgtbf3jnAiPNTCXlVTUTYU9365TxEuIKC4rw==&ch=izCzLjlIlGH3zX2oENyM8KHtehfOiEcOzz1aXLCy4db1YhWfrKXcPA==).
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F2QRkXAR5pvSgRptx-IWb01qDP8MUzM72QdGEh6umjOqlavyiAAx4V2R-dw8NuTm4UPXYXHt6xc2ajG1oEE8zivASnaFR9HKZaP_vw3mKCGq3GnvfYnVI4tNhufqkrnaygCdEUKVkhG_mTJ6mMvyjkd0vEca48K_T9a5nc386HT91VCT1EWK7G2XmEf3O8mKCAwqEQOjNMM7bBeltVmJm1b3O5xeFsNT7lTvJsMp74E4n4uMAd1FPVrzm_HuPJ5dlLCcX9jMdZimpJxx0Oz4OfjXHpOE1G-9IiHBG_tjtZw=&c=nFvXrtyaXoHprawwLijgtbf3jnAiPNTCXlVTUTYU9365TxEuIKC4rw==&ch=izCzLjlIlGH3zX2oENyM8KHtehfOiEcOzz1aXLCy4db1YhWfrKXcPA==)
---
| |
---
| Last Day to Register to Vote: October 10, 2023
The last day to register to vote in the Tuesday, November 7th municipal election is October 10th. Even if you know you're registered to vote, it's a good idea to check that your voter registration is up-to-date before this deadline - especially if you have moved recently. You can check your status or register by visiting [www.mvp.sos.ga.gov.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F2QRkXAR5pvSgRptx-IWb01qDP8MUzM72QdGEh6umjOqlavyiAAx4YyHkzxOGRZ5K0PHjb2Molcg5ujMFUHZJRnmF127P4B0pmacgV85a5BjNSwumxf9yhIeLt3E8UtJnArDh4GQA2s=&c=nFvXrtyaXoHprawwLijgtbf3jnAiPNTCXlVTUTYU9365TxEuIKC4rw==&ch=izCzLjlIlGH3zX2oENyM8KHtehfOiEcOzz1aXLCy4db1YhWfrKXcPA==)
If you're interested in hosting a voter registration drive in your community ahead of this deadline, please let us know! It's a great way to grow the movement - and help make sure people know about the upcoming election. We'll supply the resources and training; just email us at [info@greatergeorgia.com](mailto:info@greatergeorgia.com).
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F2QRkXAR5pvSgRptx-IWb01qDP8MUzM72QdGEh6umjOqlavyiAAx4V2R-dw8NuTmplntIljeh966hr_oYOfhwaExFZu3npp-o2ljpftzd7FtzhrhyydOw11t84OMJnNbxG7IcQfouiiuetab3NCEqQ==&c=nFvXrtyaXoHprawwLijgtbf3jnAiPNTCXlVTUTYU9365TxEuIKC4rw==&ch=izCzLjlIlGH3zX2oENyM8KHtehfOiEcOzz1aXLCy4db1YhWfrKXcPA==)
---
| |
---
| EVENTS Voter Registration Drive at VSU September 6, 2023 Greater Georgia started the month out strong with a voter registration drive at Valdosta State University. We had some good conversations with students there about the conservative platform and the importance of making their voices heard.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| Future Farmers of America Rally in Moultrie September 7, 2023 We continued our South Georgia tour with a big day at the Future Farmers of America Rally in Moultrie. In total, we spoke to more than 200 students from across the state - and registered dozens. We were so inspired by their passion for ag - and their work as the next generation of leaders in Georgia.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| Training with Glynn County GOP September 9, 2023
To wrap up our South Georgia tour, we joined the Glynn County GOP for a voter registration training. We are so grateful for our local partners - who are working throughout the year to grow the conservative movement, in every corner of the state.
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| Sound of Freedom Screening in Brookhaven September 12, 2023
Back by popular demand, we hosted a second private screening of Sound of Freedom - this time, in Brookhaven. We've been blown away by the response to these events - with dozens joining us to watch the film and learn more about the horrors of human trafficking. This is an issue we'll continue to raise awareness about - as our state leads the fight to eradicate it.
---

| Hispanic Heritage Month Registration Event in Norcross September 18, 2023
To kick off Hispanic Heritage Month, our team was out at the Norcross Hispanic Heritage Festival registering voters and sharing our conservative message. It was good to meet so many new supporters, learn more about their top concerns, and encourage them to get involved in our elections ahead of 2024.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| National Voter Registration Day at the Ballpark September 19, 2023
We celebrated National Voter Registration Day with volunteers and supporters at The Battery ahead of a big Braves win over the Phillies! We chatted with dozens of Braves fans, encouraged them to update their voter registrations, and even recruited a few new volunteers. All in all, we'd say we hit it out of the park on National Voter Registration Day!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| Fireside Chat with Rep. Mesha Mainor in Buckhead September 21, 2023
We also had the honor of co-hosting Rep. Mesha Mainor for a fireside chat with the Buckhead Young Republicans and Blexit. Rep. Mainor, who is Georgia's newest Republican lawmaker, shared her views on the far-Left's radical agenda, the importance of parental choice and public safety, and what the conservative movement should be doing to grow ahead of 2024. Special thanks to Steve Penley for hosting us at his studio, to the state lawmakers who joined us, and to the more than 120 guests who stopped by!
---
|
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Crime is Toast Breakfast September 26, 2023
Finally, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler was honored to present an award at last week's Atlanta Police Foundation "Crime is Toast" breakfast. Here at Greater Georgia, we are proud to stand with the brave men and women who keep our communities safe - and we will ALWAYS back the blue!

clean_body: | | | | == | | | Greater Georgia Newsletter October 2, 2023 Welcome to the latest edition of our newsletter! As we approach the Fall season - and with only a few weeks to go until the November 7, 2023 municipal election - we're thrilled to bring you a summary of everything we've been up to in the month of September. In this edition, we'll be spotlighting several of our voter registration drives, our Hispanic Heritage Month celebrations, some special events, and more. | | | LATEST NEWS | Greater Georgia Partners with Georgia Center for Civic Engagement on High School Voter Registration Initiative Last week, Greater Georgia announced an exciting partnership with the Georgia Center for Civic Engagement to bring voter registration drives to high schools across the state. Students in participating high schools will compete to register the greatest number of their peers ahead of the 2023 and 2024 election cycles. To read more about this latest initiative, click ==. | == | | | Last Day to Register to Vote: October 10, 2023 The last day to register to vote in the Tuesday, November 7th municipal election is October 10th. Even if you know you're registered to vote, it's a good idea to check that your voter registration is up-to-date before this deadline - especially if you have moved recently. You can check your status or register by visiting == If you're interested in hosting a voter registration drive in your community ahead of this deadline, please let us know! It's a great way to grow the movement - and help make sure people know about the upcoming election. We'll supply the resources and training; just email us at mailto:info@greatergeorgia.com. | == | | | EVENTS Voter Registration Drive at VSU September 6, 2023 Greater Georgia started the month out strong with a voter registration drive at Valdosta State University. We had some good conversations with students there about the conservative platform and the importance of making their voices heard. | | | | | | Future Farmers of America Rally in Moultrie September 7, 2023 We continued our South Georgia tour with a big day at the Future Farmers of America Rally in Moultrie. In total, we spoke to more than 200 students from across the state - and registered dozens. We were so inspired by their passion for ag - and their work as the next generation of leaders in Georgia. | | | | | | | Training with Glynn County GOP September 9, 2023 To wrap up our South Georgia tour, we joined the Glynn County GOP for a voter registration training. We are so grateful for our local partners - who are working throughout the year to grow the conservative movement, in every corner of the state. | | | | | Sound of Freedom Screening in Brookhaven September 12, 2023 Back by popular demand, we hosted a second private screening of Sound of Freedom - this time, in Brookhaven. We've been blown away by the response to these events - with dozens joining us to watch the film and learn more about the horrors of human trafficking. This is an issue we'll continue to raise awareness about - as our state leads the fight to eradicate it. | == | | | Hispanic Heritage Month Registration Event in Norcross September 18, 2023 To kick off Hispanic Heritage Month, our team was out at the Norcross Hispanic Heritage Festival registering voters and sharing our conservative message. It was good to meet so many new supporters, learn more about their top concerns, and encourage them to get involved in our elections ahead of 2024. | | | | | | National Voter Registration Day at the Ballpark September 19, 2023 We celebrated National Voter Registration Day with volunteers and supporters at The Battery ahead of a big Braves win over the Phillies! We chatted with dozens of Braves fans, encouraged them to update their voter registrations, and even recruited a few new volunteers. All in all, we'd say we hit it out of the park on National Voter Registration Day! | | | | | | | Fireside Chat with Rep. Mesha Mainor in Buckhead September 21, 2023 We also had the honor of co-hosting Rep. Mesha Mainor for a fireside chat with the Buckhead Young Republicans and Blexit. Rep. Mainor, who is Georgia's newest Republican lawmaker, shared her views on the far-Left's radical agenda, the importance of parental choice and public safety, and what the conservative movement should be doing to grow ahead of 2024. Special thanks to Steve Penley for hosting us at his studio, to the state lawmakers who joined us, and to the more than 120 guests who stopped by! | | | | | Crime is Toast Breakfast September 26, 2023 Finally, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler was honored to present an award at last week's Atlanta Police Foundation "Crime is Toast" breakfast. Here at Greater Georgia, we are proud to stand with the brave men and women who keep our communities safe - and we will ALWAYS back the blue! | | | | GREATER GEORGIA STORE Need some Greater Georgia gear? You can support our cause and purchase some Greater Georgia "swag" by clicking ==! | | | == | | | GET INVOLVED Greater Georgia's work is critical to defending conservative values, and it is only possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: The 2 new baby orcas could starve to death
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Two new baby orcas could starve to death. Donate $27 today to help protect them, their families, and our planet!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025699?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025700?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025701?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025702?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Two baby orcas were just born this year into the Southern Resident orca pods. And we should be nothing but excited for the news. But truthfully, we’re worried. **The mortality rate for newborn orcas is as high as 50%.** Faced with a lack of food and imminent threats from Big Polluters, **these new babies may not make it through the winter.** **[Friend, we have to protect these new orcas at all costs.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025703?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)[Help save the newborn baby orcas, their families, and the planet: Donate $27 today and help us reach our $5,230 goal by midnight tonight!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025704?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
The two newborn orcas are a symbol of hope for a dying population. With their arrival, there are now 75 Southern Resident orcas remaining. But they’re losing their main food source and crucial habitats. A key culprit is Big Oil and shipping. They’re destroying orca habitat and driving away Chinook salmon. Without enough food, miscarriages are common. That means **these orca births are nothing short of a miracle.** But they won’t even get names until they survive their first year.
If these babies don’t survive, their families’ chances of survival will also plummet. Southern Resident orcas function in close-knit, sensitive family communities known as pods. When they lose a family member, the entire pod feels the loss. Their grief can push them further into starvation. That’s why we can’t stand to lose even one more of these precious whales. **These newborn orcas need your help if they’re going to stand a chance. Will you stand with us today?**
**The new orcas are a symbol of hope for a dying population. Donate $27 today to help protect them and the planet before we lose them forever!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025699?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025700?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025701?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025702?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Southern Resident killer whales once thrived in the waters of Washington and British Columbia. But they’ve been on the decline since the mid-1990s. Now, they’re the only endangered species of killer whale in the United States. One key contributor is food availability. Orcas rely on Chinook salmon as their main food source. These fish were once abundant in their ecosystems. But in the last decade, their populations have substantially declined. Now, Chinook salmon are endangered themselves. **And orcas are starving as a result.**
But it doesn’t end there, Friend. _**Things are about to go from bad to worse for the last 75 Southern Resident orcas.**_ Catastrophic Big Oil and shipping megaprojects are in the works. And they would be devastating to the remaining Southern Resident orca population.
The Roberts Bank T2 shipping terminal project would significantly increase cargo ship traffic. And the proposed expansion of the Trans Mountain Pipeline will increase oil tanker traffic in Southern Resident critical habitat SEVEN-FOLD. It will be shipping **millions of barrels of toxic tar sands oil** through this already delicate orca habitat.
Both projects would increase noise from shipping traffic. That could have fatal impacts on orcas. The noise would drive away the salmon that orcas depend on to survive. And it would disrupt the orcas’ sonar, their primary tool for hunting. That means it would be even harder to find the few fish that remain. Between the chronic lack of salmon and the disruption of their hunting methods, **orcas will starve to death and be driven to extinction.**
**We can’t let Big Oil push vulnerable orcas further toward the brink. Make your $27 contribution now and help us reach our $5,230 goal!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025699?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025700?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025701?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025702?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Did you know that orcas play a part in the air you breathe? That’s right, Friend. Orcas release nutrients for phytoplankton, which in turn provide half of the oxygen we breathe. But their impact doesn’t stop there. Phytoplankton absorb hundreds of thousands of tons of carbon each year. This flow of nutrients promotes healthy ecosystems and a functioning planet, which is why we must protect these orcas at all costs.
But orcas are just one oil spill away from extinction. Proposed Big Oil megaprojects like the expanded Trans Mountain Pipeline could be fatal. Orcas can’t detect oil spills. When the next oil spill occurs, they may swim through toxic tar sands oil. That could lead to _**infection**_ and _**death.**_ Even the fumes alone can _**knock out**_ and _**drown**_ a full-grown whale.
Southern Resident orcas are in perilous danger. You and I may be some of the last people to share the planet with these magnificent creatures if these disastrous megaprojects are allowed to move forward. That is why we need you by our side, Friend.
_**If we don’t act soon, we could lose orcas forever.**_ Friends of the Earth is doing everything we can to fight against greedy corporate interests and save these precious whales and our planet. _But we can’t do it without your help._ Your membership support today will go a long way toward protecting our planet and stopping these reckless megaprojects that have the potential to wipe out the remaining 75 orcas. Will you join us in this fight and rush your $27 membership contribution before the clock strikes midnight and we lose any more of these majestic creatures?
**Don’t let Big Oil and corporate greed exploit our oceans for profit. Donate $27 now to stand up for orcas and our planet and help us reach our $5,230 goal.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025699?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025700?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025701?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025702?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**

Faced with a lack of food and imminent threats from Big Polluters, these new babies may not make it through the winter. == The two newborn orcas are a symbol of hope for a dying population. With their arrival, there are now 75 Southern Resident orcas remaining. But they’re losing their main food source and crucial habitats. A key culprit is Big Oil and shipping. They’re destroying orca habitat and driving away Chinook salmon. Without enough food, miscarriages are common. That means these orca births are nothing short of a miracle. But they won’t even get names until they survive their first year. If these babies don’t survive, their families’ chances of survival will also plummet. Southern Resident orcas function in close-knit, sensitive family communities known as pods. When they lose a family member, the entire pod feels the loss. Their grief can push them further into starvation. That’s why we can’t stand to lose even one more of these precious whales. These newborn orcas need your help if they’re going to stand a chance. Will you stand with us today? The new orcas are a symbol of hope for a dying population. Donate $27 today to help protect them and the planet before we lose them forever! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Southern Resident killer whales once thrived in the waters of Washington and British Columbia. But they’ve been on the decline since the mid-1990s. Now, they’re the only endangered species of killer whale in the United States. One key contributor is food availability. Orcas rely on Chinook salmon as their main food source. These fish were once abundant in their ecosystems. But in the last decade, their populations have substantially declined. Now, Chinook salmon are endangered themselves. And orcas are starving as a result. But it doesn’t end there, Friend. Things are about to go from bad to worse for the last 75 Southern Resident orcas. Catastrophic Big Oil and shipping megaprojects are in the works. And they would be devastating to the remaining Southern Resident orca population. The Roberts Bank T2 shipping terminal project would significantly increase cargo ship traffic. And the proposed expansion of the Trans Mountain Pipeline will increase oil tanker traffic in Southern Resident critical habitat SEVEN-FOLD. It will be shipping millions of barrels of toxic tar sands oil through this already delicate orca habitat. Both projects would increase noise from shipping traffic. That could have fatal impacts on orcas. The noise would drive away the salmon that orcas depend on to survive. And it would disrupt the orcas’ sonar, their primary tool for hunting. That means it would be even harder to find the few fish that remain. Between the chronic lack of salmon and the disruption of their hunting methods, orcas will starve to death and be driven to extinction. We can’t let Big Oil push vulnerable orcas further toward the brink. Make your $27 contribution now and help us reach our $5,230 goal! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Did you know that orcas play a part in the air you breathe? That’s right, Friend. Orcas release nutrients for phytoplankton, which in turn provide half of the oxygen we breathe. But their impact doesn’t stop there. Phytoplankton absorb hundreds of thousands of tons of carbon each year. This flow of nutrients promotes healthy ecosystems and a functioning planet, which is why we must protect these orcas at all costs. But orcas are just one oil spill away from extinction. Proposed Big Oil megaprojects like the expanded Trans Mountain Pipeline could be fatal. Orcas can’t detect oil spills. When the next oil spill occurs, they may swim through toxic tar sands oil. That could lead to infection and death. Even the fumes alone can knock out and drown a full-grown whale. Southern Resident orcas are in perilous danger. You and I may be some of the last people to share the planet with these magnificent creatures if these disastrous megaprojects are allowed to move forward. That is why we need you by our side, Friend. If we don’t act soon, we could lose orcas forever. Friends of the Earth is doing everything we can to fight against greedy corporate interests and save these precious whales and our planet. But we can’t do it without your help. Your membership support today will go a long way toward protecting our planet and stopping these reckless megaprojects that have the potential to wipe out the remaining 75 orcas. Will you join us in this fight and rush your $27 membership contribution before the clock strikes midnight and we lose any more of these majestic creatures? Don’t let Big Oil and corporate greed exploit our oceans for profit. Donate $27 now to stand up for orcas and our planet and help us reach our $5,230 goal. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Marcie Keever Oceans and vessels program director, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

body:
Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z30spd6fusmv2g1r5murrb90ql92m8esl5lhih2g_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm4p75cth2bs)
---
Friend, **" Just tell me when and where"** was the phrase heard 'round the country. **_Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th._** _When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge:_ **_" Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4176sd3np34v1268kavc7cedda7ljobhnav4soo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm4p75cth2bs)
---
This debate boils down to freedom vs. failure, Friend. Gov. DeSantis is ready to make the case for the future of our country. Let us know: **_who do you think will win this debate?_**
---
| | | | | [VOTE DESANTIS](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb1ugrddtt7m4bubtnjdoum2kj3vnr3i1ciml6sg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm4p75cth2bs)
---
| | | [VOTE NEWSOM](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4okcs6q8tl8tb14bakqplmlfg6idj12bj7abav0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm4p75cth2bs)
---
In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zup18u9r99lr1nq4g0npc8hjshst3tgldgs1cdpo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm4p75cth2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

body:
Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3gbecm6g18b259p7ttafnkvsp2pucnf99ctl32g_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm4p74clh2bs)
---
Friend, **" Just tell me when and where"** was the phrase heard 'round the country. **_Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th._** _When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge:_ **_" Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9et9ri3cmn2k2qsko8m54d68c22822ereqad878_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm4p74clh2bs)
---
This debate boils down to freedom vs. failure, Friend. Gov. DeSantis is ready to make the case for the future of our country. Let us know: **_who do you think will win this debate?_**
---
| | | | | [VOTE DESANTIS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztod04ciikg21q3of2pv36ojj4bagf91ei24aqa8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm4p74clh2bs)
---
| | | [VOTE NEWSOM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zug5i9a13klj9haor6et28t418uq9mjck5jn6kgg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm4p74clh2bs)
---
In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zde56a8lithhhf8ducq153800aam9q71hrau7nu0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm4p74clh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).

body:
Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zljqta3dctu5od773ela4dju33aom8bt43kd4gu8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm2oj1chh2bs)
---
Friend, **" Just tell me when and where"** was the phrase heard 'round the country. **_Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th._** _When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge:_ **_" Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv7vdemqsprs51n2b1ctgic4l3gu0ukmaa2ipdv0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm2oj1chh2bs)
---
This debate boils down to freedom vs. failure, Friend. Gov. DeSantis is ready to make the case for the future of our country. Let us know: **_who do you think will win this debate?_**
---
| | | | | [VOTE DESANTIS](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8u7hl7kb60qegcf8pbnd21qffqg9mvkpkkgg3mg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm2oj1chh2bs)
---
| | | [VOTE NEWSOM](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkoi6nmi0uff9578rj8t8dobbimkkcuouthvkm00_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm2oj1chh2bs)
---
In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjsr1tcvason35htj42o0npts8s30voq1kr1ffq8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm2oj1chh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.
