body:
Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zibu7k9g6o2gma2a8hu2gvtbetei4h1h7a24hpv8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm2oj1chh2bs)
---
Friend, **" Just tell me when and where"** was the phrase heard 'round the country. **_Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th._** _When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge:_ **_" Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zppmtjpaqq43o6llcd6dhrv8djqdie5v29717860_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm2oj1chh2bs)
---
This debate boils down to freedom vs. failure, Friend. Gov. DeSantis is ready to make the case for the future of our country. Let us know: **_who do you think will win this debate?_**
---
| | | | | [VOTE DESANTIS](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv1ihioqm4r16b9c4nn6tukdfm5ejq9j21eonkg0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm2oj1chh2bs)
---
| | | [VOTE NEWSOM](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh95muk8vokoc905d7kqvnqf7k1n277ndb09b440_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm2oj1chh2bs)
---
In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc9eq4nrvsnf4nb7vdiqetn25c52hbrusubdqkoo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm2oj1chh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:

| |
---
| | Peter,

They lied then. They're lying now. [Please watch this important video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=37ac74081e&e=9828080a05) as a reminder of what Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Big Government attempted over the last several years (and why we should not fall for it again):
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=983ef13e1a&e=9828080a05 "They Lied Then. They're Lying Now.")
---
| This past weekend, I attended the Global Health Freedom Summit. It was an invigorating and informative event, filled with speakers who've been the tip of the spear for health freedom over the past several years. A video will be available of the event at [Unite.Live](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=2c1c69e8ef&e=9828080a05). Make sure you regularly check for updates there.

I also [shared a video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=45ce1fb168&e=9828080a05) recently with an update from my lawsuit against Keith Ellison and the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice. Our federal hearing was delayed from October 3rd to late November. I can assure you, we have the best legal team and will relentlessly advocate for the rights of physicians and professionals all over the country, who've been robbed of their free speech rights.

The fight continues!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor

body:

---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjc1LTcxMjhiNWIxZDMzYTQyYmRhM2IyN2FjOTZhODQ4Yzg2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfRkZPNDMyNjgifQ/-S-osYSmXYJzIbJJiTuOow)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you’d like to give online, here’s a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjc1LTcxMjhiNWIxZDMzYTQyYmRhM2IyN2FjOTZhODQ4Yzg2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfRkZPNDMyNjgifQ/ulBYL35mLJDkaqtnLTT62w)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity’s show that I’ve partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I’m the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths – that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types – patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left’s cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America’s freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you – that’s when you know you’re saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America’s founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone – because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjc1LTcxMjhiNWIxZDMzYTQyYmRhM2IyN2FjOTZhODQ4Yzg2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfRkZPNDMyNjgifQ/rZSP1wiFZi5Dar4go7nmqA)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women’s identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjc1LTcxMjhiNWIxZDMzYTQyYmRhM2IyN2FjOTZhODQ4Yzg2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfRkZPNDMyNjgifQ/gBO29Fi3oamnDO2VV4itVg)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjc1LTcxMjhiNWIxZDMzYTQyYmRhM2IyN2FjOTZhODQ4Yzg2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/WtXv3qz4nrNUFcw3eoYoNA) to unsubscribe.

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Freedom vs. Failure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679511%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fbE0IY%2fqz1EX7w59nTBEwQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend, **"Just tell me when and where"** was the phrase heard 'round the country. **_Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th._** _When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge:_ **_"Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679511%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fbE0IY%2fqz1EX7w59nTBEwQ&sysid=1)
---
This debate boils down to freedom vs. failure, Friend. Gov. DeSantis is ready to make the case for the future of our country. Let us know: **_who do you think will win this debate?_**
---
| | | | | [VOTE DESANTIS](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679512%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h0anrElj%2fFGylLtOtzhqFQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | [VOTE NEWSOM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679513%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qcbwVGS6r0YgieSmduaWEQ&sysid=1)
---
In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679514%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aUq9lbK23zjtKdJLFW%2bmWw&sysid=1)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: =?utf-8?Q?Political=20Director=20Todd=20Watson?=
subject: Second Presidental Debate Takeaways
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
One unifing message stood out from the Presidential debate - Education | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12653922?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ee6a18f837&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
|
---
|
---
> **Education, Property Taxes, and the Importance of Local Elections** Our party struggles with division. This division is caused primarily by personality politics versus value or solutions driven politics. There are many within our party who are concerned with keeping power, prestige, or having access to budgetary resources (Lobbies fund candidates who can "Get Them Stuff"). Unfortunately, furthering Republican principles within our communities is not the highest priority for many on their list. We seek to change this. We are committed as new leadership within the party to keep pushing for the prize for our people versus playing the personality game for power or prestige. With that as a backdrop, we must drive for a solution when a wide variety of politicians agree on a given topic. It appears there is agreement on education at a national level. Education was the #1 concern of Republican citizens as affirmed in the Legislative Plan adopted in August by the governing body. However, the Nebraska vision on education must become more galvanized as it has at the national level. This is why we must begin a more intense discussion on the future of Nebraska education and a tax system that supports this model. The kids and property owners both deserve better results. Before we dig into Nebraska we should observe the agreement at the National level. Most of our Republican Presidential candidates were speaking the same tune on Education this past Wednesday in California and other campaign events. **Senator Tim Scott** stated, “I am a firm believer that a child’s zip code should not dictate his or her access to quality education nor define the child’s future. This means increasing the availability of and access to whichever educational model a particular family finds best for their situation: public school, private academies, home schooling, charter school, or other cutting-edge models.” **Governor Nikki Hailey** , “...we need to make sure we have school choice so we have competition. ....We need to quit spending time on this DEI and CRT and focus on financial literacy and digital literacy. ” **Former Governor Chris Christie** , “It (better education) can be done when you give people choice. ... This public school system is no longer run by the public, it is run by the teachers’ unions of this country. They are taking the worst of their members and defending them instead of advocating for our kids. ...and when you have the President of the United States sleeping with a member of the teachers union there is no chance that you can take away the stranglehold of the teachers union everyday. They have an advocate in the White House everyday for the worst of their teachers and not for our students to be the best they can be. The President of the United States has to take on the teachers union. I’ve done it in New Jersey and I will do it for the United States." **President Trump **calls for cutting federal funding for any school or program that includes “critical race theory, gender ideology, or other inappropriate racial, sexual, or political content onto our children.” He stated, “Personnel is policy and at the end of the day if we have pink-haired communists teaching our kids we have a major problem. We’re at the end of the list on education and yet we spend the most, but we’re going to be tops in education no matter where you go anywhere in the world.” **Vice President Pence** \- “I’m a great champion of parental school choice. Competition makes everyone better.
>
> **Presidential Candidate Vivek** \- “Cut off the head of the snake and eliminate the Department of Education. Put that $80 billion (to the DOE) in the hands of parents across this country. This is the civil rights issue of our time. End the Teachers Union at the local level and allow public schools to compete.”
>
> **Governor Ron DeSantis** , “Our country's education system is in decline because it's focused on indoctrination and denying parents' rights.”
>
> There IS national unity for school choice, parental rights, addressing the problems of the teachers’ union and the indoctrination aims of the educational bureaucracy. On top of these concerns lies the poor testing and proficiency scores that must be improved. Our children must be prepared better to survive in the 21st Century. To do this our state leaders must ramp up the rhetoric and more importantly actions on education. Will they finally stand up to the Teachers Union? Will they champion a choice bill like Erdman so it receives debate? Will they champion and push forward Senator Murman's Parental Bill of Rights? Will the Regents ever address the radical social agenda being deployed in departments? Will Pillen push his "Pillen Plan" he printed and campaigned on over the compromised version of 2023 with big new spending intertwined with a tax cut? Will actions and words match what we see on the Presidential stage? Education should be led by state leaders...not national politicians. We need our state leaders to take the lead and hear the cues coming from the biggest national leaders on policy AND OUR LOCAL CITIZENS. We need big changes! With that as a backdrop in 2023, why are we in Nebraska giving a billion dollars to an educational bureaucracy that has been in decline? Coming from the business world, I learned one thing...don't throw good money after bad. Reform must happen first before further investment is justified in a struggling business. Why would we believe in good faith that a record level of new funding will change the trajectory when record levels of new funds have not changed the scores for the better in recent years? Same leaders with the same process often equates to the same results. While we fully supported the special education funding due to legal issues...the funding outside of this area should be examined for productivity gains. There is a better way. Those ways were written in legislation but were never debated in committee or on the floor. Why? When did this state become afraid of debating new ideas to do things? Furthermore, If you gave a friend $1,000 and then had to fight that same friend the next day to freely give $25 to a different friend...wouldn't you question why you gave the one friend $1,000 in the first place? Do you trust an individual that complains on $25 you gave who received $1,000 the previous day? The Nebraska plan was to spend more on education using State taxes and subsequently reduce local property taxes by reducing local educational spending due to the state absorbing more of the tab. We can see that this plan is not working as originally planned by the issuance of a letter from the governor to local bodies to please pass the savings on. The districts are moving to keep their funds as high as possible before the growth lid goes into effect the following year. We have seen numerous local bodies propose even more taxes AFTER they received the cash injection at the state level! This is truly astonishing! To succeed at taxpayer sanity, you have to have fiscally minded board members who believe in a "Needs versus Wants" budgetary process. Unfortunately, many of the 244 Nebraska school boards are not composed of fiscally conservative elected officials. The few individuals that are fiscally conservative are often out voted. This is why your state party is focused on building local county parties to address the disturbing trend of Democrats doubling local offices held the last 8 years in Nebraska at the local level. We came from a local level. We know the reality of how easy locales can be forgotten when federal or state races are at play. This is why Democrat expansion happened and we seek to end it. ALL levels of office matter. Poor votes by Republican officeholders is also why we have to examine our own ranks. We need to understand if we have a Republican that believes in our platform or just uses our brand behind their name to receive the votes of a Republican majority state. We believe our values work if enacted. We just need to know if an officeholder believes and will vote our values. This is why we need you as a citizen to be involved in your local AND state party. Your leaders are engaged to identify candidates who really believe in our values. Moving on, the audacity and smugness of school lobbies (NSEA & NEA) taking billions in state revenues (tax payers dollars) and encouraging local school boards and Superintendents to not give an inch for our most deserving students needing choice is truly mind blowing. To think the educational lobbies would do the respectable thing and not ask for more money with record government revenues was foolish as well. Expecting bodies that have not practiced fiscal restraint (especially at the bureaucratic levels) to yield to taxpayer suffering was a miscalculation. There hasn't been a tax dollar most government bodies have not liked. As we have seen, these unions spent millions of dollars to move forward a petition to stop $25 million (School Choice Legislation) from going to underperforming students. These unions have offered to fund candidates in their entirety for the legislature for future considerations. Their actions demonstrate the war they are willing to wage for total control of our kids and significant influence over our politicians. It is time to stand up to these powerful lobbies. The education system, our children, and our Unicameral belong to the Nebraska people...not a lobby. Nebraskans, don’t be fooled by the propaganda. Republicans CARE for students and teachers, and the role most of these institutions play in our communities. EDUCATION IS A TOP PRIORITY OF REPUBLICANS! The battle is with the top of the pyramid with a very real agenda on big spending, BY a bureaucracy, and FOR a social agenda to manipulate our children. We trust the overwhelming majority of teachers, principles, and administrators in these systems. Unfortunately, who they report to is often the problem. When the reporting to the parent(s) stop...the problems often begin. We know our parents will CHOOSE to continue to fund their local schools doing the job they promised the parents...not the bureaucracy. When kids are well served and prospering...the parents and their wallets will follow. What do we do? The people of this party have to become more vocal and intentional with these monstrous lobbies. Don’t pay them off with favors in legislation or in a budget...expose them. Our kids need us. Demand politicians battle with these institutions for the sake of our kids' future. We need common sense education...not indoctrination. We will carry this discussion forward in a future newsletter...Until then...get involved in your local party. This country cannot afford more complainers without action. The local school boards, the educational service units, the Board of Regents, and the State Board of Education all need work in Nebraska. It is time we galvanize on this issue like we are seeing at the national level.
>
> Talk Soon...
> Todd Watson, Political Director NEGOP
|

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Challenge: Accepted.

body:
Here's the challenge you missed on Hannity last night.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zirg4jlc5tfr0s5occlvv065bqbeh55la05iqgvg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hmeo72chh2bs)
---
Friend, **" Just tell me when and where"** was the phrase heard 'round the country. **_Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th._** _When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge:_ **_" Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3llbuoa0mppno4ct5tiouk85bnhudr6uvdi9o6o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hmeo72chh2bs)
---
This debate boils down to freedom vs. failure, Friend. Gov. DeSantis is ready to make the case for the future of our country. Let us know: **_who do you think will win this debate?_**
---
| | | | | [VOTE DESANTIS](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztupjoib7i0hlbrqfl6rdi4uri9sicok8rjtsm18_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hmeo72chh2bs)
---
| | | [VOTE NEWSOM](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z408mh2p1v595djmeobdhula4raqdqi8coghmh1g_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hmeo72chh2bs)
---
In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z53rbev5t0gbmkk4skmjblt896b2aaoslvbfgp80_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hmeo72chh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Tallahassee, FL 32315

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. name: Team DeSantis
subject: Challenge: Accepted.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Here's the challenge you missed on Hannity last night.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24584%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mB4bvD1uYnAado8KX5Iv4w&sysid=1)
---
Friend, **"Just tell me when and where"** was the phrase heard 'round the country. **_Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th._** _When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge:_ **_"Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24584%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mB4bvD1uYnAado8KX5Iv4w&sysid=1)
---
This debate boils down to freedom vs. failure, Friend. Gov. DeSantis is ready to make the case for the future of our country. Let us know: **_who do you think will win this debate?_**
---
| | | | | [VOTE DESANTIS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24595%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f%2fAfvUxIg3tjFUdAccmSIA&sysid=1)
---
| | | [VOTE NEWSOM](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24596%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1VQZpBpudMFv6RvZy3RZ9g&sysid=1)
---
In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24597%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5kpEAG1%2fF3bW%2bZSMT9Z8Iw&sysid=1)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Challenge: Accepted.

body:
Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc9d4ummf2qg06oed1ui975ta0rp4fao65atgr90_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm9or0cjh2bs)
---
Friend, **" Just tell me when and where"** was the phrase heard 'round the country. **_Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th._** _When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge:_ **_" Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjv28m8c4ct1r6gh71hpvu48816d5sqcqoa8jg10_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm9or0cjh2bs)
---
This debate boils down to freedom vs. failure, Friend. Gov. DeSantis is ready to make the case for the future of our country. Let us know: **_who do you think will win this debate?_**
---
| | | | | [VOTE DESANTIS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl0uo8dlae24rkfgmdr9c1j3mrmmqeq1lsjujkto_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm9or0cjh2bs)
---
| | | [VOTE NEWSOM](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z76sgnpqhm88i2utlj8vlvnafli50disehajbbcg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm9or0cjh2bs)
---
In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi2gitq8ivlfrf4ir2sevnhe659hbv9cvkmc0080_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9hm9or0cjh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: NEW: Climate Hype, Dancing Fright, and...Travis Kelce?
body:
🎙️ The No Doubt About It Podcast is BACK | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4dd858bc60&e=567664f14c)

Friend, we are back with the latest episode of the **No Doubt About It podcast** with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti, and we believe you won't want to miss it!

[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bc8cc4cead&e=567664f14c)

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=91c44694e2&e=567664f14c)
* [Apple Podcasts](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c78c9ad294&e=567664f14c)
* [Spotify](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=27d93f1c41&e=567664f14c)
* [YouTube](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d9037e78c0&e=567664f14c)

In this episode, Mark and Krysty dive deep into the critical issue of Climate Change. We discuss how Climate Change has transformed all naturally occurring weather into catastrophe and its potential consequences. Mark & Krysty also explore the perspectives of climate change alarmists and their goals to restrict individual freedom while giving more control to the government. It's a conversation you won't want to miss if you're interested in this important topic.
| [STREAM EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e59df0c4ee&e=567664f14c)
---
**But that's not all! Krysty goes off on local media's reluctance to hold leaders accountable for the alarming rise in crime rates in New Mexico.** It's a fiery segment that sheds light on the responsibility of the media in our communities and how they are utterly failing.

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=7c70447b61&e=567664f14c)

Finally, the episode features a conversation with BJ Lindsey, a renowned builder in New Mexico who has made the bold decision to enter the world of politics and run for Mayor of Angel Fire, NM. BJ shares his insights into why getting involved in leadership positions is essential for creating positive change in our communities.
| [STREAM EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=10d15ac1ed&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0e6cd523c0&e=567664f14c)
# SUPPORT NO DOUBT ABOUT IT
We invite you to listen to this episode on your favorite podcast platform. Don't forget to like and subscribe to stay updated on our latest content.

You can also catch us on YouTube and visit our website at [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=494fb61f48&e=567664f14c), where you can support the podcast, purchase merchandise, and make donations to help us continue bringing you valuable discussions.

Warm regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
|
---
| | | _© 2023 Choose Adventure Media. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
8100 Wyoming Blvd NESTE M4, #171Albuquerque, NM 87113

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=d0356b56a8) or [unsubscribe](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=d0356b56a8)
