Good morning, Peter! We are excited to share the historic news that California Gov. Gavin Newsom will appoint EMILYs List President Laphonza Butler to fill the seat of the late Sen. Dianne Feinstein.

**As EMILYs List founder Ellen Malcom said,_the governor has made an extraordinary choice_.** Laphonza was the first Black woman and the first mother to lead EMILYs List. She will become the only Black woman serving in the U.S. Senate and the first openly LGBTQ+ person to represent California in the chamber. **And as a champion for labor rights and working people everywhere, we know that she will serve the people of California honorably.**

So please, Peter, can you take a moment to sign our card congratulating Laphonza on her appointment to the U.S. Senate?
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70796308/430366155/-76673814?sourceid=1052063&refcode2=WTENE1003&refcode=20231002_LBCongrats&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWU2OGJmMi0yYjYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iRDXn-7EkP8iLCPwAhblPsKiEDm24mTe-vB3x6D_PJI=&emci=bc074664-1f61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=d9e68bf2-2b61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

body:

| |
---|---
Voters are already casting their ballots in Virginia – and Democrats are laser-focused on flipping the VA House and defending our Senate majority. **These five seats are toss-up races where the battle could be won or lost:** | **District** | **Democratic Candidate**
---|---
HD-97 | Michael Feggans
HD-21 | Joshua Thomas
HD-82 | Kimberly Pope Adams
SD-24 | Monty Mason
SD-31 | Russet Perry

Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231002_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20256%2E4449941%2EWaDUFz)
---
Look, Jamie Raskin is 100% right — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_**Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College.**_

Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.

_But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

**[_So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Jamie Raskin & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away!_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231002_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20256%2E4449941%2EWaDUFz)**
[Sign my name now: Abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231002_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20256%2E4449941%2EWaDUFz)
---

| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=09258a7dae0b4a4592fbbdc8169e3b7a&_e=8tkz6jYqFqovYdZEDdovgoJ5UXt6KL1Ad64b09cnTVTkm_oSOQToGLhN9jyeObPk1mja_n0_S-LuE-ZfmezhHzfTdQ83ZcKSpwffaI2XKL--RV1zhWTRGA9pLWvTYR43bUgMvgmeUInZWG8KZjbh94L4wjyZcIpb4jFw8vfEeUhld1wUdzjbtowuWdyCGWxG5VtH68r9RjYJBOnvn02o1RR7MtJK5lP_c7x8j-bjXJfb4g334gSPuVGLOrPkQ0jGXG8kA7wvZAkt6LY7er5iND7oPxbUkLhzS1VHL_qhcEBE9kFiLPWblKtElTpjY6NPQVwslp8QEcDsfe6OYefuQ31agZeJgdZ2QHHn_vEkC1k%3D)

| | Peter, I know you get a lot of emails, but this one could be the key to taking back the United States Senate.

I want to take a moment to introduce you to CAPT Hung Cao.

Hung served in the Navy for 25 years in Special Operations. He served in some of the most dangerous corners of the world.

**His time in the Navy is over, but that doesn’t mean his fight for America is.**

Right now, there’s an all-time low number of veterans in Congress.

_Hung is on a mission to change that._

**He’s running for the U.S. Senate because he knows that America runs better when it’s in the hands of our veterans.**

Unlike career politicians, our veterans know that freedom isn’t free. They know that it takes hard work, and that it can never be taken for granted.

**Now, Hung is building an A-Team on the ground of his campaign, and he needs your help.**

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, I know you get a lot of emails, but this one could be the key to taking back the United States Senate. I want to take a moment to introduce you to CAPT Hung Cao. Hung served in the Navy for 25 years in Special Operations. He served in some of the most dangerous corners of the world. His time in the Navy is over, but that doesn’t mean his fight for America is. Right now, there’s an all-time low number of veterans in Congress. Hung is on a mission to change that. He’s running for the U.S. Senate because he knows that America runs better when it’s in the hands of our veterans. Unlike career politicians, our veterans know that freedom isn’t free. They know that it takes hard work, and that it can never be taken for granted. Now, Hung is building an A-Team on the ground of his campaign, and he needs your help. Experts and pollsters agree: the key to taking back the U.S. Senate is conservative veterans. Now, we want YOU to be a part of the movement to send our vets to Washington to enact REAL change in Washington. Thank you for your support, Jacob Team Cao | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it from the next generation. Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he’s not done fighting for our future. name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: Demand Trump be fined and punished for committing fraud
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Tell the NY judge to impose the maximum fine on Trump for committing fraud >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2d08580-fa17-4253-9192-bc44e6970c51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c0eec99-d8e6-4b4c-bc59-8f689c48d674/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump's trial in New York began today involving yet another lawsuit, this one brought by New York Attorney General Letitia James, for inflating the value of his assets to get loans, and for committing fraud. The judge overseeing the case has already decided that Trump indeed committed fraud and has stripped Trump and his sons of control over their New York properties. The judge will now determine whether to hand down more punishments – Letitia James is asking for Trump to be fined $250 million and to be "permanently barred from running a business in New York" ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb56801a1-cd1b-456e-84b6-a1e6e5fc8671/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)). **We agree, and call on the judge to impose as stiff a penalty as possible on Trump.[Please add your name, show support, and help make it happen.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e4cc3ea-4753-44ce-9a54-172560485307/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** This would be more than fair for Trump's years of lies and fraud and sham businesses. It's time for this conman to get what's coming to him! [**Sign your name: Tell the NY judge to impose the maximum penalties on Trump for committing fraud >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te34f647c-92cc-484a-860e-1e7392bbde97/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac3b9e34-947b-4508-a6a3-9f26c00a8b00/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td45a20e0-72b2-40f4-bce3-8a0c8e595958/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted335fba-d440-44fc-9e23-cf3be267d1e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a02f4ec-f60e-4a2a-abf4-f8676506a200/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0cd7128-c5ef-4f6a-bf39-2a70b47939ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

Washington, District of Columbia

name: Zak Malamed
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Hey Friend: I am absolutely blown away and humbled by the outpouring of support my team and I have received over the past week.
We called on you to help us hit our FEC deadline fundraising goal and you responded in a big way!
If you did not have a chance to support us, no problem. [_**You can click here to help us start off the new quarter strong.**_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-zm?amount=10&refcode=em231002-90do&refcode2=479_8507_gAEZoU&akid=479%2E8507%2EgAEZoU)
But if you did, then from the bottom of my heart: Thank you.
This campaign is not about George Santos or launching political attacks - it is about looking ahead at what we can build together:
* A workforce prepared with the newest technology to compete with a global marketplace - with an increased minimum wage and an equal playing field so big tech companies cannot take advantage of small businesses.
* An education system that not only invests in our children's future and safety, but also the livelihood of the teachers and staff.
* A political system where constituents come first, the right to vote is strengthened, and dignity and trust are once again guiding principles.

We need to move on from the politics of fear, corruption and lies, and replace it with a politics of hope and respect.
Our team is just getting started: [_**So if you want to join us, please pitch in anything you can to help us begin our fourth quarter as strong as possible.**_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-zm?amount=10&refcode=em231002-90do&refcode2=479_8507_gAEZoU&akid=479%2E8507%2EgAEZoU)
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-zm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em20230926-el&refcode2=479_8507_gAEZoU&akid=479%2E8507%2EgAEZoU) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-zm?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em20230926-el&refcode2=479_8507_gAEZoU&akid=479%2E8507%2EgAEZoU) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-zm?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20230926-el&refcode2=479_8507_gAEZoU&akid=479%2E8507%2EgAEZoU) [Other Amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-zm&amount=30&refcode=em20230926-el?refcode2=479_8507_gAEZoU&akid=479%2E8507%2EgAEZoU)
---
Stay tuned for more updates.
With gratitude,
Zak
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=479%2E8507%2EgAEZoU)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=479%2E8507%2EgAEZoU)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Steve=20Roberts?=
subject: Time to Make a Difference!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roberts for St
body:
Stand Up to the Radical MAGA Agenda! | | |
# _**Standing Up to the Radical MAGA Agenda**_
---
|
---
| State Senator Steve Roberts is running for re-election to continue to bring **_results that matter_** to St. Louis. He’s proven to be one of the most effective Democratic voices advocating for sensible gun laws, criminal justice reform, **_and opposing the radical MAGA agenda._** Steve Roberts has **_brought home millions of dollars to our community_** to help children, families, and health care, and will continue to be a strong advocate for the return of reproductive rights.

As a second term State Senator, **Steve Roberts is the most experienced strongest advocate St. louis could have in Jefferson City.** To keep good things happening, Steve needs your help** _. Please donate whatever you can today_** to keep a voice of reason, strength, and compassion **_standing up for St. Louis_** in Missouri’s State Senate.
---
| | _"Every day in Jefferson City, your Democratic Senators are working together to push back against the radical MAGA agenda that threaten our community. We are making a difference and with your help, we can continue to stand up for the people of St. Louis. Please donate whatever you can to our re-election campaign. Any amount is greatly appreciated. Thank you!"_ \--Steve Roberts, State Senator
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=3a5c4ed29e&e=a088917f89 "DONATE TODAY")
---
| | _Copyright © 2023 *Steve Roberts*, All rights reserved._ To contribute via personal check, please make checks payable to “Roberts for St. Louis” and send to: **Roberts for St. Louis - **P.O. Box 771671. St. Louis, MO 63177 Paid for by Roberts for St. Louis, James D. Hill, Treasurer

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b361e26361&e=a088917f89&c=8da4aeb19a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b361e26361&e=a088917f89&c=8da4aeb19a).

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Alexander Vindman’s email on Ukraine
body:
As you may have seen, we may have averted a Republican-led government shutdown over the weekend, but the funding bill that passed did not include any money for Ukraine.

Aiding Ukraine isn't just about Ukraine. It's about protecting American lives. If Ukraine falls, our Servicemembers could get dragged into a European conflict. We can't let that happen! 🇺🇸🇺🇦

With that said, we thought it important to bump an email from Alexander Vindman we sent a few weeks ago. Please read it and sign our petition calling on Congress to pass funding to continue our assistance for the people of Ukraine.

ADD YOUR NAME

The team at VoteVets

Alex Vindman here.

Writing to you about something that’s been troubling me lately.

Most public opinion polling shows that the American people still support Ukraine. But fringe Republicans — copying Trump’s pro-Putin, MAGA agenda — are propagandizing the war to undercut that support.

And tonight, whether it’s Trump and Tucker Carlson or the GOP presidential candidates on stage at the debate, we’re sure to hear a lot of the same kind of talk.

That’s dangerous, because it emboldens Putin. And an emboldened Putin threatens not only Ukraine, but the entire world. America included.

The best case for American security has always been for Ukraine to take back its territory and for Putin to be defeated. That remains the case today.

So before the debate tonight, I am asking you to reaffirm your support for Ukraine.

Join VoteVets, and show the people of Ukraine that the United States of America still has their back. Please, add your name.

DONATE: https://act.votevets.org/go/6990?t=1001&akid=17391%2E3013755%2EQXZrpv

Or, if $3 isn’t the right amount for you, chip in what you can. Every donation helps.

ADD YOUR NAME: https://act.votevets.org/go/6990?t=1002&akid=17391%2E3013755%2EQXZrpv

This is important. I hope you will join us.

Thank you,

Lt. Col. Alex Vindman, US Army, Ret.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.votevets.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=17391%2E3013755%2EQXZrpv

Dear Fellow American, A movement is underway led by leftwing environmentalist activists to decimate America's fossil fuel industries and undermine America's energy independence under the guise of fighting climate change. These activists are shutting down America's gas pipelines, eliminating drilling permits, and dismantling our nuclear power plants. **As a result, Americans are being crushed by high energy prices and our energy infrastructure is deteriorating and becoming more vulnerable to blackouts and "brownouts." ** The leftwing attacks on our domestic energy industries, and their attempts to push the United States toward unreliable energy sources - such as wind and solar - are making our nation weaker and more dependent on our biggest adversaries, like Russia and China. **[This is why PragerU is conducting a survey.](http://trk.readactnews._3jw)** Your answers to this survey will help PragerU understand where everyday Americans stand on these important issues and the most effective strategies to educate Americans.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Vacate McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
Just like I said would happen if Speaker McCarthy caved and sided with Democrats...

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvrbsubthe92684st1e2luaq63kteaoj7kqf7abo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jmaoj4shh2bs)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

**FIRST** , our Speaker made an agreement with House conservatives in January to bring forward individual spending bills among other critical concessions.

_Since then, he has been in brazen, repeated violation of that deal._

**NOW,** McCarthy has made a new agreement... **One with DEMOCRATS to blow past our spending guardrails that – get this – even included a secret backroom deal to give more funding to UKRAINE!!!**

This shows you where his priorities truly lie. He would rather go work for his new boss Hakeem Jeffries to put our nation LAST than fulfill the promise he made in January. So while he breaks his promises, Whitney... I will be keeping this one:

_Just like I said would happen if Speaker McCarthy caved and sided with Democrats..._
---
| | [_**I Will Be Filing A Motion To Vacate This Week To Expel Our Democrat-Owned Speaker Of The House. Please Watch My Interview Below.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z38domm946nppo1efshvd2lmeno17iuppvv7fl7g_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jmaoj4shh2bs)
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvts5b3tkjcf28h37anqjn55jjp09hhovqovp2uo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jmaoj4shh2bs)
---
| [🇺🇸 WATCH NOW 🇺🇸](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztug7f9nq9pa4k9htcpud497g1jamscgl99eabp8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jmaoj4shh2bs "🇺🇸 WATCH NOW 🇺🇸")
---
| Our Speaker tells us he is being “the adult in the room” by lying to House conservatives and cutting a deal with the Democrats.

He wants you to believe the “adult” thing to do is to perpetuate the same system that has put us $33T into debt.

Well then, my message is simple, Friend: _If he is still our Speaker by this time next week... It will be because his new Democrat bosses have bailed him out._
**He can be THEIR Speaker. Not MINE.**
---
| [🇺🇸 🇺🇸 JOIN ME: DEMAND NEW LEADERSHIP! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb4nnv67644g0dlie86r3fqmtj3052vkf62k49r0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jmaoj4shh2bs "🇺🇸 🇺🇸 JOIN ME: DEMAND NEW LEADERSHIP! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸")
---
| There are some in Washington right now who want you to believe that I am a “party of one” by taking on this fight to break up the status quo.

They believe I stand alone in wanting to Break The Fever that backs us up into shutdown politics and rushes through these massive, lobbyist-approved continuing resolutions.

**I know that’s not the case, Friend.**

I know that there are tens of millions of Americans like YOU who stand with me.

And as long as I have that grassroots support from the strongest movement in the history of American politics...

**There is NOTHING that will stop me from fighting this corrupt Washington Uniparty in order to be YOUR voice.**
---
| [🇺🇸 🇺🇸 JOIN ME: DEMAND NEW LEADERSHIP! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdvc1ukva3j3lbsaqqnbs3chk3aifjik63njunho_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jmaoj4shh2bs "🇺🇸 🇺🇸 JOIN ME: DEMAND NEW LEADERSHIP! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸")
---
| Thanks for having my back. I will be relentless in getting this government back on the side of the American People. Unlike Speaker McCarthy... You have my word.

Your humble servant,
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt6jlvns64bta23ho7teqdnmekq0h9ggv7ejggkg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jmaoj4shh2bs)

| Matt Gaetz (R-FL)

Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2002a36c3e3a4ecc8addc9002e3ec460&_e=mbg3SDeHM3d8wVOY8IAYClAZrWG35mUAYSIJdsN0nFNpV7bmRhl0kY21Qa-cptLYi2LEiQqAYxAbsml_NjTGQYEgZx0YfWNVrXvSCaEKKehJIM_NQIa0yYdjmbaQwiNmxN1IDzgEDTjba8T_9QVXS6NweiHIrBsbVk0Sg7G-UcGUyIdMkXHt3_niY3ELYlukFQciwOJnGHWX2ntHh3LlDrIExxDYsgNRyZy1Aom2MGHJvZaCt_7bckqvApk2GmkzkGP-A7xTxOUcncyc5C4JtCUUL1UQ-zjQ_et-ZJuwuoTki9n1PicDzJ4lQpdPMePHSd_-L5_-OGbRUnOmezNrAeXAl9drNV1SoGoNSPDRH3zqWDNobHTmybmqU5kfaDfLEkdGPrGs8f4Ke9J7fvYmBIBmy4Cnx-XwFAspV0vwNTg%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Dr. Kermit Jones
subject: Join me in supporting Healthcare for Action!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
Hi everyone,

I hope you and your families are doing well! I again want to thank all of you for the generous support you gave me and our team in California’s 3rd Congressional District last year. Every day I am inspired by the strength of my patients and so many fellow Americans who are advocating for real change in our country. It is their strength and your willingness to fight that leads me to continue to do my part in multiple ways this election cycle.

While I continue to help my patients every day, I have also recently joined the board of an amazing organization called Healthcare for Action [https://www.healthcareforaction.com/about] . Healthcare for Action is a new political action committee fighting to get frontline healthcare workers into Congress and get every American the healthcare system we deserve. They supported me in my last campaign, so I am working to support them this cycle. I have pledged to help them raise at least $25,000 by the end of October to help get trauma surgeons like Dr. Brian Williams and many others into Congress.
If you would consider contributing $25 dollars or more today, it will help them achieve their goal this cycle of raising over $500,000 to help fix our broken healthcare system. Here is the link [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/healthcare-for-action-1?refcode=kermitjones] to help support their cause.

Stay in touch, and I will do the same.

— Dr. Kermit Jones

https://www.facebook.com/DrKermitJones/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrKermitJones/] https://twitter.com/DrKermitJones [https://twitter.com/DrKermitJones] https://instagram.com/drkermitjones/ [https://instagram.com/drkermitjones/]
Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
Kermit Jones for Congress
PO Box 713
Roseville, CA 95661
United States
Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy.

### How to Start
We are experiencing a huge uptick in requests to serve with True the Vote! It is so exciting ... seeing the numbers climb and knowing this is just the beginning of the groundswell that I believe will continue throughout 2024.
Here’s our basic plan and timeline for connecting and serving with as many people as we can:
* **In the months ahead** we will post new opportunities to work together, all over the country.
* **For the next few weeks** we’ll to be noses down working on lawsuits. Trial begins in _Fair Fight v. True the Vote_ on October 26th in Georgia.
* **Later this week** we will launch a new and more engaging website with an improved look and feel. More on that below....
* **And tonight at 7p et** I’m going to talk about [How to Start](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HZ3JHW2d17DFn3FABtrwp5QrbX2UJe0nqFD2zIn101AxEVLqi9wf4wxGpc4BF-gNo6LLBCwlqquYFhyfbN8wKYadKTRji2GC1w5WIY_DGkVGyU4pWIpANnl4A6LOTIa88uOobY29_EJapYuoTR4f6lMUQHB5zXI1q4CnRvq66YScxXPinLZXn8B2YkG7CiFaDg/403/6KOxszAERbC4zv2l9ZN9QA/h1/oSwHserDyAAuDMRVdzOYxRO64wyJpAux0Kiu8Bst_IU), immediately, building a local team. Plot twist, the tips I’ll offer aren’t exclusive to Election Integrity. We’re going to discuss local team building methods that are effective to find support for any subject matter. Please join us tonight if you can.

| [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HZ3JHW2d17DFn3FABtrwp5QrbX2UJe0nqFD2zIn101AxEVLqi9wf4wxGpc4BF-gNo6LLBCwlqquYFhyfbN8wKYadKTRji2GC1w5WIY_DGkVGyU4pWIpANnl4A6LOTIa88uOobY29_EJapYuoTR4f6lMUQHB5zXI1q4CnRvq66YScxXPinLZXn8B2YkG7CiFaDg/403/6KOxszAERbC4zv2l9ZN9QA/h2/O0NpG7Vufxw1R3wCd8v4y6ZpYnL74a7ffieDauzD-J4)
---
[CLICK HERE TO WATCH ON LOCALS](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HZ3JHW2d17DFn3FABtrwp5QrbX2UJe0nqFD2zIn101AxEVLqi9wf4wxGpc4BF-gNo6LLBCwlqquYFhyfbN8wKYadKTRji2GC1w5WIY_DGkVGyU4pWIpANnl4A6LOTIa88uOobY29_EJapYuoTR4f6lMUQHB5zXI1q4CnRvq66YScxXPinLZXn8B2YkG7CiFaDg/403/6KOxszAERbC4zv2l9ZN9QA/h3/ypcPTWcxC2ujv4FlBUMBmo31bci4uYcUvJLbzu95eVc)
### A New Website is Coming!
Just in time to begin volunteer signups, we are thrilled to announce the coming launch of a new website. Site enhancements will include:
* more opportunities for service, collabs, and ways to connect
* better content
* trainings and toolkits
* easier signups
* user friendly donations page
* overall improved user experience
* merch
* a new look (that I love)

### This Week
Expect to see a few more notes from us this week.
I have a new affidavit that accompanies [this research on the Georgia elector challenges](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/1A5_Z39fk90fowLbTa71p3Hf2I_x3NUKZHTKEIA2irT--9e-V2LjS2o5fLv3iwjXIefnnv-h79X2rGFP6OYC6somcwSfC_dV9kwyRhyfEkLjtptKZ5MkRjrIc8lbkAOf9nPzvKqHgdwgfcHiG6YGgtCifmmSkCK56_KAd4Ev5T4/403/6KOxszAERbC4zv2l9ZN9QA/h4/vfUJTGknaQ51StRLa8fX333stf_stgBqijfNXl9s7PI). We’ll put that out in an email for your reference.
We’ll be announcing the new website (God willing) so that will be a fun one.
_Lastly, we are sending out a separate fundraising request. I’m giving you advance notice because it’s my hope that you’ll not only donate but forward to friends to donate too, so please be on the lookout. We don’t do “direct asks” very often. It’s my least favorite part of running True the Vote. But there’s no way we can do what needs to be done without substantial growth in support._
For context: there are 38 patriots who’ve been indicted over their actions related to election integrity in 2020. We are embroiled in five lawsuits of our own, helping as many indictees and groups as we can including providing testimony, affidavits, research, and legal support, while continuing to prepare for 2024, with plans for the largest program expansion in our organization’s history.
[ If you are concerned about election integrity, please support our work. Our goal is to leave no polling place unmanned, no registry unchecked, no patriot unregistered. ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HfjZt-BPNqgA3ijwg_5Jj_OlHnCTnA95yf3sUe8HbeyMcSJ-6s4zE6j7cXPO7LStuMPWP9ysirak2NstXCAaOEeFCApHadEg3osZTOLgU4YSrKIQmuBBGUMAuwKlsyAVaSkTCNESk15YdXlHvl1fds8/403/6KOxszAERbC4zv2l9ZN9QA/h5/c4kqAAqQeQBEydv0jViRFqEC78FvkCLlGNioOSpoppY)
There’s lots happening. Lots of good work ahead. It will not be easy, but I’m looking forward to it all. Our country is worth it.
Keep the faith. Never quit.
Ever onward -
|

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Vacate McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
Just like I said would happen if Speaker McCarthy caved and sided with Democrats...

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgsrphf3a4qu7kcrchav6d75r6fbfo6lt9052nrg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jm6o74cjh2bs)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

**FIRST** , our Speaker made an agreement with House conservatives in January to bring forward individual spending bills among other critical concessions.

_Since then, he has been in brazen, repeated violation of that deal._

**NOW,** McCarthy has made a new agreement... **One with DEMOCRATS to blow past our spending guardrails that – get this – even included a secret backroom deal to give more funding to UKRAINE!!!**

This shows you where his priorities truly lie. He would rather go work for his new boss Hakeem Jeffries to put our nation LAST than fulfill the promise he made in January. So while he breaks his promises, Whitney... I will be keeping this one:

_Just like I said would happen if Speaker McCarthy caved and sided with Democrats..._
---
| | [_**I Will Be Filing A Motion To Vacate This Week To Expel Our Democrat-Owned Speaker Of The House. Please Watch My Interview Below.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb2ojmb8e80ho9lag4d8b2rk4em5e6aaiee9n3uo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jm6o74cjh2bs)
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z11g44efmdk0lrl51vimfug6bk1rqrd5rm6bg6qg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jm6o74cjh2bs)
---
| [🇺🇸 WATCH NOW 🇺🇸](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc1mkeq22gt2cfjuh3418nenqk7pjn87qgif2of8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jm6o74cjh2bs "🇺🇸 WATCH NOW 🇺🇸")
---
| Our Speaker tells us he is being “the adult in the room” by lying to House conservatives and cutting a deal with the Democrats.

He wants you to believe the “adult” thing to do is to perpetuate the same system that has put us $33T into debt.

Well then, my message is simple, Friend: _If he is still our Speaker by this time next week... It will be because his new Democrat bosses have bailed him out._
**He can be THEIR Speaker. Not MINE.**
---
| [🇺🇸 🇺🇸 JOIN ME: DEMAND NEW LEADERSHIP! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze4p20unh24h92ui5stlsun0m1h287e3r0tcd0cg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jm6o74cjh2bs "🇺🇸 🇺🇸 JOIN ME: DEMAND NEW LEADERSHIP! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸")
---
| There are some in Washington right now who want you to believe that I am a “party of one” by taking on this fight to break up the status quo.

They believe I stand alone in wanting to Break The Fever that backs us up into shutdown politics and rushes through these massive, lobbyist-approved continuing resolutions.

**I know that’s not the case, Friend.**

I know that there are tens of millions of Americans like YOU who stand with me.

And as long as I have that grassroots support from the strongest movement in the history of American politics...

**There is NOTHING that will stop me from fighting this corrupt Washington Uniparty in order to be YOUR voice.**
---
| [🇺🇸 🇺🇸 JOIN ME: DEMAND NEW LEADERSHIP! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7fcr0evvfsuu5emvvoor7bcdtsirn9fv2rvhnro_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jm6o74cjh2bs "🇺🇸 🇺🇸 JOIN ME: DEMAND NEW LEADERSHIP! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸")
---
| Thanks for having my back. I will be relentless in getting this government back on the side of the American People. Unlike Speaker McCarthy... You have my word.

Your humble servant,
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcb5ghbt167ki4v7c9ic73ogsklet6lh8tfd7qfg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jm6o74cjh2bs)
---
| Matt Gaetz (R-FL)

body:

**Republican leaders need YOU to help them build their war chest to take back the Senate.** This race is going to come down to grassroots Americans like you.

We only have one more chance to make up for our missed goal last week, Peter. You are one of our most loyal patriots, and you’ve never let us down before.

**_We can’t afford for that to change now._**

name: Rep. Jim Banks
subject: Not Senate. Not Congress. School Boards.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Friend, this is Congressman Jim Banks. I'm not going to beat around the bush.

| | | Friend, this is Congressman Jim Banks. I'm not going to beat around the bush. **[Our public education system is imploding, and I need your help to fight back.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=94b745c728e146428ed17cb1c91cc1ad&_e=iWUFEujQpHiAAItSfXTKHgz37RD6NDd_SnLYZhEOlSnA7IpW2otjcbwJzjzqhg3Po2-9MsFs-2DpxKkMmkP0b3_jlxy4qntz4VIdiFmMZ7sIcyr06jHB0d2u_g-EwF3TKieJYzuEk3_5RKGWJoxqP5592Pm7i_xlNKdJFnYCYB0jPAyigMT6HUwfYBioTPSLheIqbdcoT3WZYNBW10IGHMeCwoCV8SF9o5u_FUEx0Kg-kYdyAJf1Qq9dBbWwSLZNN04kUhLIrm4Evci5hRo7JQfQkIyXpKYJnPhr78EES7zLIDuZkoe8UEkpF71LtnCV-TzqyNWuAUIns-0p16MHKy2vcBFWq4j44KdCh7GGRjnUVV2OnDJkeZKa2CBQgyqDx5gNlwcbOWlOBOaFVdNsvoo295FC40Ackx-4Ki9dISPxc1a5qY9o3SQgqfJH6Khi)** _Test scores are plummeting._ _Schools are forcing kids to mask up again and are threatening MORE school lockdowns._ _Critical Race Theory is being taught in every state in the country. _ _Parents are being lied to and ignored by the teacher 's they trust to educate their kids._ _Merit-based grading is now treated as "a racist system"_ _Children as early as elementary school are being groomed to adopt a new sexuality or "gender identity..." _ **_Some kids are even being given puberty blockers that could sterilize them for life as a part of the sick and twisted transgender ideology. _** I've been working overtime in Congress to save our schools from the radical left. But I'll be honest with you -- my colleagues on the other side of the aisle make it impossible. **[That's why I believe we need to fight back TODAY by investing in local school board races across the country.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=94b745c728e146428ed17cb1c91cc1ad&_e=iWUFEujQpHiAAItSfXTKHgz37RD6NDd_SnLYZhEOlSnA7IpW2otjcbwJzjzqhg3Po2-9MsFs-2DpxKkMmkP0b3_jlxy4qntz4VIdiFmMZ7sIcyr06jHB0d2u_g-EwF3TKieJYzuEk3_5RKGWJoxqP5592Pm7i_xlNKdJFnYCYB0jPAyigMT6HUwfYBioTPSLheIqbdcoT3WZYNBW10IGHMeCwoCV8SF9o5u_FUEx0Kg-kYdyAJf1Qq9dBbWwSLZNN04kUhLIrm4Evci5hRo7JQfQkIyXpKYJnPhr78EES7xXWWDWatY_20wogcq7J-q02ZqTE1XqnA5uAEc0tEMNuEm5brbwUcj6og-L0A1Plg28ikz9aRTXt4NOiM60Vs2EB7iA2J1U75TTPbfPMDevAtIqUbsM7BSM_3OCw0TyItgskhU2lv5MehH_ys4oCNeA)** This is where my friend, Ryan Girdusky, founder of the 1776 Project PAC comes in. In 2021, Ryan and his team started a Parent's REVOLUTION that has changed the lives of millions of students and children nationwide. In under two years 1776 has flipped over 130 school board seats from LIBERAL to CONSERVATIVE. **_I 've done some back of the napkin math -- and that means he's saved MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their local school systems. _** Now here's where the rubber meets the road, folks... clean_body: Roughly 1 YEAR OUT from the most important election in the history of our country.| | | Patriot – don’t miss out on your chance to meet President Trump! To commemorate being nearly 1 YEAR OUT from the most important election in the history of our country, your favorite president is hosting a special reception at the end of the month... and he wants to see YOU there! That’s right, President Trump wants YOUto join him at Mar-a-Lago for a special MAGA reception on October 26! He’ll fly you and a guest of your choice out to the event for FREE. He’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy drinks and hors d'oeuvres, you’ll get a hat signed by President Trump, and to top it all off, you’ll even get to take a special photo with your favorite president so that you can remember this night forever! All that’s left to do is enter to WIN! | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Wed, September 27, 2023Subject: Meet me at Mar-a-Lago!To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Patriot, I’m hosting a very special reception at Mar-a-Lago at the end of October to commemorate being nearly 1 YEAR OUT from the most important election in the history of our country. I will deliver remarks and a pep talk to our team for our final 1-year push to save America. ...And as a critical part of Team Trump, I’d love to have YOU there. One lucky winner (and a guest of your choice) will be flown to Mar-a-Lago to attend this fall reception – and to really make it special, we’ll take a picture together and you’ll get a hat signed by me. Now doesn’t that sound fun? Your flight, your hotel, and your tickets to the reception will all be on me... ... Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Karen=20Greenhalgh?=
subject: We Can't Trust Them
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate_
body:
You may have received mail pieces that inaccurately label my opponent as a Republican. Don’t buy the left-wing disinformation, | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cdd016481c5f/we-cant-trust-them?e=48b883ea87)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

You may have received mail pieces that inaccurately label my opponent as a Republican. **Don’t buy the left-wing disinformation, I am the only Republican, and only conservative, candidate in this race.**

---
|
---
| The Policy Information Center is a façade for Forward Majority, a progressive PAC which touts that “Our democracy is in crisis as the GOP wages a systematic assault on voting right and fair elections.”

**_How can a group focused on fair elections send out multiple mailers with blatant falsehoods?_**

Like we’ve known all along, the Democrats will stop at nothing to take back my seat: even sending mailers to republicans that mislabels me as a democrat while voting is taking place. This has to stop.

Unlike my opponent and his allies, I’m focused on supporting Governor Youngkin’s agenda to cut taxes, keep our families safe and get politics out of our schools.

This election has become an opportunity to send a message: crooked political stunts have no place in Virginia.

Cast your ballot early this week at the Voter Registrar’s Office Monday - Friday from 8AM-5PM.

Del. Karen Greenhalgh
---
| |
---
| _Paid for and Authorized by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate_

**Our mailing address is:**
Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate IncPO Box 62945Virginia Beach, VA 23466-2945
[Add us to your address book](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/vcard?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=2a3d326c92)

Want to change how you receive these emails?

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Vacate McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
Just like I said would happen if Speaker McCarthy caved and sided with Democrats...

| | | [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bcd6b884da44e78a58c79c503427cbb&_e=vvslaTxkwJ-8V2PFj0xySf_qCfRPZl4nlD0hzITGk9E2vNQnEHEcQEi6QN4A4FMO91GSilGpZCcKYFc9yLF7M9hninTRf0GfOhdY1146uk9fIzqk7_MyYL6H0QeH1-Pzqp3Lcq2h3QYHCuiQFxhW7DpK8-adt6jX2Qkn-9zY5hN43rt2DAysFCec3rY0xIR9JqDlh5EO6FBICNjj5ZkA5dej-Buo4wAnG_vrI90Q0s3XIYQPkDroow4Y3qhjQrWfVXIkm1nvUQqC2wsN0TUq_gYmIYRa2_MuaV4rcHQm50o%3D)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

**FIRST** , our Speaker made an agreement with House conservatives in January to bring forward individual spending bills among other critical concessions.

_Since then, he has been in brazen, repeated violation of that deal._

**NOW,** McCarthy has made a new agreement... **One with DEMOCRATS to blow past our spending guardrails that - get this - even included a secret backroom deal to give more funding to UKRAINE!!!**

This shows you where his priorities truly lie. He would rather go work for his new boss Hakeem Jeffries to put our nation LAST than fulfill the promise he made in January. So while he breaks his promises, Whitney... I will be keeping this one:

_Just like I said would happen if Speaker McCarthy caved and sided with Democrats ..._
---
| | [_**I Will Be Filing A Motion To Vacate This Week To Expel Our Democrat-Owned Speaker Of The House. Please Watch My Interview Below.**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bcd6b884da44e78a58c79c503427cbb&_e=vvslaTxkwJ-8V2PFj0xySf_qCfRPZl4nlD0hzITGk9E2vNQnEHEcQEi6QN4A4FMO91GSilGpZCcKYFc9yLF7M9hninTRf0GfOhdY1146uk9fIzqk7_MyYL6H0QeH1-Pzqp3Lcq2h3QYHCuiQFxhW7Lbv4rkn1rZO3Y5q0Pi_GRDFCiXnTY3jLHtDPa4_WnJMi8ui_iDSyMMBFx756k15jXjzF-7pmbCi5mrs7wbKlJlUXpXT9xQnxLQ9jmAvpHsMbHWmr_SHas8m8ydkg5xIiNf3n6eOBr318UsfPyoYkTc%3D)

---
| Our Speaker tells us he is being "the adult in the room" by lying to House conservatives and cutting a deal with the Democrats.

He wants you to believe the "adult" thing to do is to perpetuate the same system that has put us $33T into debt.

Well then, my message is simple, Friend: _If he is still our Speaker by this time next week ... It will be because his new Democrat bosses have bailed him out._
**He can be THEIR Speaker. Not MINE.**
---
| [🇺🇸 🇺🇸 JOIN ME: DEMAND NEW LEADERSHIP! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bcd6b884da44e78a58c79c503427cbb&_e=vvslaTxkwJ-8V2PFj0xySf_qCfRPZl4nlD0hzITGk9E2vNQnEHEcQEi6QN4A4FMO91GSilGpZCcKYFc9yLF7M9hninTRf0GfOhdY1146uk9fIzqk7_MyYL6H0QeH1-Pzqp3Lcq2h3QYHCuiQFxhW7NxFYGSQ92XnFDYAAyvbKy9SejeMgWjvAiVdcZ7kc06xG9BxJOZZqsdc2TheBlMWRm8_JBXp0I6IVOTweWcM5xid3vNHsqLNG9nj0iLRf4gJsE_ZPuh1_tCLJ2Kf6cZxuhTqwDwdMBIUOE9UGFkMmmo%3D "🇺🇸 🇺🇸 JOIN ME: DEMAND NEW LEADERSHIP! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸")
---
| There are some in Washington right now who want you to believe that I am a "party of one" by taking on this fight to break up the status quo.

They believe I stand alone in wanting to Break The Fever that backs us up into shutdown politics and rushes through these massive, lobbyist-approved continuing resolutions.

**I know that 's not the case, Friend. **

I know that there are tens of millions of Americans like YOU who stand with me.

And as long as I have that grassroots support from the strongest movement in the history of American politics...

**There is NOTHING that will stop me from fighting this corrupt Washington Uniparty in order to be YOUR voice.**
---
| [🇺🇸 🇺🇸 JOIN ME: DEMAND NEW LEADERSHIP! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bcd6b884da44e78a58c79c503427cbb&_e=vvslaTxkwJ-8V2PFj0xySf_qCfRPZl4nlD0hzITGk9E2vNQnEHEcQEi6QN4A4FMO91GSilGpZCcKYFc9yLF7M9hninTRf0GfOhdY1146uk9fIzqk7_MyYL6H0QeH1-Pzqp3Lcq2h3QYHCuiQFxhW7N0nyzuTRQheLzDIhOnNfkutsFT-6WuPltEZzzgvJNhigo7JdTPiQLIv7VOU7g1hPS3ZajOPU--apLLdtPT0i77wOguDHGfwrU934fa1uZdm6aQJdrRCPd3-MrpW3H2U8zK4qUw3KvwDkLHVtxTC5QY%3D "🇺🇸 🇺🇸 JOIN ME: DEMAND NEW LEADERSHIP! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸")
---
| Thanks for having my back. I will be relentless in getting this government back on the side of the American People. Unlike Speaker McCarthy... You have my word.

Your humble servant,

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: We desperately need your voice!
body:
Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?

| [ ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z57r3f1vf394flv2ggggcuhtsjut2b4odgcv5aa0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jm1pb7chh2bs)
---
Pro-Life Advocate,

I'm writing to you today as a passionate protector of vulnerable women and the unborn. I know that you share my belief that every human life is precious and should be protected.

I've been a pro-life activist for over 20 years, and I've seen firsthand the devastating effects of abortion on women, children, and families. I've met women who have had abortions and dealt with the pain and regret as they navigate a deeply felt loss in their lives. I've met children who were born after their mothers were denied an abortion and who are now thriving. And I've met families who have been torn apart by abortion.

I know that you're also aware of the recent Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a historic victory for the pro-life movement, but this was just the beginning of the fight. **_We still have a long way to go to ensure that all unborn babies and their mothers are protected from abortion._**

The first step is for pro-life Americans to come together and state what we believe and what we will do in order to protect the unborn. [Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjor27gt496cjcq93h1rcbt0qt3f0cd1i3b18bdg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jm1pb7chh2bs)

When you sign the pledge, you'll be joining a growing movement of pro-life Americans who are working to make a difference. You'll also be receiving regular updates from SBA Pro-Life America about the latest pro-life news and events.

[SIGN THE PLEDGE »](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z075tb0c6otacnos7gh9gjcfptbjcg7j376g0q1o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9jm1pb7chh2bs)
| **I know that you care about the unborn, the protections for mothers and their babies and I know that you want to make a difference. I hope you'll join me in signing the SBA Pro-Life America Pledge to Stand Up for the Unborn. Together, we can build a pro-life America where every child is welcomed and valued.**
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

| | [](http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZzdHVkZW50c2ZvcmxpZmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnJTJG&sig=L8Th7c237aJ9GfXpQskGaufQXwXaTsJkEyrLxqTUDqx&iat=1696282811&a=%7C%7C649951085%7C%7C&account=studentsforlife%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=fHyZEJhwgD6RRGnE78WWulc022jqJaGGsE%2FunMtkcxSyB6fJ%3A6SWI7MtrCZ3xDXbqE0Vko9ZwJTH7KDAZ&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&i=2877A2852A1A27344)
---
| | Peter,

The abortion industry and their political allies are trying to sell the lie that late-term abortions are rare and only happen to save the lives of mothers. Just check out this recent Tweet from the Planned Parenthood President...
---
| |
---
| | She’s lying.

Because according to the most recent **[CDC report](http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRnd3dy5jZGMuZ292JTJGbW13ciUyRnZvbHVtZXMlMkY3MSUyRnNzJTJGc3M3MTEwYTEuaHRt&sig=CvZ6YU5CHufjUCqXz8M3BeK4qtdzF3usCKRuVRewcqGo&iat=1696282811&a=%7C%7C649951085%7C%7C&account=studentsforlife%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=fHyZEJhwgD6RRGnE78WWulc022jqJaGGsE%2FunMtkcxSyB6fJ%3A6SWI7MtrCZ3xDXbqE0Vko9ZwJTH7KDAZ&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&i=2877A2852A1A27902)** , more than 40,000 abortions were committed in the second and third trimesters in 2020.

_**Does that sound RARE? It’s time for a fact check.**_

**[Join us for our](http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/Prod/link-tracker?&sig=GrDRPo9QfJxjbHVCcnuuBUDM1mQprrHJ2zMRfPqeRJJ8&iat=1696282811&a=%7C%7C649951085%7C%7C&account=studentsforlife%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=fHyZEJhwgD6RRGnE78WWulc022jqJaGGsE%2FunMtkcxSyB6fJ%3A6SWI7MtrCZ3xDXbqE0Vko9ZwJTH7KDAZ&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&i=2877A2852A1A27903)** _**[Expose Late-Term Abortion Day of Action](http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRnd3dy5zdHVkZW50c2ZvcmxpZmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnJTJGZXhwb3NlbGF0ZXRlcm1hYm9ydGlvbiUyRiUyM2V4cG9zZWxhdGV0ZXJt&sig=JA72qS7juN6qVFpmHc8ttCcVxaHHuXKouu6xYvfoXZoN&iat=1696282811&a=%7C%7C649951085%7C%7C&account=studentsforlife%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=fHyZEJhwgD6RRGnE78WWulc022jqJaGGsE%2FunMtkcxSyB6fJ%3A6SWI7MtrCZ3xDXbqE0Vko9ZwJTH7KDAZ&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&i=2877A2852A1A27904)**_**[in a city near you on Wednesday, October 18th!](http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/Prod/link-tracker?&sig=GrDRPo9QfJxjbHVCcnuuBUDM1mQprrHJ2zMRfPqeRJJ8&iat=1696282811&a=%7C%7C649951085%7C%7C&account=studentsforlife%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=fHyZEJhwgD6RRGnE78WWulc022jqJaGGsE%2FunMtkcxSyB6fJ%3A6SWI7MtrCZ3xDXbqE0Vko9ZwJTH7KDAZ&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&i=2877A2852A1A27903)**

In cities across the country, we will be hosting two events...

* Overpass Activism & Rally with banner and sign waving
* Phone Calling Night to call voters in Ohio encouraging them to VOTE NO on Issue 1, which would legalize late-term abortion _( free dinner provided!)_

If you can join us for both or one of these activities in a city near you, **[RSVP here](http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRnd3dy5zdHVkZW50c2ZvcmxpZmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnJTJGZXhwb3NlbGF0ZXRlcm1hYm9ydGlvbiUyRiUyM2V4cG9zZWxhdGV0ZXJt&sig=JA72qS7juN6qVFpmHc8ttCcVxaHHuXKouu6xYvfoXZoN&iat=1696282811&a=%7C%7C649951085%7C%7C&account=studentsforlife%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=fHyZEJhwgD6RRGnE78WWulc022jqJaGGsE%2FunMtkcxSyB6fJ%3A6SWI7MtrCZ3xDXbqE0Vko9ZwJTH7KDAZ&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&i=2877A2852A1A27904)**.

Here’s the list of cities we are hosting the Expose Late-Term Abortion Rally & Call Night on Wednesday, October 18th:

Bowling Green, OH
Fairfax, VA (overpass only)
St. Louis, MO
New Paltz, NY
Fort Wayne, IN
Philadelphia, PA
Pittsburgh, PA
Raleigh, NC
Greenville, SC
Boston, MA
Chicago, IL
Pewaukee, WI
Atlanta, GA
Manchester, NH
Austin, TX
Phoenix, AZ
Las Vegas, NV
Fairbanks, AK
Louisville, KY (call night only)
Denver, CO
Sarasota, FL
Sacramento, CA
Washington, DC (lobby day)

Despite most Americans opposing late-term abortion, it’s a part of the Democratic party’s platform—abortion for any reason, for all nine months.

Not to mention, if a mother’s life is immediately at risk during pregnancy, an emergency delivery is the safest and fastest way to preserve her and her child’s life. Saving the most life should,_of course_ , be the goal of any medical provider.

So Peter, will you [sign up to join us for the Expose Late-Term Abortion Day of Action __ at a location near you](http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRnd3dy5zdHVkZW50c2ZvcmxpZmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnJTJGZXhwb3NlbGF0ZXRlcm1hYm9ydGlvbiUyRiUyM2V4cG9zZWxhdGV0ZXJt&sig=JA72qS7juN6qVFpmHc8ttCcVxaHHuXKouu6xYvfoXZoN&iat=1696282811&a=%7C%7C649951085%7C%7C&account=studentsforlife%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=fHyZEJhwgD6RRGnE78WWulc022jqJaGGsE%2FunMtkcxSyB6fJ%3A6SWI7MtrCZ3xDXbqE0Vko9ZwJTH7KDAZ&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&i=2877A2852A1A27904) to counter the abortion industry’s lies on Wednesday, October 18th?

We will train you and make sure you have everything you need to make a difference.

Every single mother and baby deserves protection from the violence of abortion.

Hope to see your sign-up come through soon!

For Life,
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
| | Savanna Deretich
Government Affairs Coordinator Students for Life Action

P.S. --If you’re in the Washington, D.C. area, I have a unique opportunity for you! You can attend a lobby day with our team to expose late-term abortion on Capitol Hill. [Just select the D.C. option on our sign-up form.](http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRnd3dy5zdHVkZW50c2ZvcmxpZmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnJTJGZXhwb3NlbGF0ZXRlcm1hYm9ydGlvbiUyRiUyM2V4cG9zZWxhdGV0ZXJt&sig=JA72qS7juN6qVFpmHc8ttCcVxaHHuXKouu6xYvfoXZoN&iat=1696282811&a=%7C%7C649951085%7C%7C&account=studentsforlife%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=fHyZEJhwgD6RRGnE78WWulc022jqJaGGsE%2FunMtkcxSyB6fJ%3A6SWI7MtrCZ3xDXbqE0Vko9ZwJTH7KDAZ&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&i=2877A2852A1A27904)
---
| | [Unsubscribe me](http://newsletter.studentsforlife.org/proc.php?nl=1&c=2877&m=2852&s=e8ce76248dd02de8a72576da08bdf2f9&act=unsub) from your newsletter
Students for Life of America, 1000 Winchester St., Suite 301, Fredericksburg, VA 22401, United States

name: Majorie Dannenfelser
subject: Let our lawmakers know you stand for life!
body:
Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?

| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24516%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y8Y5mtX9qRy%2fJV3zgplLyw&sysid=1)
---
Pro-Life Advocate,

I'm writing to you today as a passionate protector of vulnerable women and the unborn. I know that you share my belief that every human life is precious and should be protected.

I've been a pro-life activist for over 20 years, and I've seen firsthand the devastating effects of abortion on women, children, and families. I've met women who have had abortions and dealt with the pain and regret as they navigate a deeply felt loss in their lives. I've met children who were born after their mothers were denied an abortion and who are now thriving. And I've met families who have been torn apart by abortion.

I know that you're also aware of the recent Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a historic victory for the pro-life movement, but this was just the beginning of the fight. **_We still have a long way to go to ensure that all unborn babies and their mothers are protected from abortion._**

The first step is for pro-life Americans to come together and state what we believe and what we will do in order to protect the unborn. [Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24517%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cn9FA8w84E%2bQXhzOyBjeAQ&sysid=1)

When you sign the pledge, you'll be joining a growing movement of pro-life Americans who are working to make a difference. You'll also be receiving regular updates from SBA Pro-Life America about the latest pro-life news and events.
[SIGN THE PLEDGE »](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24518%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WFYRQML7yV937MGy3aJ07g&sysid=1)
| **I know that you care about the unborn, the protections for mothers and their babies and I know that you want to make a difference. I hope you'll join me in signing the SBA Pro-Life America Pledge to Stand Up for the Unborn. Together, we can build a pro-life America where every child is welcomed and valued.**
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Freedom vs. Failure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqg001eoiff1r7tpb6gce8r05eoqscovchtpovl0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9ge0ob4c5h2bs)
---
Friend, **" Just tell me when and where"** was the phrase heard 'round the country. **_Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th._** _When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge:_ **_" Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2096ji9b2fuhjkf8345usk7anpldjksl6519n88_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9ge0ob4c5h2bs)
---
This debate boils down to freedom vs. failure, Friend. Gov. DeSantis is ready to make the case for the future of our country. Let us know: **_who do you think will win this debate?_**
---
| | | | | [VOTE DESANTIS](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0jisf24epl1fj1t5pffinsjca4u61obak0os118_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9ge0ob4c5h2bs)
---
| | | [VOTE NEWSOM](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc5jpanbqabnljji7iuth2vsee3s69pcb4r4aabo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9ge0ob4c5h2bs)
---
In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhigpdqoeo3h2eamo196d7ok79lp9pbkn4nslong_rp22sh2s8i66p73c9ge0ob4c5h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

Tallahassee, FL 32315

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Please meet Laphonza Butler, my pick to complete Senator Feinstein's term in the U.S. Senate.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
I think you are going to really, really love Laphonza in the Senate, and I'd like to tell you a bit about her if you're willing to stick around before clicking away.

Friends -
Last night, I announced my intention to appoint Laphonza Butler to complete Senator Dianne Feinstein's term in the United States Senate.
I think you are going to love Laphonza in the Senate, and I hope you’ll stick around for a second to learn a bit more about her as she takes office.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2902?t=1&akid=1597%2E4767699%2EDRbs6B)
Laphonza was raised by her mother, a caregiver. She knows first-hand the importance of a fair wage and representation.
Before this appointment, Laphonza was serving as president of EMILY's List.
For those of you who aren't familiar with EMILY's List, it is the largest organization dedicated to electing pro-choice Democratic women to public office. Laphonza was the first woman of color and mother to lead the group.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2903?t=2&akid=1597%2E4767699%2EDRbs6B)
For more than a decade, Laphonza also served as the president of the largest labor union in California — SEIU Local 2015 — a union representing more than 325,000 nursing home and home-care workers throughout the state.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2903?t=3&akid=1597%2E4767699%2EDRbs6B)
Laphonza will also make some history when she is sworn in to serve as the first openly LGBTQ+ person to represent California in the Senate and the first Black lesbian to openly serve in Congress in American history. She follows in the footsteps of Vice President Kamala Harris as the second Black woman to represent California in the Senate and the 3rd ever in the history of the Senate.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2903?t=4&akid=1597%2E4767699%2EDRbs6B)
Laphonza has always been an advocate for women and girls and a fighter for working people, and she'll represent us proudly in the United States Senate.
As we mourn the incredible loss of Senator Feinstein, the very freedoms she fought for — reproductive freedom, equal protection, and safety from gun violence — have never been under greater assault. Laphonza will carry the baton left by Senator Feinstein, continue to break glass ceilings, and fight for all Californians in Washington D.C.
Thank you for reading,
Gavin Newsom
[FOLLOW LAPHONZA ON TWITTER](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2903?t=5&akid=1597%2E4767699%2EDRbs6B)
* * *
👉🏻 **Hi.** Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If it sounds worth it that Democrats fight back everywhere rights are under attack – even in Red States – we are asking you to contribute $20 to Gavin Newsom’s Campaign for Democracy today. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in.
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-oct23?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em231002-1-30&refcode2=1597_4767699_DRbs6B&akid=1597%2E4767699%2EDRbs6B)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-oct23?express_lane=true&refcode=em231002-1-30&refcode2=1597_4767699_DRbs6B&akid=1597%2E4767699%2EDRbs6B)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=1597%2E4767699%2EDRbs6B).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

But the numbers don't lie. Californians have been voting with their feet and moving in droves to Florida because of Gavin Newsom's colossal policy failures. It's time to show the nation that freedom is worth fighting for. **Freedom vs. Failure.** **Ron DeSantis vs. Gavin Newsom.** **Red vs. Blue**. **[Will you rise to the occasion to support Governor Ron DeSantis as he fights against the Left's champion for liberal failure?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=da4b98eaae9144c89d57055921dee11e&_e=V2DkHnwpWRq5GEcDPh5tmrOvUketRaXwtGuN9Lx8OQm1dlAOM3fKEYzJrop_mlb9tfmgXtr1t9tZjbGUTrtdJwlZfx7G8n7IkD8J10HHat7oZv6gA4HboZ1R9MPhgzCxdnFTWkcoxVfud-EsDFkGgSqtP0L-kOA_XSZ9o4Rj2d5IIZIkm5S7qMdQcP5ruJ2mX313sril-VJeqOp5BvYL9qXzYDCF0lRiaNulYJU6sFv6KZe4Sm0bhEXSeIG5U_k_miEhR5gayD8x82z5aYbe6AVrIHOBPOLuhJEPqcdntekmq199sUOWrBuRqfIn0xALYSMF4zRh11faj4F1xq5v8EnI1urep-hWhmsu-_6AtgsYWNlUEbT9DDogTz-JEQwZWvi9_ADBYclVLTfo95-YcieAZbhv-9D712kfQeo4400-hnIHg9aMcvXcewfIQzvSiKlCoCmViogLtwJLJo9bQQ%3D%3D "Will you rise to the occasion to support Governor Ron DeSantis as he fights against the Left's champion for liberal failure?")**
