**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=da4b98eaae9144c89d57055921dee11e&_e=V2DkHnwpWRq5GEcDPh5tmrOvUketRaXwtGuN9Lx8OQm1dlAOM3fKEYzJrop_mlb9tfmgXtr1t9tZjbGUTrtdJwlZfx7G8n7IkD8J10HHat7oZv6gA4HboZ1R9MPhgzCxdnFTWkcoxVfud-EsDFkGgSqtP0L-kOA_XSZ9o4Rj2d5IIZIkm5S7qMdQcP5ruJ2mX313sril-VJeqOp5BvYL9qXzYDCF0lRiaNulYJU6sFv6KZe4Sm0bhEXSeIG5U_k_miEhR5gayD8x82z5aYbe6AVrIHOBPOLuhJEPqcdntelwh2OWpvxPb6Jlz2gCcc6k1_xxUD15Dezc6_VwfgJMiz9EW4Ecj0O8w6ADNVo2p9d-nFdOh-UgQAcQ0avj7rATzdA5_oFJFB3UQMLdBSCPYWHzeHQxBKzqAM2-lY0gMRHxFONwQnLGqICE9F3zi2TQ09kZVfHTVoNX0i-5paekXw%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

clean_body: Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, "Just tell me when and where" was the phrase heard 'round the country. Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th. When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge: "Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis | This debate boils down to freedom vs. failure, Friend. Gov. DeSantis is ready to make the case for the future of our country. Let us know: who do you think will win this debate? | | | | | | | | In Freedom, Team DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

This newsletter will keep you up to date on all the things Jen Kiggans is up to around town on the Campaign side of the house. We look forward to sharing stories around the district and keeping you up to date with all the happenings on the campaign trail! This newsletter is for unofficial campaign activities; not official U.S. House of Representatives updates. WHAT JEN WAS UP TO IN SEPTEMBER… In a show of overwhelming support from House GOP leadership, Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy personally came to the district in support of Jen! Jen attended a fundraiser in Chesapeake in support of Baxter Ennis, running for House of Delegates in District 89! Jen spoke at the RPVB breakfast and talked about what's going on in D.C. Jen loves talking to voters about the work she's doing up in Washington! Jen had the privilege of tasting delicious foods and experiencing enriching culture at IndiaFest in Virginia Beach. Already can't wait till next year! Jen was able to attend the Virginia Beach Fallen Heroes Freedom Fest 2023 and meet some awesome voters! It is so important to honor and never forget those who gave the ultimate sacrifice. Jen spent some time at the Isle of Wight County Fair. It was so fun seeing all the booths and meeting so many voters in the Western side of our district! Jen enjoyed the NAS Oceana Air Show 2023. As an aviator, this event was a personal favorite. It was awesome meeting some WW2 vets as well! Jen attended a Labor Day BBQ in Suffolk with Governor Youngkin in support of Delegate Emily Brewer, and candidate for House of Delegates Mike Dillender. Jen had a blast at the Republican Womens' Club of Hampton Roads’ 33rd Annual "Star Spangled Ball"! Such a great event with great people. Jen was able to attend an event in support of Delegate Barry Knight with special guests including Governor Youngkin and AG Miyares! Jen in the News - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=05a4fd583868e5324964afa25ebe2c99fadaf6628554f58c7bbcada6bb374c86fa80da4610628b770002d8476f843ee9b64ea44321ca5f73161576be8b03bdc8 Kiggans Introduced a bill to help ensure that members of the military are paid during a government shutdown. - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=05a4fd583868e532bdb9f2d6c2988afbf8804589912f79db8d124a292b5ebe42a8615d1acbd9ecf83fd59db9e4377b03b2ad6a14b8ea298ec3a36bf543fe1ea7 Kiggans received the AbilityOne’s Congressional Champion Award, which honors her commitment to constituents with disabilities and support of the AbilityOne Program. - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=05a4fd583868e5327b30882093f40f5d51c24e7ea05cbe20839622f4b57f86ee4ca211a38c77ae2f976ef7a59ca0586ece786ff1576383df8a65d785e635452a CODEL meets with senior officials in the Indo-Pacific to discuss security issues and to counter increased aggression from the CCP. Team Kiggans on the Road Check out some of the September highlights our team has been up to this month. Staff attended an event with the College Republicans at Regent University with Kevin Adams. Staff was able to attend a quick event in support of Delegate Karen Greenhalgh with special guests Senator Bill DeSteph, City Councilman Michael Berlucchi, and Virginia Beach City Treasurer Leigh Henderson. NRCC staff spoke at the Republican Party of Virginia Beach breakfast on the importance of getting out to vote this November, as well as the importance of early voting going forward. Staff attended a campaign event for Kevin Adams with special guest LG Winsome Sears! Staff attended an event hosted by the Hampton Roads Black Caucus. It was great to see familiar faces including Kevin Adams and LG Winsome Sears! Staff was able to attend an early voting rally with Delegate Greenhalgh, Kevin Adams, and AG Jason Miyares! Early Voting is open, let's get off to a strong start! Staff attended the 'Party On The Pier' event in support of delegate Rob Bloxom! Staff attended the swearing in ceremony of Sheriff Rocky Holcomb in Virginia Beach. Thank you for your service Sheriff Stolle! HOW YOU CAN HELP Want to be more involved with Team Kiggans? We could use YOUR help. name: Daniel Cameron
subject: This is bigger than you and me

body:
To view this email as a web page, go [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/vm2/bd87c93c574542d63947229f28c3afba/40933/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933)

---
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/bd87c93c574542d63947229f28c3afba/8e3ea007af57d17ec3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
| | Friends, Over the past few months, I have been traveling all across Kentucky, meeting with so many of you. Your energy is electric! The momentum is building for a big change this Fall. And what a great feeling that is! Together we are building a movement. I need your help to show everyone else the strength of our grassroots campaign growing across Kentucky and America. _**[Give $1, $5, $10, $25, or more to take a stand for Kentucky!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/bd87c93c574542d63947229f28c3afba/6645082b7d50ff10c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_
---
[**TAKE A STAND NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/bd87c93c574542d63947229f28c3afba/606e4efa7c8999d9c3d6b838967d376c/40933)

| | This past weekend, Marjorie Taylor Greene voted to shut down the government, a move that would have harmed hundreds of thousands of Georgians – including tens of thousands of her own constituents. She did it all because she wanted to pass DEVASTATING cuts to the Social Security Administration, public education, nutritional assistance for pregnant women, the EPA, cancer research, small business support, and so much more.

_**We need to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene.**_

It’s clear that her extreme agenda is harming hardworking Georgians, but the worst part is – **_it’s becoming a mainstream direction for the GOP._**

In fact, MTG wasn’t the only Georgia Republican to vote to shut down the government this weekend. **FIVE Georgia Republicans voted against a bipartisan bill to fund the government for 45 days.**

[**_We need to replace these GOP Representatives. It’s clear that they’re willing to hold the government hostage to pass an extreme agenda that harms hardworking Georgians. Friend, **"Just tell me when and where"** was the phrase heard 'round the country. **_Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th._** _When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge:_ **_"Let's get it done. **Meet Ron DeSantis**

| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33e5281c62ea4d5c9d98e5f1ccbe7fde&_e=iSB5ZBicvShlrnfwGpxU7I81uexUJ66bo0rHaGcVkX41VP6t7Br3r0_Nci3uuZsY0uzZ1Sj8VKAMP6eN_OFGmbyuELZ8rTwcijTVTGxCYJF2dFilDFpuUcVDaYfj6CADcSUHazyrYpUE9_PJijvK5V0w84bLyUm3SVWOIJKqS-qelod3arKsgnY4UGf9r0ta7_rM29uDGRdgtyigtGyy_qL92IkyhZEukKIsicWJfvp6GKQCgfnIwJLYP0BRUBtApTmkpKoi5CaQoDqwZOjyd8USYNssfeDDAbe_tGrp7eWrUvJFKMMVEbSwUgL0iQ3cWE53g_nSI1DLlUy83-jsFwKjWHmcpQ3pVJ7M3344QEay896AusStiZpNcxBzxaSidBCub9X07JtUjU6enXNDz0Ijv_Pam6kC4dpAeoHAuxE%3D)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**

Team DeSantis

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=539092be07b8423a8dba20f6049cc5e8&_e=LwK0419swPe4ToATCZi3_urUoA-xWRVMjr6SoLYRCk0F3VyDGKaObFb0fz2ooh3fkzDDKV5v1iq8dP42MpvUz8FAR2AzkuIW2_QNOx6_6lo9v529pDoFQpjWz69n2w0BvVuKtNGdTLSp0I3G8mHhTSBX7PqX5INbUwV_46tyOyTL4-U4RCoxNSXVgLxVaB4Vj7dxanNhyv1KwFXBN6Mku0oBTRGUIpv_nxKjgb7vQjkpJtFZH5L04PCNcG53uOBaOqZLiBbUFiead_WNVe06KseZyLbm1bccntCSPsTq4S8oPxDuW9_C1TB3wgB4WU1VtASj9vm5kxwOTHXv_zmSbVDAl3DN20h7_37fHFqstKNYC-O2nWth9aHLcxSmKTYT70uPd2fZNB9DCmafl-xh8hKysX0Lk0Ahu3Cg8Wo8n6k%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Nicole, Accountable Tech
subject: Meta has blocked news content on Facebook in Canada
body:
Time to Act:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3de80edf-f491-4762-986e-0d55648868b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tecd9dadf-e5eb-4bad-9014-8d5e9cba8964/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) In retaliation for the passage of the Online News Act in June – a new Canadian law requiring tech companies to compensate news publishers – Meta is now blocking news content on Facebook in Canada, even during massive wildfires. Peter, the urgency of access to accurate news cannot be overstated. [Please join us in asking Meta to stop blocking news articles on Facebook and Instagram in Canada, sign our petition right now →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75d3fe8c-1787-47ce-805c-889a8e5b83ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc4caa6ba-dec7-4b38-8ea3-f66e7dbb7ca0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Peter, Meta's news blockade in Canada persists, even when Canada is grappling with its worst wildfire season on record. [1] In retaliation for the passage of the Online News Act in June – a new law in Canada that requires tech companies to compensate news publishers for their content – Meta blocked news content on Facebook in Canada, even as the devastating Yellowknife fires took place. [2] The urgency of access to accurate news cannot be overstated. By blocking news articles, Meta is cutting vulnerable Canadians off from potentially life-saving information. As one of the leading organizations that advocates for transparency, accountability, and oversight of Big Tech giants, Accountable Tech is sounding the alarm. [Add your name to: Tell Meta to stop blocking news articles on Facebook in Canada.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd58e3f3-db66-4857-a5b9-ecb88b60c38e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T473172af-667c-4b49-80d0-d5beaa804b3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | This is not the first time Meta has cut off news links in a specific country. Recently, the company temporarily blocked news sharing in Australia, only to relent after public outrage. [3] This pattern of holding news content hostage to evade regulatory measures is unacceptable and indicative of Meta's disregard for the vital role that news plays in our society. Whether Meta likes it or not, they're a huge part of how news is shared across the globe. The suppression of news articles damages democracy, puts people at risk during disasters, punishes the free press, and erodes trust in the social media platforms we rely on for information. [We can not afford to let this precedent stand – add your name to urge Meta to reverse course and stop blocking critical news articles in Canada. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea1a9da5-18fc-42c9-ae35-7a978bc140d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Big Tech giants such as Meta have outsized control over our information ecosystem and news distribution, which coupled with their apparent disregard for anything beyond profits is deeply concerning. As climate-caused fires continue – whether on Maui or in Canada – we cannot let Big Tech companies dictate our access to reliable news coverage. Thanks for joining us and speaking out, Nicole Gill
Co-founder and Executive Director
Accountable Tech 1\. BBC News: [https://www.cbc.ca/news/politics/canada-wildfire-season-worst-ever-more-to-come-1.6934284](https://default.salsalabs.org/T007817be-aff0-4df0-92b2-658fd60e331b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) 2.CBC Canada: [https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/nwt-wildfire-evacuation-meta-blocking-news-1.6939286](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6698c3df-d333-470a-bd4a-6d9015bfd0d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) 3\. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70819269/430420652/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmU5NmU3ZS00ZDYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N_qnEVwRh-SfK6WPBDJBFo5pRJVPbQ7oD9Xyi033Vco=&emci=782c1ed5-4c61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=c2e96e7e-4d61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) I want to share some great news with you today: **Pennsylvania is now an automatic voter registration state.** No unnecessary hurdles, no burdensome extra appointments — when you head to the DMV to get or renew your driver’s license, you’ll be automatically registered to vote. This is a monumental step for our democracy. But the truth is that some Republicans have already unleashed attacks against this new law – including Donald Trump, who said the law is a “disaster for the Election of Republicans” and a “totally Unconstitutional Act.” [_**Listen, this law is absolutely constitutional. Right now, over 1 million Pennsylvanians are eligible to vote but aren’t registered — this program will make it easier for every eligible PA voter to make their voice heard.
Across the country, we’ve seen too many far-right Republicans try to restrict the right to vote at every chance they get. _We’ve seen it here in Pennsylvania!_
They tried to roll back mail-in voting (a law that most Republicans even voted for!) and they called for audits of the 2020 election – which by the way, proved that Joe Biden won fair and square. We need an Attorney General who will fight back against their nonsense, and defend your rights.
**When far-right extremists try to take away your right to vote, I’ll fight tooth and nail to stop them.**

clean_body: I want to share some great news with you today: Pennsylvania is now an automatic voter registration state. No unnecessary hurdles, no burdensome extra appointments — when you head to the DMV to get or renew your driver’s license, you’ll be automatically registered to vote. This is a monumental step for our democracy. But the truth is that some Republicans have already unleashed attacks against this new law – including Donald Trump, who said the law is a “disaster for the Election of Republicans” and a “totally Unconstitutional Act.” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Right now, over 1 million Pennsylvanians are eligible to vote but aren’t registered — this program will make it easier for every eligible PA voter to make their voice heard. body:
Thank you for being part of this campaign

**I just wanted to say “thank you” – thank you to all of you for being with me on this journey, thank you for bearing with us on the flood of requests to donate, and a special thank you to those of you who have contributed to this campaign.**

I fear that sometimes what matters gets lost in the flurry of emails, and this all feels like a fundraising arms race – a competition for who can rack up the most dollars to unleash a volley of attack ads.

Our entire political system can feel disconnected from people’s lives and instead seem like a game of “flipping seats” from one color to another, of two teams competing for power and fighting about who is in charge instead of fighting to improve people’s lives.

That’s why my favorite part of campaigning is knocking on neighbors’ doors and talking with them about what’s on their minds. This weekend, the topic of the narrowly averted (for now) government shutdown kept coming up.

**Rep. David Schweikert was one of the 90 radical Republicans, the Chaos Caucus, who voted against the vast majority of Democrats and Republicans who had worked together to keep our government open** – to keep paying our troops and providing essential services to seniors and students, and others. This is so at odds with the spirit of working together that defines the best of this district that it made me think that what this race really comes down to is Chaos vs. Community.

Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th._** _When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge:_ **_"Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**

In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c31f889e30e84e64914941ae7ca3d24e&_e=JcgT9FNxGMrGiYoA3AZGlKqblAmoBAK6OsWQ7vzwb4VhtILrKssYbyUwZOsTP6yO7D-fC88O6GYwmOUbIO4B3-5gX9CJCdoG7uaKgsXQP86iPsww66tyAIzmFYlmN4OKpM-JQYTK31t1dEXQW6_TYkf1RGAB7CJk5v2wqNK9hFFPotDvveZZsKUQCnMmjKMv1iiq_YtzuaNiME7nr227M_hC0EtSfU1v-oT8SSYazDWv2JMawqHypMb3fImG4vkZ53eoYn6XDwaEyPbOfSp6tGVN0Sri4ExdEga7UPRYsqweGkA5o4DqYrJRonB-Oy3rS9oCgBXchsqTy_YmgiZVmHq9L_7656qYCMk8x6x5q0CdkRA41NIXlmCSoqba6UUm61vJQ8in1g6QCi2DJNcK_dFvf4YfGsGQF-z8zUFMqkg%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).

clean_body: Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, "Just tell me when and where" was the phrase heard 'round the country. Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America on November 30th. When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge: "Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis | This debate boils down to freedom vs. failure, Friend. Gov. DeSantis is ready to make the case for the future of our country. Let us know: who do you think will win this debate? | | | | | | | | In Freedom, Team DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). | | Derek, Senate control in 2024 is going to hinge on a few key races – one of which is Pennsylvania. My friend and ally in the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence, Bob Casey, just had a Republican opponent enter the race (who by the way, doesn’t even live in Pennsylvania, he lives in Connecticut), and he __[**needs our support to defend his seat.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70820673/430425401/1534252714?refcode=mw_em_231002_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTU4YjZkYi00ZjYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qK3pwBkyE2Tpsrh1-m0pBampcBckFKclYFCE6k_jrk8=)__ I’ve been lucky enough to work with Senator Casey on a handful of legislation to improve everyday Americans’ lives. Most recently, we introduced legislation to evaluate the adequacy of black lung benefits to meet the health care needs of miners and their families – miners _actually_ power America, and they deserve access to the best benefits. We also worked on bills to make the adoption tax credit fully refundable and to help schools make sure every child can learn free from fear of bullying and harassment. And of course there’s the Inflation Reduction Act – the most impactful climate legislation Congress has ever passed – which might not have become law if Republicans had successfully captured Bob’s seat in 2018. If we want to continue making progress in the Senate and protect our Democratic majority, we need to re-elect Bob Casey. **__[**Can you split a donation of $5 today to protect Bob’s seat and keep the Senate out of GOP hands?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70820674/430425404/1534252714?refcode=mw_em_231002_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTU4YjZkYi00ZjYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qK3pwBkyE2Tpsrh1-m0pBampcBckFKclYFCE6k_jrk8=)__** Thank you, Mark Warner ** ** ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70820675/430425405/1534252714?refcode=mw_em_231002_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTU4YjZkYi00ZjYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qK3pwBkyE2Tpsrh1-m0pBampcBckFKclYFCE6k_jrk8=)********

Laws like this are in place to ensure that firearms stay out of the hands of dangerous individuals.

To put things in perspective – 1 in 3 women and 1 in 4 men have experienced some form of physical violence by a partner.

Peter, Look around. **Millions of Illegals are _waltzing across our border_ while the door is held open for them. ** **Our _cities are collapsing_ under the weight and swarming with crime. ** **Mothers are _losing their children_ to fentanyl poisoning. ** **Democrat Governors are finally admitting this is a crisis and _calling on the National Guard_. ** **Children are being told to memorize _sexually-explicit garbage_ in schools. ** **_Biden is saluting a Pride flag_ on the White House Lawn. ** **The lie that men can get pregnant is being _shoved down the throats of kids_. ** **Women and girls --_my daughters_ --are _losing the chance to compete_ in sports fairly. ** **_Parents are losing their rights_ to raise their kids as they see fit and choose what school is best for them. ** **Families are struggling to put food on the table because _Biden has prioritized the benefit of the elite class_ and bent the knee to the woke mob by embracing environmental, social governance mandates over the DIRE needs of average Americans. ** Why am I running for President, Peter? **This is why.** How could the radical Left, the DC swamp establishment, and the legacy media ever expect me to back down? When they're reigning down irrecoverable harm across the country because they're not willing to do what it takes to stand up for our values and fight for our way of life? **These are my kids...**

On Day One in office as President of the United States, I will be ushering in a RECKONING to Washington, D.C. We have let them cause our nation to spiral for far too long. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dc71fed5273e41ddafbdd7db6a047973&_e=M6I2h3WeRf8Zb44NU7LAFtHHwfmcZqlQh-34Bu00SI0g5_xNhT20fW6oRmL6NS2fqKMAFXJOVVLyDREPAo3UA_HFETxQE7DP-yCetEecQvQWrdn7f-3mXobHXUAQi895A77PKhyDyJnkpD82HngZBGAo8DrRPm_DbBB37qmetjS8q0ZOtEhtHLlLytsZjf5JfhnqocceG-Cy72Ga-nIEviuG-sgxF_VN3qVTc0waVp4pVIxsiGNhWdO2xOlp6P3yGiKLHMkzaK1TPfKy7TO5_d-9UPfnUR6zqqrQ4Qi3J75vnmioiALgxeJ0sSxRQvqjFtA9cRk8iUr8MAHVbzjiZTy0hN_OPs9jAUjf6KxG_NzzE8BcrYvAPGfN4HO-G9lF3k8EgD4BimZtI-EW8amhbpxunTMHm5HtESPYiQJZrTGqMoB_mc5xWSqktKb-5TaG)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

name: Special Elections Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: $7 for 7 special elections →
body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**$7.** That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have _seven_ special elections on the horizon in critical states like South Carolina, New Hampshire, and Maine – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. **Reason #3:** Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. [So what do you say? Will you donate $7 today to help elect state Democrats nationwide?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xJdM4UPBsteMLVkfmLiDV3AYV6Ajmkcu1v1riNeitrEiRWGYrtRwZyhh3UiU0RxkSW504vdubrepVqm9YjXD-dY3KoQA9zcSdJ6Vyvj5kpVXdWBpccf4bhYURMxOTeluRIiIkKDafzSERNW6b8hJEGuoEbC_3leQZrbOFOcIzXCwvGpW7NEV0LtfKZRoxaT2KB8FMQ7M3WzD75QodkoOyVqIcLbLBrkpJ9w0RrsvLyoh2rwYX-kNxmWECbgl7LxPXsqVd-rFcBh_9kw1FvJ4sFMycauRDWw7s4xUt-liOQzCoKlZ1W6KdZi-G1gYYRseC5-iPFx5ENRV_SkURlfmQsggKkOOoLVF4KDdXyWmkgEbyeFkkZa7WFxdw9Y10CtF_UQg9eW65ZXNr0VBYgYVL5fImgwLMowEqBkxMHKfJL9uq4EaW-Tj9-tZv_R5hIdu7jy_AhGYuaPp3JORyQ_Kv_H8xvtFbmqOFP8O3ZfzaPXkBn3AgW1qqM_zbOoG2rd0RmzWE-VzO4nIUaKr_bkpCdHgQXd1db-hibCfCjV9tmv_CVyQPSjoZDQBFtr3n6TzxF1t7DDIKMhL19u-CtB9cR/403/d5jcl6FrRguqOo5gnLDE4g/h0/kUu0huPJjj6QkVlQSPbeiuePG1v-w122qz-ssNtBKo0) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

subject: Franklin Graham just broke his silence on Trump

body:
"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."

| | The Great & Holy Reverend Franklin Graham just broke his silence on the arrest of President Trump.
_**"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."**_
The sad truth is Democrats want President Trump arrested & behind bars because he stood up for Christianity & the unborn more than any other President in American history.
They can't stand that President Trump defended Christianity against the Woke Mob.
They're enraged that his Supreme Court Justices ended Roe v Wade.
And now that Trump has been arrested, they hope to take out the biggest defender of religious liberty & the unborn our country has ever seen.
**Democrats hope that if they throw Trump behind bars, Christian conservatives will never show up to the polls again._Then they 'll have free reign to trample our religious liberties._ **

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Close call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-oct2023-fr-october?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-oct2023-fr-october?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Friend,

I know you’ve heard quite a lot from my team and me over the past few weeks as we’ve worked to reach our big end of quarter goal on Saturday. And with your support, we crushed it.

Thank you for taking a stand against the MAGA BS, for fighting alongside me as I’ve worked to hold bad actors like Kevin McCarthy accountable, and for getting us across the finish line.

Kevin McCarthy fell asleep at the wheel, and we narrowly missed a shutdown, despite his best efforts.

Let this close call serve as a reminder as we head into the final quarter of the year: Kevin McCarthy and his Republicans are willing to shrug their shoulders during a crisis, even if it means SNAP benefits go dark, or paychecks stop coming through, to further their own agenda.

We’re not pawns, friend. And as we gear up for 2024, we’ll make sure Kevin and his crew know it.

I appreciate your support this quarter more than I can express. Thanks for having my back.

— Eric

clean_body: Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. [] Friend, I know you’ve heard quite a lot from my team and me over the past few weeks as we’ve worked to reach our big end of quarter goal on Saturday. And with your support, we crushed it. Thank you for taking a stand against the MAGA BS, for fighting alongside me as I’ve worked to hold bad actors like Kevin McCarthy accountable, and for getting us across the finish line. Kevin McCarthy fell asleep at the wheel, and we narrowly missed a shutdown, despite his best efforts. Let this close call serve as a reminder as we head into the final quarter of the year: Kevin McCarthy and his Republicans are willing to shrug their shoulders during a crisis, even if it means SNAP benefits go dark, or paychecks stop coming through, to further their own agenda. We’re not pawns, friend. And as we gear up for 2024, we’ll make sure Kevin and his crew know it. I appreciate your support this quarter more than I can express. Thanks for having my back. — Eric DONATE TO ERIC >> [] secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-oct2023-fr-october?refcode=headerfooter-footer&amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-oct2023-fr-october?refcode=headerfooter-footer&amount=25] Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! On your phone? Press here to sign up in just two clicks >> [] Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. DONATE TO ERIC >> [] Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. name: Team Ohio Dems
subject: The duplicity of the GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
led by none other than Frank LaRose
| Team, In August, Ohio voters resoundingly rejected Frank LaRose’s attempt to make it harder to amend the constitution – a crucial first step to protect abortion rights in the state. He then responded by attempting to deceive Ohioans _again_ by recruiting his GOP cronies on the Ohio Ballot Board to help him completely re-write the language Ohioans will see when they vote on the amendment that would protect reproductive care in November. His ballot language is so confusing and misleading and contains so much inaccurate and inflammatory language that **he’s facing a lawsuit.** It’s simple: LaRose lacks leadership. He’s doing whatever he possibly can to make it harder for the amendment to pass in November. And if that fails? He’s promised to overrule the majority of Ohioans who support reproductive rights by supporting a national abortion ban in the Senate. He has no problem giving the finger to Ohioans. ** ** You deserve better. **[We’re fighting to make sure that every single Ohioan can see through the GOP’s last ditch effort to deceive and confuse voters ahead of the election, but we need your help to get it done. Can you chip in anything you can today to support our efforts to educate voters across the state about LaRose’s ballot trickery?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70823038/430429313/-670128567?refcode=odp_em_231002_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDNmOWQ3OS01NDYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fQBiwpb6sT40CMEbt3QssD80tdL0pnF93IrncSWu4f8=)** We won’t rest until every voter knows the simple truth: Passing Issue 1 would protect our right to reproductive care in the Ohio Constitution. We can’t let LaRose’s deception strip away our reproductive freedom. Thank you, Team Ohio Dems | **A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. body:
It is important that only American citizens read this | Fellow American,

The United States of America as we know it is on the verge of complete and total destruction if we lose in 2024. We can’t keep doing the same thing - we need bold action.

[**That is why we need your opinion today, Fellow American. We need new, unique data to win in 2024.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9fb9d445b8e746a0af7fe1c834f940b8&_e=BkMDeaEmCS2btq_bwhYhCeVqmj9a34x_ZRqiSBbwKchxkXKaHRgWnKwhjFKkrnV0lWmtpPCUA2QGBiTOB2hOyWLENjBs4hJ6Zny1L0s5R7q6XSSyzPdmiFrPN2-cooUQRVDT7YaN4tuu6Qek6-Cn1oI65A1QdOgxlvKYtBn3GoKRXXwIP2b45nvUciVRlIyPkiJu4AqX6RJptTJD_75V5AJXopNgcmiW-tozWeWa81P4WmnLjgkJEQUg9SS6MgB9uXU3gBPxOJOBbgGZbmZOcpxAca8gVmGdC0dDzz27X3gYzCkkZUi6yV7ep5gU6ZC7tacuwQpTycMLHxnba6JxqEBxzt4vY6SV2cOaN1uu-gV-lFYAoUwPKx5BBZI5hiwDKLMZW6CAc6d1tySKrI9wJMH4rvkdKT4bFYkdkOP2XbZxaxNt2xce9G-zPuFzH4rAbuAk1_7J4Tn8PGb9NcqfUA%3D%3D)

subject: A View From The Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
It's been an exceptional week on the campaign trail, and I'm thrilled to share the highlights with you!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

It's been an exceptional week on the campaign trail, and I'm thrilled to share the highlights with you! From the Franklin Fall Festival Parade to the Porter County Reagan Reception and the Hendricks County Lincoln Day Dinner, where we were joined by my friend, Former Secretary of State Connie Lawson, it's been a week filled with energy and enthusiasm.

Your steadfast support continues to fuel our journey, and together, we are building a campaign centered on hard work, integrity, and unity to make Indiana the best it can be.

Read on for a recap of some of the events from this past week!

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
