https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Website (https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com)

** In the News: Crouch Calls for Income Tax Elimination in Indiana (https://www.atr.org/crouch-calls-for-income-tax-elimination-in-indiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.atr.org/crouch-calls-for-income-tax-elimination-in-indiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Read The Article (https://www.atr.org/crouch-calls-for-income-tax-elimination-in-indiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Franklin Fall Festival Parade
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I want to extend my heartfelt thanks to all those who joined us at the Franklin Fall Festival Parade and walked alongside our campaign!

Your presence and support meant the world to me, and it's moments like these that truly embody the spirit of our campaign.

** Porter County Reagan Reception
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

It was a privilege to speak before a passionate group of Republicans at the Porter County Reagan Reception!

A special thank you to all those who attended and to the Porter County Republican Party for their hard work organizing such a successful gathering.

** Hendricks County Lincoln Day Dinner
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

The Hendricks County Lincoln Day Dinner was a resounding success, drawing an exceptional crowd of over 250 attendees.

As I travel our great state, I've had the privilege of attending numerous Lincoln Day Dinners with similarly impressive, often record-breaking attendance.

This pattern reflects the tremendous strength of our party and the growing demand for Indiana to have a resilient leader who won't back down in safeguarding our freedoms.
Hoosiers are frustrated with Washington's interference, rising costs, and mounting challenges. As your Governor, I'll staunchly defend our values, protect Indiana from harmful Biden policies, and work tirelessly to keep more of your hard-earned money in your pocket.

Thank you to the Hendricks County Republican Party for organizing this event! Your unwavering commitment to our party's principles and the hard work you put into organizing events like these is truly commendable.

** Sharing a Stage with Former Sec. Of State Connie Lawson
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

At the Hendricks County Lincoln Day Dinner, one of the highlights of the evening was sharing the stage with my dear friend, Former Secretary of State Connie Lawson.

Connie has been a staunch supporter of our campaign from the very beginning, and her early endorsement meant the world to me.

** Last Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I’ve witnessed first hand Suzanne’s fierce advocacy for local rural issues like broadband, mental health and housing. Each time she made the right call, in difficult situations, with Hoosiers at the top of her mind. This is why Suzanne has my full endorsement for Governor of Indiana."

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I’ve had the privilege of knowing this wonderful, hardworking, and passionate Hoosier for many years. Her experience as a leader at multiple levels of government, combined with her passion for helping her fellow Hoosiers, will serve her well as our future governor. I’m proud to say I fully endorse Suzanne Crouch for our next governor of our great state."
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"There isn't a better choice than Lt. Gov. Suzanne Crouch to be our first woman Governor. She is experienced, hard-working and has a public servant's heart. She has the credentials and is able to start on day one as Governor of this great State of Indiana!"

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"It is with great pleasure that offer my endorsement for Suzanne Crouch to be the next Governor of Indiana. Suzanne has served Indiana well for many years and is a true friend to all Hoosiers. Her commitment, dedication, hard work and conservative values will ensure a great future for Indiana residents. She is a candidate that truly cares about traditional values in this tumultuous time."

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

Thank you for being a part of this journey. Your support keeps us going, and I'm excited for the road ahead.

We're building a campaign that's centered on the values of hard work, integrity, and unity. Together, we can overcome any challenge and create a brighter future for Indiana.

Onward and upward,

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.
GET INVOLVED (https://crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers!
------------------------------------------------------------
Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future. If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events:
For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at:
heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .

** Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise!
------------------------------------------------------------

As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)!
SHOP (https://shop.crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a360c0a8ff-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_26_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a360c0a8ff-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

clean_body: It's been an exceptional week on the campaign trail, and I'm thrilled to share the highlights with you! Friends and fellow Hoosiers, It's been an exceptional week on the campaign trail, and I'm thrilled to share the highlights with you! From the Franklin Fall Festival Parade to the Porter County Reagan Reception and the Hendricks County Lincoln Day Dinner, where we were joined by my friend, Former Secretary of State Connie Lawson, it's been a week filled with energy and enthusiasm. Your steadfast support continues to fuel our journey, and together, we are building a campaign centered on hard work, integrity, and unity to make Indiana the best it can be. Read on for a recap of some of the events from this past week! Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email! Facebook () Twitter () Instagram () Website () mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com) In the News: Crouch Calls for Income Tax Elimination in Indiana () Read The Article () Franklin Fall Festival Parade I want to extend my heartfelt thanks to all those who joined us at the Franklin Fall Festival Parade and walked alongside our campaign! Your presence and support meant the world to me, and it's moments like these that truly embody the spirit of our campaign. Porter County Reagan Reception It was a privilege to speak before a passionate group of Republicans at the Porter County Reagan Reception! A special thank you to all those who attended and to the Porter County Republican Party for their hard work organizing such a successful gathering. Hendricks County Lincoln Day Dinner The Hendricks County Lincoln Day Dinner was a resounding success, drawing an exceptional crowd of over 250 attendees. As I travel our great state, I've had the privilege of attending numerous Lincoln Day Dinners with similarly impressive, often record-breaking attendance. This pattern reflects the tremendous strength of our party and the growing demand for Indiana to have a resilient leader who won't back down in safeguarding our freedoms. Hoosiers are frustrated with Washington's interference, rising costs, and mounting challenges. As your Governor, I'll staunchly defend our values, protect Indiana from harmful Biden policies, and work tirelessly to keep more of your hard-earned money in your pocket. Thank you to the Hendricks County Republican Party for organizing this event! Your unwavering commitment to our party's principles and the hard work you put into organizing events like these is truly commendable. Sharing a Stage with Former Sec. Of State Connie Lawson At the Hendricks County Lincoln Day Dinner, one of the highlights of the evening was sharing the stage with my dear friend, Former Secretary of State Connie Lawson. name: George Logan
subject: Everything but the kitchen sink
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter,

As bad as things were a year ago, they've only gotten worse. **[Just watch this video to see what I mean:](http://links.goppatriot.com/u/click?_t=42a94c663c6c423587715e465a367b7d&_m=bb3d400001a041f0a9ceb7e4fb429398&_e=vFg6W1COK6Y-bP80KXMGX0F2QIsvMRd1u1_W74Y0EykPZ93USUflnZNL0iC52kMx-rwUXCehSpdQB1qC11IGPyo7ubnlUwo8w6gCkFkg83hHhbMEVMJjWIQGHwb66dedtDskTwfFI1F77dO2vZlGREsIBVpdkqfgn-DIS0a_XRo3D0xrd78bsiUJCOwgeP6vBgjX56eRcFRZ_lk8Vkd3ImMTPvSSCMmltrlRIeNVrgYx8W5tsNgThhbAUJVfQ5REmDhEHfpk_hBaxHtpKW19ATCxLzzlPsXoNJOwF_8UBrTRQy36QA10fgNF8-MLx8cmOucfgMwjbDxPrb569l7kISY41dpDXAklF4bMS4ihTLaNvMub4qLP0BIqqU245rRY "Just watch this video to see what I mean: ")**
_**They 're trying to ban my mother's stove, dishwasher, lawnmower...pretty much everything but the kitchen sink! **_

---
| [](http://links.goppatriot.com/u/click?_t=42a94c663c6c423587715e465a367b7d&_m=bb3d400001a041f0a9ceb7e4fb429398&_e=vFg6W1COK6Y-bP80KXMGX0F2QIsvMRd1u1_W74Y0EykPZ93USUflnZNL0iC52kMx-rwUXCehSpdQB1qC11IGPyo7ubnlUwo8w6gCkFkg83hHhbMEVMJjWIQGHwb66dedtDskTwfFI1F77dO2vZlGREsIBVpdkqfgn-DIS0a_XRo3D0xrd78bsiUJCOwgeP6vBgjX56eRcFRZ_lk8Vkd3ImMTPvSSCMmltrlRIeNVrgZ_2rbfSIuXyqEw4MTqFRzuY2MtYMLL8ikZUt1a9VF9jZnWYjaaTZuPa4umRTn-NxOBCWbzbcD3MOQp2WlKNvrsG8v41AtJENu_VraDW25SOF7l0_1r9gzua3XWsfMFk5s0Fwax_CtH9Alv_m4dfdGQ)
---
| | | [WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO >> ](http://links.goppatriot.com/u/click?_t=42a94c663c6c423587715e465a367b7d&_m=bb3d400001a041f0a9ceb7e4fb429398&_e=vFg6W1COK6Y-bP80KXMGX0F2QIsvMRd1u1_W74Y0EykPZ93USUflnZNL0iC52kMx-rwUXCehSpdQB1qC11IGPyo7ubnlUwo8w6gCkFkg83hHhbMEVMJjWIQGHwb66dedtDskTwfFI1F77dO2vZlGREsIBVpdkqfgn-DIS0a_XRo3D0xrd78bsiUJCOwgeP6vBgjX56eRcFRZ_lk8Vkd3ImMTPvSSCMmltrlRIeNVrgYwwDLOnzr4e26ld6rFv02NDC8z9LMNJSqwBPKxcUVeK3dZK9T1jXYEtxIGcXJyOGaoM6M-vHD5U5JGX1i0x5of8zEaepzluzKhbP_CUef1NlLTHdQ_Xp4EuIJrHWZaHGX1iBd1g9UiTIEWgQ5cZZ1K)
---
As ridiculous as all this seems, politicians in Washington have their priorities upside down, arguing which stoves Americans are cooking on while working families struggle to put food on the table.

**[That's why I'm officially launching my campaign for Congress in the most important battleground race in the entire country.](http://links.goppatriot.com/u/click?_t=42a94c663c6c423587715e465a367b7d&_m=bb3d400001a041f0a9ceb7e4fb429398&_e=vFg6W1COK6Y-bP80KXMGX0F2QIsvMRd1u1_W74Y0EykPZ93USUflnZNL0iC52kMx-rwUXCehSpdQB1qC11IGPyo7ubnlUwo8w6gCkFkg83hHhbMEVMJjWIQGHwb66dedtDskTwfFI1F77dO2vZlGREsIBVpdkqfgn-DIS0a_XRo3D0xrd78bsiUJCOwgeP6vBgjX56eRcFRZ_lk8Vkd3ImMTPvSSCMmltrlRIeNVrgZxl-KOF6hAQYL5NCQZCFAu0mZqIJz2vEFP8OB8ZToIGNvFdbpfXK73yeGGc2uMSJzMvjtM5QOxcJ2B51fWuk44wUr99y-GmPknDN7yItDPOnaz_ov92PQZGavgn_t2ir0zGSw7ejEmLMTNkm9LZDru "That’s why I’m officially launching my campaign for Congress in the most important battleground race in the entire country.")**

As the son of hardworking immigrants, I know what it's like to struggle to make ends meet and feel like nobody's listening.

Last year, we came just _2,000 votes short_ of defeating my liberal Democrat opponent, but I'm not giving up. **There is far too much on the line to back down now.**

Washington is so broken. I'm running for Congress to get Washington focused on YOU and making life better for everyone, not keeping us hungry and in the dark.

**[If you haven't yet, please watch and share my official announcement video.](http://links.goppatriot.com/u/click?_t=42a94c663c6c423587715e465a367b7d&_m=bb3d400001a041f0a9ceb7e4fb429398&_e=vFg6W1COK6Y-bP80KXMGX0F2QIsvMRd1u1_W74Y0EykPZ93USUflnZNL0iC52kMx-rwUXCehSpdQB1qC11IGPyo7ubnlUwo8w6gCkFkg83hHhbMEVMJjWIQGHwb66dedtDskTwfFI1F77dO2vZlGREsIBVpdkqfgn-DIS0a_XRo3D0xrd78bsiUJCOwgeP6vBgjX56eRcFRZ_lk8Vkd3ImMTPvSSCMmltrlRIeNVrgYwwTQ9Agvge-AYiyq451q8X1DCP71lq3sm3QnSUOvUlsW_G_PErfqtYqtAoy0yDS6NDsxuXlr3fYgsl8CE3fqAhOphzVD9qOj1LrrHlZR1nzOtMqVEx4PFMNLdq47VfN2DrchWnwG2RGcDq2Df5sUA "If you haven't yet, please watch and share my official announcement video.") **I look forward to working hard to earn your support in the coming months and having a proud American like yourself on my team.

---
| | | [WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO >> ](http://links.goppatriot.com/u/click?_t=42a94c663c6c423587715e465a367b7d&_m=bb3d400001a041f0a9ceb7e4fb429398&_e=vFg6W1COK6Y-bP80KXMGX0F2QIsvMRd1u1_W74Y0EykPZ93USUflnZNL0iC52kMx-rwUXCehSpdQB1qC11IGPyo7ubnlUwo8w6gCkFkg83hHhbMEVMJjWIQGHwb66dedtDskTwfFI1F77dO2vZlGREsIBVpdkqfgn-DIS0a_XRo3D0xrd78bsiUJCOwgeP6vBgjX56eRcFRZ_lk8Vkd3ImMTPvSSCMmltrlRIeNVrgb0yRMV8X3gScki6rrHyd2ewRUn8heaspSBi8N5xMhOcQZ5t7L_EzhFixy3c1gSqFDkG_BZEN9HmTN3Aw3Njb377EvlylMe1OLJ3OO4AhPU3Nck8cKSb1zX92dGuhvgDDxF1Sx2gxBubW-eNNz8n_5O)
---

Sincerely,
---
|
---
George Logan
---

_**P.S. Peter **_- I know times are hard in Biden's economy, but if you are in the position to give, **[please consider chipping in just $5, $10, or even $25 to help our campaign start strong!](http://links.goppatriot.com/u/click?_t=42a94c663c6c423587715e465a367b7d&_m=bb3d400001a041f0a9ceb7e4fb429398&_e=vFg6W1COK6Y-bP80KXMGX0F2QIsvMRd1u1_W74Y0EykPZ93USUflnZNL0iC52kMx-rwUXCehSpdQB1qC11IGPyo7ubnlUwo8w6gCkFkg83hHhbMEVMJjWIQGHwb66dedtDskTwfFI1F77dO2vZlGREsIBVpdkqfgn-DIS0a_XRo3D0xrd78bsiUJCOwgeP6vBgjX56eRcFRZ_lk8Vkd3ImMTPvSSCMmltrlRIeNVrgYzFc5SbYAzooUsVhXIngYlnx5KjHMLy6GDO7aZIcmAk9WukvXnoUpR-u4EtvmqljzCyBwZlhR1whBeNtUJUBuB_yfCAJdcOnQJDGBjPGpLCWyS3qb4_mX5dGnTzbS2VpBBWI34ihuuyTI1UkOXFd32 "please consider chipping in just $5, $10, or even $25 to help our campaign start strong!")**

**The early days of this race will be critical in our fight to retake this seat for Republicans.** My incumbent Democrat opponent is a rubber stamp for every one of President Biden's bad ideas, and she has chosen to stand with The Squad rather than stand up for us. **[I'm going to need your continued support to win.](http://links.goppatriot.com/u/click?_t=42a94c663c6c423587715e465a367b7d&_m=bb3d400001a041f0a9ceb7e4fb429398&_e=vFg6W1COK6Y-bP80KXMGX0F2QIsvMRd1u1_W74Y0EykPZ93USUflnZNL0iC52kMx-rwUXCehSpdQB1qC11IGPyo7ubnlUwo8w6gCkFkg83hHhbMEVMJjWIQGHwb66dedtDskTwfFI1F77dO2vZlGREsIBVpdkqfgn-DIS0a_XRo3D0xrd78bsiUJCOwgeP6vBgjX56eRcFRZ_lk8Vkd3ImMTPvSSCMmltrlRIeNVrgYnPbcrrwc-W3fmMWsw08quL3MLd9FxTQTq2tPwjkMYtXj3edfSASdBR4kMnnUPNFS-SFdEcnhnJzMxcyXdxWQalwQxTskvpFvKmmYD9FluqTfdyjcWe6ASIa2YureDCfloU5fkTc_FJ-I0KUEoqyV- "I’m going to need your continued support to win. ") **

Thank you. - George
---
| [](http://links.goppatriot.com/u/click?_t=42a94c663c6c423587715e465a367b7d&_m=bb3d400001a041f0a9ceb7e4fb429398&_e=vFg6W1COK6Y-bP80KXMGX0F2QIsvMRd1u1_W74Y0EykPZ93USUflnZNL0iC52kMx-rwUXCehSpdQB1qC11IGPyo7ubnlUwo8w6gCkFkg83hHhbMEVMJjWIQGHwb66dedtDskTwfFI1F77dO2vZlGREsIBVpdkqfgn-DIS0a_XRo3D0xrd78bsiUJCOwgeP6vBgjX56eRcFRZ_lk8Vkd3ImMTPvSSCMmltrlRIeNVrgYy68Kv7MN6E_USyKYzUzOrb8FYIKGNOK8UReRnj87kX8wqRRGkhg5fjzw6ROkW7nzmQF_dqdi9Ew2zwd_itUUYmseUuhAZpGWHVnBOTq_WAl9xMMFcCG4Q-qjZPgTMtjZiLVVbofOIS9cgTDiBDfb8)

"If you haven't yet, please watch and share my official announcement video." I look forward to working hard to earn your support in the coming months and having a proud American like yourself on my team. | | | Sincerely, | George Logan P.S. Peter - I know times are hard in Biden's economy, but if you are in the position to give, "please consider chipping in just $5, $10, or even $25 to help our campaign start strong!" The early days of this race will be critical in our fight to retake this seat for Republicans. My incumbent Democrat opponent is a rubber stamp for every one of President Biden's bad ideas, and she has chosen to stand with The Squad rather than stand up for us. - "I’m going to need your continued support to win. " Thank you. - George | | | Paid for George Logan For Congress 26 Catoonah Street Box 72 Ridgefield, CT, 06877

name: James Carville
subject: some big freakin' news…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’ve got some BIG freakin’ news: **I’ve selected YOU for my live Democratic Strategy Focus Group!**

I only chose a handful of the most engaged Democrats for this special opportunity -- and I selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, claim your spot in my focus group by taking a quick survey and help guide Democratic strategy before it’s too late:](https://go.dscc.org/go/15879?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231002-JamesCarville-CarvilleFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231002-JamesCarville-CarvilleFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&akid=12129%2E9716520%2EjJMQko)**

| | [ENTER MY FOCUS GROUP](https://go.dscc.org/go/15879?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231002-JamesCarville-CarvilleFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231002-JamesCarville-CarvilleFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&akid=12129%2E9716520%2EjJMQko)
---

Look, I won’t sugarcoat it: **If Republicans win back power next year, we’re screwed.** The stakes are way too high and the consequences are way too damn scary for any of us to give anything less than 110%!

The GOP is itching to pass a national abortion ban, cut Social Security and Medicare, and cause even more lasting damage to our democracy -- and if that doesn’t scare you, I don’t know what else to tell ya.

So we GOTTA win. How do we do that? By hearing from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so we can defeat these awful Republican wackos and win this darn election!

**Spots are filling up fast, so please, will you click here to claim your spot in the focus group and take a quick survey?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticFocusGroupOctober/](https://go.dscc.org/go/15879?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231002-JamesCarville-CarvilleFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231002-JamesCarville-CarvilleFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&akid=12129%2E9716520%2EjJMQko)**

| [ENTER MY FOCUS GROUP](https://go.dscc.org/go/15879?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231002-JamesCarville-CarvilleFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231002-JamesCarville-CarvilleFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&akid=12129%2E9716520%2EjJMQko)
---

Thank you.

\- James

Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**

| | | | | [VOTE DESANTIS](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dda84072f2c245ab92fd2f5a38b5dedd&_e=B1EqS4EKxzC19GYRHN7EBJnFk_3UZNOs1uNKkZnKH4PuXLGC9TwQXiv02Ja_Ht676_p0H1OoUpEXMrXwQ1rENtKI33oYPWQwXOVqMXiDSSEMH5FZTsaxabKq9V1hYCAa3DE4cppy-EDDQlfplw5D2SAO85R5by40eobyqsAnoQSNRk2koF-sZ9nto02z_hhw8Jb81iR2ELivymX4MomJz5TP9q-2LQHGJ_jU8un8xiq7H80umn6I0Ua_qferCboqFeeHMo4WghNT3LXxN2HHYEX9G8DbszRWo2ux-e4JWuOF9GZgiTjR4h-opO9yOvtLhAby5VhCkMN35ly07ZBCMvtVNvvIdSIjxthKhn6Vvwbrsw1_tZb9ZwdDwZGj0w-5-SdJBM7xLk37ETm_Xzt7xjfohCiHUwL184-1D6DRKLk%3D)

In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dda84072f2c245ab92fd2f5a38b5dedd&_e=B1EqS4EKxzC19GYRHN7EBJnFk_3UZNOs1uNKkZnKH4PuXLGC9TwQXiv02Ja_Ht676_p0H1OoUpEXMrXwQ1rENtKI33oYPWQwXOVqMXiDSSEMH5FZTsaxabKq9V1hYCAa3DE4cppy-EDDQlfplw5D2SAO85R5by40eobyqsAnoQSNRk2koF-sZ9nto02z_hhw8Jb81iR2ELivymX4MomJz5TP9q-2LQHGJ_jU8un8xiq7H80umn6I0Ua_qferCboqFeeHMo4WghNT3LXxN2HHYHo0AB-bTV4jWDlt6_jxK2YTCEqPhnHMj2xWnshAgSdDCiAvKKF91BOhglkPnQq_ZDDpnfZvFdbPXt7L1-TYynyg3_IXq4-6QyqsjP_Ht0yc6_gq0dG_ESpI-P-rHE6h1RLGDXdxhBpMIHy9u2H2ofg%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

---

Tallahassee, FL 32315

He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Friend,
Thanks to your unwavering support and dedication, we've achieved monumental victories in our pursuit of fair representation. The shining beacon of our progress burns brightest in the heart of Alabama, where we anchored our efforts and bore witness to the immense power of our collective resolve and the will of the people.
[**Will you chip into All On The Line to help us keep up the fight?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70825070/430431666/-1989437795?refcode=20231002_AOTL_P_EHHA1_GreenXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0NzY0YWRmLTU1NjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HbtXfLsr6KkTJTDWDSol379FNVKuaAT67o-F1TnpQXs=)

Recently, federal district judges declared that the legislature's proposed congressional map in Alabama was a woefully insufficient remedy to the illegal gerrymandering that has existed there for far too long. This decision marks a monumental stride towards fair representation, and **it sends an unambiguous message -- attempts to diminish our rights as voters will be met with unyielding resistance.**
But, my friends, our work is far from done. In Georgia, for example, the fight for fairness continues on as we confront gerrymandered maps that dilute the voting power of communities of color. Our affiliate stands at the forefront of these critical redistricting challenges.
Meanwhile, in Ohio, the shadow of truly epic gerrymandering looms ominously. **Let me be unequivocal: we will not stand for unfair maps and the blatant disregard of Ohio voters.** The voices of Ohioans and voters nationwide should not be drowned out by political anti-democracy maneuvering. We demand fairness, transparency, and a process that venerates the core principles of our democracy.
[**Will you make a donation to All On The Line to help us keep up our momentum against gerrymandering?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70825072/430431672/-1989437795?refcode=20231002_AOTL_P_EHHA1_GreenXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0NzY0YWRmLTU1NjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HbtXfLsr6KkTJTDWDSol379FNVKuaAT67o-F1TnpQXs=)

Whether it's mobilizing Ohio voters, securing a win in Alabama, or standing firm in the courts of Georgia, our movement is making history. However, there remains much work ahead. We need your unwavering support to ensure that every American's right to fair representation is safeguarded.
Your support has proven to be critical to our fight year after year. And with your continuous support, I firmly believe we will forge a future where every voice resonates, where every vote holds weight, and where our democracy authentically mirrors the people it serves.
**[Help us continue driving change that will echo through the ages. Make a donation to All On The Line today. ➡️](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70825095/430431692/-1989437795?refcode=20231002_AOTL_P_EHHA1_GreenXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0NzY0YWRmLTU1NjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HbtXfLsr6KkTJTDWDSol379FNVKuaAT67o-F1TnpQXs=)**

**Mail your petition book after getting it notarized to:****Phil Izon - 4201 Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654 - Call if you need help**[**907-802-8116**](tel:+19078028116)
---
### **Message To Alaskans**
---
### **THANK YOU, OVER 300+ Petition Books Returned**
---
#### **The state is not going to give us a Special election, so we have until January 16th to submit our signatures. In many places we are over 150% of the required signatures, though we have ordered another 400 petition books and plan to distribute them in Sept / Oct.**
#### **Please continue to send your petition books in notarized. We will be in touch shortly to send out new books. We appreciate all of your time and effort. Today we had 74 petition books returned in a single day, very exciting and I hope all Alaskans appreciate the effort and time by all involved (Over 900 Alaskan Volunteers Across The State) to make this a reality. We plan to submit 200-300% of the required signatures.**

name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [] You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk. We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now. We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton. This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity. All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund. This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [] Thank you, Mary [] Donate [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . An individual or federal PAC may contribute up to $2,900 per election; $5,800 per cycle. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal government contractors, and foreign nationals (non-citizens without “green cards”) are prohibited. Federal law requires our best efforts to obtain and report the name, address,occupation, and employer of individual contributors. Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The Week Ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Here are the issues that we’re working on this week:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

FRESH ATTACKS ON ABORTION RIGHTS

What’s happening:

We learned on Friday that at least three Texas counties — including
Cochran County, which borders New Mexico — have passed ordinances to ban
women from traveling on local roads to seek an abortion out of state.

And on Saturday, Governor Abbott said he is looking at building “border
barriers” between Texas and New Mexico — the closest state where Texas
women can legally seek an abortion (all three of Texas’ other neighboring
states have abortion bans in place).

How to get involved:

These are the next steps in the Texas GOP’s extreme attack on abortion
rights. Powered by People is working to identify other Texas counties that
are considering ordinances to restrict travel for women seeking an
abortion. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/em-20231002-joinupdate/?source=ema20231002-232764&t=1001&akid=232764%2E444211%2Eod1QyH ]Click here to sign up to receive information on how to
organize and fight back if this type of policy is being considered in your
county.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/em-20231002-joinupdate/?source=ema20231002-232764&t=1002&akid=232764%2E444211%2Eod1QyH ]SIGN UP FOR UPDATES

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

VOUCHER FIGHT BEGINS OCT. 9

What’s happening:

On Friday, Governor Abbott announced that he will call a special
legislative session to start one week from today, on October 9. The
session will focus on passing Abbott’s private school voucher bill, a
billionaire-backed effort to defund public schools to subsidize private
education for wealthy families.

How to get involved:

As Texas legislators prepare for the upcoming session, it’s important that
they hear from us. Abbott is using every ounce of his political capital to
pass his voucher bill, so we need to use every ounce of ours to fight
back. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/31098?source=ema20231002-232764&t=1003&akid=232764%2E444211%2Eod1QyH ]Please call or write your representative in the Texas House and
urge them to vote no on vouchers.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/31098?source=ema20231002-232764&t=1004&akid=232764%2E444211%2Eod1QyH ]CONTACT YOUR REP

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

ABBOTT’S CRUELTY AT THE BORDER

What’s happening:

Last month, a federal judge ordered Governor Abbott to remove the floating
wall of buoys he has illegally constructed in the Rio Grande to ensnare
and drown asylum seekers. But Abbott immediately appealed the decision,
allowing him to keep the drowning devices in place pending an appeals
hearing.

The case will come to a head again this week, on October 5, when the
federal appeals court will hold a hearing to decide whether it will double
down on the order to force Abbott to remove the deadly buoy barrier.

How to get involved:

I hope you’ll join me in continuing to push the Biden Administration to
see this fight through until these drowning devices are removed.
Regardless of what the appeals court decides, President Biden has the
power to enforce the federal government’s clear supremacy on immigration
issues and put an end to Abbott’s cruelty at the border. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58631?refcode=ema20231002-232764&t=1005&akid=232764%2E444211%2Eod1QyH ]Here’s what
we’re asking him to do to meet this moment:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58631?refcode=ema20231002-232764&t=1006&akid=232764%2E444211%2Eod1QyH ][IMG]

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58631?refcode=ema20231002-232764&t=1007&akid=232764%2E444211%2Eod1QyH ]WATCH

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I hope it’s a great week for you.

— Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1008&akid=232764%2E444211%2Eod1QyH

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Brandon Presley
subject: It's Game Time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
This is when the fun begins. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70826408/430435478/17860314?refcode=ea.aebdbbf5-5761-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.aebdbbf5-5761-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWViZGJiZjUtNTc2MS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zdm2EZR0RrUZ0l8NBQ5GxTQvXWvZxGZeHq-O5yanAxs=)
---
Good news, Peter.

Thanks to the outpouring of support from hundreds of grassroots donors in Mississippi and beyond, we closed the gap on our high-stakes, quarterly fundraising goal.

I’m always overwhelmed with gratitude when I see how many people support this campaign. It reminds me why I am in this race and fills me with hope.

And while I’d love to take a break from asking you for money (trust me — I asked my campaign manager already) — the truth is there’s no room to slow down.

This is it. We’re in the homestretch to Election Day.

So here's the plan: [My team is kicking things off with an ambitious $130,000 goal by the end of October (and our last public filing deadline before Election Day). That’s what we calculated we would need to keep our voter outreach plans in motion. So, can I count on you to chip in a few bucks right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70826409/430435479/-935144756?refcode=ea.aebdbbf5-5761-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.aebdbbf5-5761-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWViZGJiZjUtNTc2MS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zdm2EZR0RrUZ0l8NBQ5GxTQvXWvZxGZeHq-O5yanAxs=)

We need to reach out to unregistered voters in all 82 counties in Mississippi. We need to hit voters through digital ads, mail pieces, on the airwaves, and through direct voter contact.

And we need to give hope to those who have lost their trust in Tate Reeves’ self-serving leadership.

That’s not going to come cheap, Peter. And that’s why I need to ask for your help yet again. clean_body: This is when the fun begins. | = Good news, Peter. Thanks to the outpouring of support from hundreds of grassroots donors in Mississippi and beyond, we closed the gap on our high-stakes, quarterly fundraising goal. I’m always overwhelmed with gratitude when I see how many people support this campaign. It reminds me why I am in this race and fills me with hope. And while I’d love to take a break from asking you for money (trust me — I asked my campaign manager already) — the truth is there’s no room to slow down. This is it. We’re in the homestretch to Election Day. So here's the plan: = We need to reach out to unregistered voters in all 82 counties in Mississippi. We need to hit voters through digital ads, mail pieces, on the airwaves, and through direct voter contact. And we need to give hope to those who have lost their trust in Tate Reeves’ self-serving leadership. That’s not going to come cheap, Peter. And that’s why I need to ask for your help yet again. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = God Bless, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Hello,
I wanted to send a quick email just to say: **Thank you.**
It’s been quite an interesting last few weeks. The latest government shutdown drama by Lauren Boebert and the rest of the Chaos Caucus was just yet another reminder of why our campaign to defeat her is so important. And that certainly wasn’t the only reason Boebert made headlines recently...
As I meet with voters across Western and Southern Colorado, people just want the circus to stop. They want a representative who will focus on the people of our district – not themselves. And Congresswoman Boebert’s latest Beetlejuice escapade earlier this month was just another notch in the belt of embarrassment.
The reason I’m emailing you today, though, is just to express my gratitude. Running a campaign against someone like Lauren Boebert takes meaningful resources – especially when she has Super PACs raising millions to spend against me, and when I’m not taking money from corporate PACs like she is.
We just faced our most important end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign thus far, and when our fundraising report comes out publicly, we are going to have some very strong numbers. I have no one but grassroots donors like you to thank for that.
Yesterday, I celebrated my 56th birthday, and there was no greater gift than knowing I have the love of my family, encouragement from friends, and the incredibly humbling support from people like you as I make this journey once again.
Thank you for everything you’ve done and continue to do. I feel more confident than ever that the wind is at our backs and that we will defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024.
With gratitude -
Adam

Dear Peter,

Thanks to your continued support, I am proud to share that we reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.

The power of this grassroots team is unmatched -- our team relies on small-dollar contributions from supporters like you, not corporate PACs. And in the last quarter alone, over 500 new supporters made their first donation to our campaign to keep CA-47 blue!

We have the momentum on our side, and I am thankful for each and every one of you who have joined our team.

name: Roland Gutierrez
subject: Record profits for companies should mean record wages for employees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Hi. It’s Roland Gutierrez, the Democrat running against Ted Cruz for U.S. Senate.
Last week, I was proud to stand with UAW members at the picket line in Carrollton and in Roanoke.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/uzNJD4YGX0-a4MIm5CH-Fg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/uzNJD4YGX0-a4MIm5CH-Fg2]
The workers have a simple message: Record profits for companies should mean record wages for employees.
Automakers across the U.S. are making record profits. The head of General Motors earns $29 million per year in compensation. Since 2008, auto workers have not gotten the raises they deserve, while executives have increased their own salaries by over 40%.
In some places, like the Stellantis plant I visited, they don’t even have air conditioning.
These workers deserve more. They deserve fairness. And they deserve better than Ted Cruz, who wants to bamboozle folks into taking jobs for far less money than they should be earning.
So please join me in showing your support for the striking UAW workers here in Texas and across the country by adding your name to my petition today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/uzNJD4YGX0-a4MIm5CH-Fg2]
ADD YOUR NAME >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/uzNJD4YGX0-a4MIm5CH-Fg2]
We can do better in Texas. And it starts by getting rid of Ted Cruz.
Thanks for your support,
Roland Gutierrez

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: a splash of good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=530%2E52803%2EeZigFQ)

| | Peter, I’ve got some good news for your Monday: Our U.S. Senate campaign **SMASHED** our FEC End-of-Quarter goal over the weekend, and it’s _all_ because of this incredible grassroots team. Look, it’s one thing to start off a campaign strong and have a successful launch. And we did that in droves when our Senate campaign raised **$1.73 MILLION** in the first seven weeks and broke countless Maryland fundraising records along the way. But it’s another thing entirely to maintain the momentum in the months to follow—**and that’s _exactly_ what we did when we hit our FEC End-of-Quarter goal this past weekend!** Between earning the endorsement of more than 100 of Maryland’s most influential leaders and now hitting our _ambitious_ quarterly fundraising goal, I’ve never been more ready for what’s next. **Our vision to create jobs, bring down the cost of living for Maryland’s families, improve our healthcare system and strengthen our kids' education is resonating with folks.** Now, that’s not to say this race is over. In fact, we’re really just getting started. That’s why I’m so grateful for your support, Peter. Together, I know we can “go farther and do better.” Gratefully, Angela Alsobrooks | | | [Donate Now!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/6956?t=9&amount=25&akid=530%2E52803%2EeZigFQ)

clean_body: | | | Peter, I’ve got some good news for your Monday: Our U.S. Senate campaign SMASHED our FEC End-of-Quarter goal over the weekend, and it’s all because of this incredible grassroots team. Look, it’s one thing to start off a campaign strong and have a successful launch. And we did that in droves when our Senate campaign raised $1.73 MILLION in the first seven weeks and broke countless Maryland fundraising records along the way. But it’s another thing entirely to maintain the momentum in the months to follow—and that’s exactly what we did when we hit our FEC End-of-Quarter goal this past weekend! Between earning the endorsement of more than 100 of Maryland’s most influential leaders and now hitting our ambitious quarterly fundraising goal, I’ve never been more ready for what’s next. Our vision to create jobs, bring down the cost of living for Maryland’s families, improve our healthcare system and strengthen our kids' education is resonating with folks. Now, that’s not to say this race is over. In fact, we’re really just getting started. That’s why I’m so grateful for your support, Peter. Together, I know we can “go farther and do better.” Gratefully, Angela Alsobrooks | | | | | | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairwoman=20Kristina=20Karamo?=
subject: TIME TO GET INVOLVED!!!
body:
Can you imagine what we could accomplish if we put our petty differences aside and worked to defeat Democrats in 2024? | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
Recently, MIGOP held our 35th Biennial Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference at the Grand Hotel. Throughout the week, we received feedback from attendees who noticed a unique atmosphere at the conference and appreciated the informative and substantial speeches given by our speakers. Our goal was to avoid the typical political ra-ra and talking points, and instead invite speakers with practical experience in making a difference, and spreading a message of how to accomplish our mission.
**Do you recall the rumors that circulated before the event?**
Unfortunately, there are members within our own party who oppose the Constitutionalist movement. Others are motivated by personal-political gain and are determined to sabotage our efforts.
There were talks of Mackinac being canceled or moved to a different location. Despite this, the rumors persisted throughout the conference. Jim Caviezel and Kari Lake were rumored to have canceled, but they had already checked into the hotel.
Whenever a new rumor surfaced, truth and logic caused the rumor to disappear until the next one arose.
I am aware that some members of our party in a well-coordinated fashion will continue to defame me with false accusations. Much of that anger is not really directed towards me, but towards you. That is because they are unhappy that the Constitutionalist movement took over power in February 2023, and we are now actively working to restore a Constitutionalist government.
**This call to action is intended for those that truly wish to save the country.**
Our goal is to unite with those who are not seeking to dismantle the party but improve it and return it to being the party of the Constitution.
Our nation's decline is due to the abandonment of our Constitution and founding principles, which politicians fail to acknowledge.
Nowadays, it seems like the solution to any problem is to vote for a politician or a new law.
Now is the time for the Republican Party, whether in Michigan or on a national scale, to prioritize the Constitution. My objective is to assist you and contribute to the restoration of Constitutionalist governance.
**WE NEED YOU!!**
I want to thank the many patriots who volunteered to contribute to the success of Mackinac. Your dedication and effort are appreciated.
Our team has a solid foundation and has faced many challenges. Just think about what we could achieve if you were to join us and support our Constitutional beliefs for the remaining 13 months until the election. Together, we would be an unstoppable force, making great strides toward protecting our kids and grandkids' God-given inalienable rights.
**How can you get involved?**
There are three main ways you can get involved: 1\. If you have a passion for election integrity, follow the instructions on this flyer below. 2\. Join the Good Neighbor program (click the link below) to learn community outreach and organizing for a lasting change in our community and country.3\. Finally, please consider making a recurring donation of at least $1 per day to support our party's efforts in the 2024 elections. Your financial support is crucial for our success.
Thank you, and I look forward to working with you.
To God be the Glory, Kristina Karamo
ChairwomanMichigan Republican Party

name: Missy Cotter Smasal
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Missy Cotter Smasal for Congress
body:
---
| | Since I launched my campaign last month, I’ve been incredibly grateful to receive support from across Coastal Virginia, especially from grassroots members of our team like you, Peter.

Saturday was our first FEC deadline, and thanks to you, we’re reporting strong numbers on this crucial public filing.

I’m proud of the progress we’ve already made in building a strong and dedicated team, and I can’t wait to see what we can accomplish together over the next year.

Last week’s chaos in the House was caused by extremists in the Republican party and it proves that **_flipping the House blue is the only way to make real progress for families, veterans, and our communities._**

clean_body: | | Since I launched my campaign last month, I’ve been incredibly grateful to receive support from across Coastal Virginia, especially from grassroots members of our team like you, Peter. Saturday was our first FEC deadline, and thanks to you, we’re reporting strong numbers on this crucial public filing. I’m proud of the progress we’ve already made in building a strong and dedicated team, and I can’t wait to see what we can accomplish together over the next year. Last week’s chaos in the House was caused by extremists in the Republican party and it proves that flipping the House blue is the only way to make real progress for families, veterans, and our communities. subject: FAUCI TO BE SENTENCED FOR FELONIES INCLUDING NEGLIGENT HOMICIDE RESULTING FOR DEATHS OF OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/667a6b28e930/breaking-fbi-put-spy-inside-disabled-marines-legal-defense-team-11855961?e=8edd2b8f7d)
---
|
---
**FAUCI TO BE SENTENCED FOR FELONIES INCLUDING NEGLIGENT HOMICIDE RESULTING FOR DEATHS OF OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE**
_Sentencing to Occur on Tuesday, October 3, 2023_ _Life Imprisonment Sought_ _Time: 3:00 PM ET/ 12:00PM PT_ **View at**[**www.freedomwatchusa.org**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=e8af505ebf&e=8edd2b8f7d)**and Freedom Watch YouTube Channel** (Boise, Idaho, October 2, 2023). Today, Larry Klayman, Esq., the founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch and current chairman and general counsel of Freedom Watch, as well as a Citizens Prosecutor, announced that Dr. Anthony Fauci is to be sentenced by Citizens’ Judge Michael Pendleton tomorrow, October 3, 2023. Last month, a criminal conviction was handed down by Citizens’ Judge Michael Pendleton, after evidence was presented to Judge Pendleton by way of Freedom Watch’s Citizens’ Grand Jury and the criminal trial of Dr. Anthony Fauci that took place on July 7, 2022.
The criminal conviction, which can be found at www.freedomwatchusa.org, finds that Dr. Anthony Fauci has committed crimes against the American people and others worldwide. Specifically, Fauci was found guilty of negligent homicide and other felonies which resulted in the deaths of millions in the United States and worldwide. The legal bases for We the People to indict, try, convict and sentence persons like Fauci can be found at [www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=128041d26d&e=8edd2b8f7d) and in a book written by Klayman “It Takes a Counter-Revolution: Wake Up America!, which can be obtained by going to [www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=e14ac11f4c&e=8edd2b8f7d) and is sold online by all major booksellers, including Amazon and Barnes and Noble. Klayman had this to say upon securing the conviction of Fauci before a Citizens Court and Citizens Judge: “Dr. Anthony Fauci is perhaps the most heinous criminal of the 21st Century, as his illegal and selfish actions in sending the seeds of COVID-19, aka the SARS virus, to a military bioweapons lab in Wuhan, China to do gain of function research, and then lying about it while under oath to congress, gave rise to its release which then has caused over ten (10) million deaths and counting to date – more than in the Holocaust. To compound this negligent homicide, Fauci then pushed dangerious vaccines on the American people and the world, feathering the financial nest of Big Pharma, for which he personally profited. “No one other than We the People can and will hold Fauci accountable for his criminal acts, deceit and profiting at the hands of millions of innocent persons who died and were severely harmed as a result of his actions. Since the seeds of Covid 19 originated in our own military lab in Ft. Dietrick, Maryland and were sent by Fauci to the Communist Chinese to experiment on, with a 2.8 million dollar grant approved by the Obama-Biden administration, this entire scandal has been covered up by Fauci and others in government and Big Pharma.” “Fauci will be sentenced on October 3, 2023, by Citizens Judge Pendleton and Freedom Watch will seek life imprisonment. Once sentenced, Freedom Watch will seek to have established law enforcement enforce it.” **For further information contact Asher Anderson at asher.andersonfw@gmail.com**
[**CLICK HERE TO VIEW THE CRIMINAL CONVICTION OF DR. ANTHONY FAUCI**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=0196362c29&e=8edd2b8f7d)
[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=30b830da3d&e=8edd2b8f7d)
[](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=0328fe97a8&e=8edd2b8f7d)

name: Andy Kim
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
The results are in from our end-of-quarter fundraising drive. When we first set out our goals for the quarter, we had no idea that we'd need to pivot to a U.S. Senate campaign.

Now, thanks to the support of 11,555 grassroots donations from people like you — we have the momentum we need to gear up for a busy fall of organizing.

Thank you.

Once again, we've shown that we can come together for the common good – and that this movement is leading the fight to take on corruption and restore people's faith in our democracy.

I'm fired up. My team and I are excited to wrap up an amazing quarter and get back to work reaching out to New Jerseyans — something you made possible.

Thank you again.

Andy

body:

Hi there, Peter,

I have some bad news.

I won't beat around the bush.

**[But, we might have just missed our most important deadline to date. Dianne Feinstein. Democratic California Gov. body:
Thank you, from this entire team, for supporting Tamie!| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70828065/430441154/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmMzOTg5ZWYtNWU2MS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IpmCZqmDdGI-gSw20E8IHVl6wyowBSakLfPN3s6P6S4=)

Friend, First of all, please accept our deepest gratitude for your support for Tamie and this urgent campaign to defeat and replace Jim Jordan here in Ohio. People from across the country are seeing what is happening here, and they know that we can’t allow Jordan to escape accountability for his actions—**and they see that with Tamie, we have a real chance to knock Jordan out this election.** Tamie pushes all of us to do our best, to remember why we do this work, and to consistently communicate how important the mission is to every potential supporter and donor who wants to join the cause. She is known in her community as a leader, and she has the drive, and the depth of support from the voters here, to oust Jim Jordan. Thanks to your support, we had a record fundraising quarter. **But the work is truly just beginning—and we are so proud to have you with us, Friend.** We pledge to wage the fight that Jim Jordan deserves, and that all of you deserve, too. He has done so much damage to the country, and Tamie is going to hold him accountable, come hell or high water. Thanks again for your support, now and always! _–Team Tamie For US_ P.S. **[We’re hard at work every day of the week working to take down Jim Jordan. Anything you can give to keep us going and keep the wind at our backs right now is so important and appreciated:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70828066/430441155/1649708063?refcode=eoq3-thanksNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmMzOTg5ZWYtNWU2MS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IpmCZqmDdGI-gSw20E8IHVl6wyowBSakLfPN3s6P6S4=)**

body:
I will be stepping down to accept California Gov. Newsom's nomination to the U.S. Senate. |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70828034/430441114/2084576589?sourceid=1052065&refcode=20231002_LBFarewell_v1s1&refcode2=WTEFE1004&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI5NzBkZC01ZTYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7zbw8Up-wRqCqSEirglLGK8Ty9GqxAg9CufdySXalc=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70828035/430441115/2084576589?sourceid=1052065&refcode=20231002_LBFarewell_v1s1&refcode2=WTEFE1004&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI5NzBkZC01ZTYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7zbw8Up-wRqCqSEirglLGK8Ty9GqxAg9CufdySXalc=) Dear Peter,

I am writing to share some bittersweet news: After spending the last two years with all of you as the president of EMILYs List, I will be stepping down to accept California Gov. Newsom’s nomination to the U.S. Senate.

I am honored to be asked to serve as a representative for a state I have long called home and humbled by the Governor's trust. Sen. Dianne Feinstein's leadership and legacy are immeasurable. I will do my best to honor her by devoting my time and energy to serving the people of California and the people of this great nation. At a time in our country when our fundamental freedoms are under attack and our rights are being undermined at every turn, it's critical that California's next U.S. senator be ready _on day one_ for the fight ahead. I am grateful to be able to hit the ground running, thanks to the meaningful preparation I’ve gained leading this organization for the last two years.

I am so proud of the work we have done, and I am deeply grateful to our Board Chair Rebecca Haile and all of our board, our staff, our candidates, and our incredible community of donors who work every day to ensure more Democratic pro-choice women can _run_ , _win_ , and __change the world__.

I look forward to seeing what this strong pro-choice community accomplishes in the future. Thank you for the opportunity to lead this powerful, dynamic, change-making organization for the last two years. And trust in the fact that the Senate will soon have another Democratic pro-choice woman within its ranks.

For women and families, for workers and unions, for struggling parents waiting for our leaders to bring opportunity back to their homes, for all of California, I'm ready to serve. In solidarity,

Laphonza Butler
President, EMILYs List ** ** | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70828036/430441117/2084576589?sourceid=1052065&refcode=20231002_LBFarewell_v1s1&refcode2=WTEFE1004&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI5NzBkZC01ZTYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7zbw8Up-wRqCqSEirglLGK8Ty9GqxAg9CufdySXalc=)**

name: THANK JAMIE RASKIN (protectvoting.org)
subject: He just SAVED our democracy from disaster >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Signature spots dwindling
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53904?t=6&akid=10838%2E878179%2EjG2FxG) Folks, Jamie Raskin is a HERO! From standing up to Donald Trump, to exposing the truth about the deadly January 6th insurrection, **_to STOPPING the catastrophic government shutdown!_**

[**As one of our top Democrats, we’re giving you an exclusive chance to sign our letter thanking Rep. Jamie Raskin for his incredible work! SPOTS RUNNING OUT: Add your name before midnight! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53904?t=7&akid=10838%2E878179%2EjG2FxG) | [98 SIGNATURE SPOTS REMAINING: Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53904?t=8&akid=10838%2E878179%2EjG2FxG)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — THANK YOU!_**

**After you bravely called out the MAGA GOP’s selfish shutdown plot, you SAVED our democracy from total catastrophe!**

From protecting critical SNAP benefits to preserving the livelihoods of millions of government employees, we truly can’t be prouder of your heroic work.

**The House GOP’s razor-thin majority is more vulnerable than EVER — and after their failed scheme, they’re even more terrified of losing!**

[**I know Republicans are plotting their revenge by placing a HUGE target on your seat. So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to put the MAGA mob in their place and keep electing amazing Democrats like you! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53904?t=9&akid=10838%2E878179%2EjG2FxG) | [Donate $3 to sign now »
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10838%2E878179%2EjG2FxG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10838%2E878179%2EjG2FxG).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10838%2E878179%2EjG2FxG) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=10838%2E878179%2EjG2FxG). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10838%2E878179%2EjG2FxG)

subject: Judicial Watch: Biden Secret Service Records Show Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Was Denied Protection Despite Numerous Threats
body:

Kennedy Jr., despite having received numerous threats from “known subjects.” | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Oct 2, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it received an 11 pages of Secret Service records detailing the denial of protection to presidential candidate Robert F. Kennedy Jr., despite having received numerous threats from “known subjects.” ---|--- | | | | | Besides subsidizing the electric vehicle (EV) industry with a staggering $15.5 billion, the Biden administration is investing an additional $100 million in federal funding to prioritize the repair and replacement of EV charging stations throughout the U.S. The venture will “ensure disadvantaged communities benefit from upgraded charging infrastructure,” according to the Department of Transportation (DOT), which is doling out the money. ---|--- | | | | | The U.S. government has long assessed that Mexican drug cartels are the greatest criminal threat to the country and earlier this year federal sources in counterterrorism, intelligence and drug enforcement confirmed in a congressional hearing that the illicit operations have seized unprecedented control of the southwest border. They are officially known as Transnational Criminal Organizations (TCO) and the Biden administration’s reckless open border policies are facilitating their business model, which includes operating in cities throughout the nation with the help of U.S.-based street gangs that have overrun American communities with drugs. ---|--- | | | | | The records were forced out thanks to an October 2022 Judicial Watch Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that was filed after the Food and Drug Administration (a component of HHS) failed to respond to three February 2022 requests for records, including correspondence with the manufacturers of Mifeprex regarding the drug’s stability and for all FDA reports from assessments of DANCO and GenBio manufacturing facilities; investigational and new drug applications, as well as stability test results. ---|--- | | | Fox News Conservative legal activist group Judicial Watch previously obtained reports of the 10 previous incidents of Commander terrorizing staff from October 2022 through January 2023. Fox News Former President Barack Obama praised Pennsylvania for enacting automatic voter registration in the key swing state as conservatives cried foul over the move ahead of the 2024 election. “Great news — starting today, Pennsylvania will begin automatic voter registration for folks getting a driver’s license or state ID card at the DMV. Hopefully even more states will follow,” Obama wrote on X, formerly Twitter. Judicial Watch To comply with a Biden executive order requiring diversity, equity and inclusion in the federal workforce by, among other things expanding employment opportunities for convicted individuals, government agencies must “widely publicize” they are “hiring persons with criminal conduct issues in their background checks” according to the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC), which enforces the nation’s workplace discrimination laws. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |
