name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Thank you so much, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
An exciting update about our end-of-quarter goal.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas with a quick update about our end-of-quarter goal.
**We’re still counting all the numbers, but it’s safe to say we hit our goal and had another big quarter.** My team and I will share more about that soon. But for now, I just wanted to reach out to say thank you.
Your support since we launched this campaign to replace Josh Hawley — whether it’s by chipping in or just sharing our message with your family and friends — has helped us build a powerful grassroots movement here in Missouri.
We’ve held Hawley accountable for betraying our country and embarrassing our state. We’ve earned major in-state and national endorsements from groups like the Missouri AFL-CIO, Missouri Fire Fighters, League of Conservation Voters, and Social Security Works. And we’ve made this race our best chance to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024 — all thanks to your help.
**But now that last quarter is over, we only have three months until 2024 and there’s still so much work ahead of us.** From continuing to staff up our campaign to opening offices and reserving TV ad time, we need to spend these next three months preparing so we’ll be ready to defeat Josh Hawley next year — and your continued support is what makes that possible for our movement.
I am just so grateful you’re on this team, Peter. Thank you again for helping us keep up our campaign’s record-breaking momentum. I can’t wait to see what else we’ll accomplish together over this next year.
Now, let’s keep moving and flip this seat,
— Lucas Kunce
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37582?refcode=em20231002-3900&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3900%2E614464%2EV5hc_h)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=3900%2E614464%2EV5hc_h). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
You won’t believe what Democrats are pushing now
"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."

| | The Great & Holy Reverend Franklin Graham just broke his silence on the arrest of President Trump.
_**"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."**_
The sad truth is Democrats want President Trump arrested & behind bars because he stood up for Christianity & the unborn more than any other President in American history.
They can't stand that President Trump defended Christianity against the Woke Mob.
They're enraged that his Supreme Court Justices ended Roe v Wade.
And now that Trump has been arrested, they hope to take out the biggest defender of religious liberty & the unborn our country has ever seen.
**Democrats hope that if they throw Trump behind bars, Christian conservatives will never show up to the polls again._Then they 'll have free reign to trample our religious liberties._ **

body:
We’re empowering immigrant youth to organize and lead their own communities | | | 👋Meet our Squad, Peter: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8M0x13lDucczQZj8_nH42sXSYlfJvCy9Uo0my8TsgFF8QgK74edbAU1hc3SizNUcI2ux4Gok4p7CNAmYk_pZnsGGyFDKharfYyjkh9THLZByGza7rABbnuYbovaJkPiSkZ5TTsrnOuEZEqLBdS_SDWE6LeEEsczTkyH4gyRZaU8hkvBqiaXaY4FauCw4dLSvMpZv5r3fNua5Gqi5rlc76nNrd2-QiUA3GReDMWjGJI0dr9UQaLdDayB7nbkY8WKAqN4L_UJrnMv6sxpGvWJ3OON0Xb6SGZHbkjKnlyu7_72gTsKUnTTwNEQYgO2DvQ53Jzo8_zXQg8mSBUoG4Q8vYLg/403/IZefTZwVQy-Wyq2R1mltcQ/h0/Hxyr_CE4EUsOBrzcDV1I_8frgk0bDexgv6-i2rM0mog) UWDA’s Squad is a group of dedicated, passionate young leaders from around the country who come together to make change happen. ✊ Last week, Squad leaders held a call where they engaged in an activity about the intersectionality of immigration with other issues like economic status, access to healthcare, LGBTQ+ rights, and more as a way to understand why a unified force is needed to win in 2024. Here’s how the Squad works: Squad leaders are constantly working to identify new members, giving them support and training, and then empowering them to become leaders in their own communities. For example, UWDA’s social media team recently led a training to Squad members on harnessing the power of social media to amplify their voices — so now Squad members across the country are using Instagram and TikTok to engage their own networks on UWDA’s mission! 🤳 That’s the power of distributed organizing — when Squad members are empowered to organize and lead their own communities,**our impact can be 100 times greater! 📈** Today we’re asking you to support the Squad’s critical organizing work and help grow our numbers by making a donation today. **Will you chip in $****10****to help us grow the Squad, fund our organizing efforts, and win even more victories for immigrant communities? 💪** **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8M0x13lDucczQZj8_nH42sXSYlfJvCy9Uo0my8TsgFF8QgK74edbAU1hc3SizNUcIQmjL6RYC-YR5us-oWcWC9kMV2JSkIu67BP4dRBzYBGXgMYe8If986C_b496qhKfvkvWGeHRJKTba15xLnJWGCzl1miDXGQ5d7Y-F0wZxsSshGUq-dqDoGkJ3s_Ge1UVSchQSPisRH6O9dGRieEw8SNxYHq-N3G34ZRx50-SprAnRH1-9cd6GbKmc4ys6QNU0tv6WkyNKseF1Y8UEDefLOuHQOqqy4InqQtlUz5yb1LxjN8EJhor-6YNbZd_sicekLCe_JhjkNthgnnh1ju204qs9OBqWKzljtO9-jRfqTCtGkIMGlLK3GFDa9GaEfwYK/403/IZefTZwVQy-Wyq2R1mltcQ/h1/rDUvD0X3UMP2X1fRIadrIR8hs58pXoFEA1JMLsaX2hg)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: FWD: Palestinians deserve human rights.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last week, the Biden administration entered Israel into the U.S. Visa
Waiver program, which advocates are saying condones apartheid.

Israel’s persistent discrimination against Palestinian American and Arab
American travelers should disqualify Israel from the program, which
requires countries to accept all U.S. citizens equally. In addition,
Israel regularly bars Palestinians (including U.S. citizens living in
Palestine) from entering Israel even for medical emergencies, and denies
them freedom of movement within Palestinian territories.

Last month, President Biden also met with Israel’s far-right Prime
Minister Netanyahu, who is escalating apartheid against the Palestinian
people. Meanwhile, the Biden administration is moving forward with
dangerous Trump-era plans to build a U.S. embassy in Jerusalem, on land
stolen from Palestinian refugees.

We cannot normalize the Israeli government’s war crimes and human rights
abuses against Palestinians. But too many U.S. political leaders are doing
just that. In August, Democratic Congresspeople went on an AIPAC-sponsored
trip to Israel, after voting to reaffirm unconditional support for
Israel’s government.

Because I’m speaking out against the unbearable status quo of apartheid,
AIPAC and its network of PACs are gearing up to try to defeat me and other
members of our Squad.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138569?refcode=em20231002-31138&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=31138%2E1203867%2Ew2Fqho ]Please donate today to support my and Justice Democrats’ important 2024
re-election work, so we can withstand AIPAC’s attacks. Together, we’ll
keep building the movement for Palestinian liberation and human rights for
all.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138569?refcode=em20231002-31138&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31138%2E1203867%2Ew2Fqho ]Contribute $3

As the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, I won’t stop
fighting for our rights and liberation.

Thank you,

Rashida

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Forwarded email from September 27, 2023

Peter,

Last week, President Biden met with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu,
whose far-right racist regime wants to eliminate Palestinians altogether.

And just this week, the Biden administration admitted Israel into the U.S.
Visa Waiver Program, which allows other countries’ citizens to visit here
without a visa if those countries also freely let in U.S. citizens.
However, Palestinian Americans and Arab Americans regularly face
discrimination when they try to travel to Israel and Palestine. I
experienced that when Israel’s government blocked me from entering to
visit my grandmother.

For calling out the Israeli government’s human rights abuses against
Palestinians and Palestinian Americans, I’ve faced attacks from
Republicans and Democrats who want to silence any criticism of Israel.
Their denial enables ongoing apartheid.

But I’m not backing down. So pro-apartheid AIPAC and its affiliated PACs
are gearing up to try to defeat me and other members of our Squad as we
run for re-election in 2024.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138569?refcode=em20231002-31138&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=31138%2E1203867%2Ew2Fqho ]Please chip in today to my campaign and to Justice Democrats, so we
can withstand AIPAC’s attacks. Last year, AIPAC’s network spent over $40
million against progressive Democratic candidates, and now they’re seeking
2024 primary challengers to run against the Squad.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138569?refcode=em20231002-31138&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=31138%2E1203867%2Ew2Fqho ]CHIP IN TODAY

Funded largely by pro-Trump billionaires, AIPAC hosted Trump at their
annual conference and endorsed over 100 far-right Republicans who tried to
overturn 2020’s presidential election.

They’re trying to destroy the progressive wing of the Democratic Party,
because we’re building the power needed to end apartheid.

Last year, AIPAC’s network spent over $1 million to flood my district with
misinformation and attack ads in an attempt to mislead voters. But as the
only Palestinian-American member of Congress, I will never stop fighting
for a world where we can all be free.

I will keep humanizing Palestinians, educating my colleagues in Congress,
and calling to stop sending billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars each year to
the Israeli military. Together, we can hold Israel’s government
accountable for its ongoing war crimes. Together, we’ll keep building the
movement for Palestinian liberation.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138569?refcode=em20231002-31138&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=31138%2E1203867%2Ew2Fqho ]Please chip in $3 or more today to my re-election
campaign and to Justice Democrats so we can continue expanding
progressives’ advocacy for Palestinian rights in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138569?refcode=em20231002-31138&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1042&akid=31138%2E1203867%2Ew2Fqho ]Contribute $3

Thank you for being by my side as we fight for the human rights of all
people—with no exceptions.

In solidarity,

Rashida

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1043&akid=31138%2E1203867%2Ew2Fqho ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1044&akid=31138%2E1203867%2Ew2Fqho ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231002-31138-footer&t=1045&refcode2=31138_1203867_w2Fqho&akid=31138%2E1203867%2Ew2Fqho

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1046&akid=31138%2E1203867%2Ew2Fqho

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: big thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]Peter,
I wanted to reach out because, especially with everything going on, I’m feeling so thankful for your support in Q3. We had a strong quarter because of you.
I spent the last hours of Saturday making sure that Congress moved in time to avoid a shutdown. The spending bill we passed didn’t give us everything we wanted, but it was enough to make sure that we kept the lights on for the American people. Republicans took us to the brink of a shutdown, and it didn’t have to be that way.
The events of last week underscore just how important it is for Democrats to retake the majority in 2024. Working families should never have to worry about when their next paycheck will arrive, and when Democrats are in charge, they deliver. So let’s remain strong in our dedication to democracy and work to get the right people in office. People who will do their job.
Onward,
Wiley
Follow Wiley Online:
https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc]

Raleigh, NC 27602

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f46a603b-bfad-4af3-9e68-708e03f6bcf1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As an [avowed global generalist](https://substack.com/redirect/aac2c5b6-d7ad-43a6-946b-18f5cb50d8a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I am constantly scanning the horizon to see how developments in economics, geopolitics, technology, demographics, and social trends may impact our lives. I read an eclectic collection of books, magazine articles, and academic papers and speak with a diverse group of business leaders, government officials, academics, journalists, and ordinary people from all walks of life. [I do this because I firmly believe that the best way to navigate uncertainty is to focus on connecting dots, rather than generating them](https://substack.com/redirect/b7a749e1-8a28-4ebc-9280-f929043ce7d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
One of the most common questions I get asked in the course of my travels is "What are you watching?" Interestingly, the question is often asked after I've stepped off the stage or when I've finished a boardroom presentation. I've recently taken to asking my question-askers why they've asked the question when they do...and the responses I've received are fascinating; here's my favorite one:
> _" You're here as an expert, and so we're supposed to ask you what you think...but I really want insight into how you develop those thoughts. I know you're thinking will change over time, and that will depend upon what happens in the world, so I thought it might be interesting to hear where you're focused. As you mentioned, your position is structurally different than ours and it gives you a breadth I don't have given my role...I really just want to tap into your thinking process and see what has your attention..."_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sC2UTN6TxOEthXoKtKDcFf3gkUoeSGv6-wzvtin6m50?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137590791)
It's in that spirit that I share what I'm watching today. The following three developments have caught my attention. The first two are obviously important and will almost certainly affect all of us; the third might be dismissed as a fringe topic, but it has my attention because it has the potential to be very consequential to our lives, depending upon how future events unfold. And of course, there are lots of other topics worthy of attention that I don't profile here. Regardless, I offer the following discussion with a hope that it spurs you to think differently about the future.
1. **The American Consumer**. [US consumers have continued spending](https://substack.com/redirect/b4f9b496-90cc-4c0b-b52b-2d2c01d37d56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at unexpectedly robust rates. Given consumption accounts for around 70% of America's GDP, weakening consumer confidence or increasing financial distress would definitely hurt the US economy. [The restart of student loan repayments](https://substack.com/redirect/1359fde6-56ea-4c45-8526-274e669d5aa0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [increasing labor unrest](https://substack.com/redirect/d40b1dd0-9b8c-4ece-b019-53d6d46a1bd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the UAW and more recently in Las Vegas, the ongoing risk of a government shutdown, and potential labor market disruptions from technological innovation are leading to a simple question: How long can consumer strength continue? And let's not forget that geopolitical uncertainties are keeping food and fuel prices well above pre-Ukraine levels, a reality that continues to stress many household budgets.

**SO WHAT?** If the consumer slows, as looks increasingly likely, then it would follow that the economy as a whole would also slow, probably tipping the United States into a recession, leading to job losses, which could generate additional cutbacks in consumer spending. Will such conditions reveal excessive leverage in the mortgage markets, driving real estate markets lower? Will a recession impact the upcoming US presidential election? What are the ramifications for the financial markets? How will Congress or the Federal Reserve react to a shrinking economy?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/64f4e5dd-5833-47cd-aadb-8c24406960f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [freestocks](https://substack.com/redirect/5618981c-26a0-4bfd-9fca-0be6de2fd722?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/87d088ff-0c6b-4584-a263-b9246b934a81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sC2UTN6TxOEthXoKtKDcFf3gkUoeSGv6-wzvtin6m50?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137590791)
2. **China 's Economic Slowdown.** The Chinese economy has been rapidly decelerating, leading pundits to worry that the world's second largest economy may drag the world economy down with it. [The country is drowning in debt, there are signs of overcapacity everywhere, and youth unemployment has been rising rapidly, raising the risk of potential domestic unrest](https://substack.com/redirect/2bb0cad0-6bf2-4525-8126-fb81900ba219?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). In addition, US multinationals have concluded that [China is "uninvestable" as Beijing continues fining and raiding foreign companies operating within their borders](https://substack.com/redirect/9deaa8d9-cac3-4ac8-9930-a1e782abf7f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). ([In fact, the PRC recently barred an employee of a US firm from leaving Mainland China](https://substack.com/redirect/629b8f50-963f-4f59-9d3e-0b242be62c97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).) The implications of continued Chinese economic weakness would be felt across many commodity, goods, and services markets.

**SO WHAT?** A rapidly slowing China might lead citizens to demand a change in political leadership. Could such a threat to Beijing spur CCP leaders to crackdown on unrest like the world witnessed in June 1989? Or might the Chinese Communist Party use a diversionary foreign escapade to generate unifying nationalism within the country? Could American businesses de-coupling from China accelerate Beijing's plans to "reintegrate" Taiwan? Or is China's economic house of cards simply collapsing upon itself? Could such an outcome lead to a disintegration of the PRC (like the USSR) as provinces such as Guangdong and Sichuan establish themselves as independent states?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aa7ddfd8-42ce-40e4-b7ca-83bab0c55b05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sC2UTN6TxOEthXoKtKDcFf3gkUoeSGv6-wzvtin6m50?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137590791)
3. **Life on Other Planets?** As technologies for gathering data in outer space continue to improve, we're learning more and more about the potential for life on planets other than earth. NASA recently reported a fascinating observation about K2-18b, an exoplanet in the habitable zone approximately 120 light years away from Earth:
> _[A new investigation with NASA's James Webb Space Telescope into K2-18b, an exoplanet 8.6 times as massive as Earth, has revealed the presence of carbon-bearing molecules including methane and carbon dioxide. The abundance of methane and carbon dioxide, and shortage of ammonia, support the hypothesis that there may be a water ocean underneath a hydrogen-rich atmosphere in K2-18 b.](https://substack.com/redirect/beda8ca3-3f2c-4b5e-96b0-b562687d5162?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
A more detailed report about the observations also went to note a possible detection of dimethyl sulfide (DMS) on K2-18b, noting "[On Earth, ](https://substack.com/redirect/e1a23cdc-4dec-4f7c-bdcb-4b196d1ac1af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[this is only produced by life](https://substack.com/redirect/e1a23cdc-4dec-4f7c-bdcb-4b196d1ac1af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[. The bulk of the DMS in Earth's atmosphere is emitted from phytoplankton in marine environments](https://substack.com/redirect/e1a23cdc-4dec-4f7c-bdcb-4b196d1ac1af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." (_emphasis added_)

**SO WHAT?** Could the emergence of a common threat such as aliens be a unifying force, leading all Earthlings to see themselves "on the same team" and combine forces to address the challenge of another species? ([Recall that Reagan and Gorbachev agreed to put aside their differences if aliens invaded Earth](https://substack.com/redirect/869b4ff7-fc4f-44d7-bfc7-fcf90300f597?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).) Or could this development spur additional research funding, newfound excitement in STEM education, or a boom in science-fiction writing (and reading)? Or perhaps this development is just noise that won't really affect any of us--ever?

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/500ea858-d1cc-482d-8cb0-450d75e344b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [https://stsci-opo.org/STScI-01H9R8AEK6Y7QR03MGN9V9P6ZJ.jpg](https://substack.com/redirect/432b37e4-4d86-47e3-b4af-12ff90403ec1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sC2UTN6TxOEthXoKtKDcFf3gkUoeSGv6-wzvtin6m50?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137590791)

These three developments are just a few of the many topics that have my focus these days. I'm also intrigued by the emergence of next-generation nuclear technologies, the US-China war and its impact on commodity markets, Iran's increasingly aggressive stance towards the West, the relationship between big technology companies and governments, the demographic implications of robots, and the future of cryptocurrency markets. I'll be writing about these and many other topics in the weeks and months to come, so please stay tuned!

About [Vikram Mansharamani](https://open.substack.com/users/37278065-vikram-mansharamani?utm_source=mentions)
Dr. Mansharamani is a global generalist who tries to look beyond the short term view that tends to dominate today's agenda. He spends his time speaking with leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism...and prides himself on voraciously consuming a wide variety of books, magazines, articles, TV shows, and podcasts. _LinkedIn_ twice listed him as their #1 Top Voice for Global Economics and _Worth_ profiled him on their list of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. He has taught at Yale and Harvard and has a PhD and two masters degrees from MIT. He is also the author of _[THINK FOR YOURSELF: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/4d608587-4d22-4b7e-bc1c-ca0990f27360?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ as well as _[BOOMBUSTOLOGY: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/252db2a5-a7f4-461f-941b-a9a70a69942f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. clean_body: Three Developments That Have My Attention... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Three Developments That Have My Attention... | | | Oct 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- As an , I am constantly scanning the horizon to see how developments in economics, geopolitics, technology, demographics, and social trends may impact our lives. I read an eclectic collection of books, magazine articles, and academic papers and speak with a diverse group of business leaders, government officials, academics, journalists, and ordinary people from all walks of life. . One of the most common questions I get asked in the course of my travels is "What are you watching?" Interestingly, the question is often asked after I've stepped off the stage or when I've finished a boardroom presentation. I've recently taken to asking my question-askers why they've asked the question when they do...and the responses I've received are fascinating; here's my favorite one: " You're here as an expert, and so we're supposed to ask you what you think...but I really want insight into how you develop those thoughts. I know you're thinking will change over time, and that will depend upon what happens in the world, so I thought it might be interesting to hear where you're focused. As you mentioned, your position is structurally different than ours and it gives you a breadth I don't have given my role...I really just want to tap into your thinking process and see what has your attention..." It's in that spirit that I share what I'm watching today. The following three developments have caught my attention. The first two are obviously important and will almost certainly affect all of us; the third might be dismissed as a fringe topic, but it has my attention because it has the potential to be very consequential to our lives, depending upon how future events unfold. And of course, there are lots of other topics worthy of attention that I don't profile here. Regardless, I offer the following discussion with a hope that it spurs you to think differently about the future. 1. The American Consumer. at unexpectedly robust rates. Given consumption accounts for around 70% of America's GDP, weakening consumer confidence or increasing financial distress would definitely hurt the US economy. , at the UAW and more recently in Las Vegas, the ongoing risk of a government shutdown, and potential labor market disruptions from technological innovation are leading to a simple question: How long can consumer strength continue? And let's not forget that geopolitical uncertainties are keeping food and fuel prices well above pre-Ukraine levels, a reality that continues to stress many household budgets. SO WHAT? If the consumer slows, as looks increasingly likely, then it would follow that the economy as a whole would also slow, probably tipping the United States into a recession, leading to job losses, which could generate additional cutbacks in consumer spending. Will such conditions reveal excessive leverage in the mortgage markets, driving real estate markets lower? Will a recession impact the upcoming US presidential election? What are the ramifications for the financial markets? How will Congress or the Federal Reserve react to a shrinking economy? | | ---|---|--- Photo by on 2. China 's Economic Slowdown. The Chinese economy has been rapidly decelerating, leading pundits to worry that the world's second largest economy may drag the world economy down with it. . In addition, US multinationals have concluded that . (.) The implications of continued Chinese economic weakness would be felt across many commodity, goods, and services markets. SO WHAT? A rapidly slowing China might lead citizens to demand a change in political leadership. Could such a threat to Beijing spur CCP leaders to crackdown on unrest like the world witnessed in June 1989? Or might the Chinese Communist Party use a diversionary foreign escapade to generate unifying nationalism within the country? Could American businesses de-coupling from China accelerate Beijing's plans to "reintegrate" Taiwan? Or is China's economic house of cards simply collapsing upon itself? Could such an outcome lead to a disintegration of the PRC (like the USSR) as provinces such as Guangdong and Sichuan establish themselves as independent states? | | ---|---|--- 3. Life on Other Planets? As technologies for gathering data in outer space continue to improve, we're learning more and more about the potential for life on planets other than earth. NASA recently reported a fascinating observation about K2-18b, an exoplanet in the habitable zone approximately 120 light years away from Earth: A more detailed report about the observations also went to note a possible detection of dimethyl sulfide (DMS) on K2-18b, noting "." (emphasis added) SO WHAT? Could the emergence of a common threat such as aliens be a unifying force, leading all Earthlings to see themselves "on the same team" and combine forces to address the challenge of another species? (.) Or could this development spur additional research funding, newfound excitement in STEM education, or a boom in science-fiction writing (and reading)? Or perhaps this development is just noise that won't really affect any of us--ever? | | ---|---|--- Source: These three developments are just a few of the many topics that have my focus these days. I'm also intrigued by the emergence of next-generation nuclear technologies, the US-China war and its impact on commodity markets, Iran's increasingly aggressive stance towards the West, the relationship between big technology companies and governments, the demographic implications of robots, and the future of cryptocurrency markets. I'll be writing about these and many other topics in the weeks and months to come, so please stay tuned! About Dr. Mansharamani is a global generalist who tries to look beyond the short term view that tends to dominate today's agenda. He spends his time speaking with leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism...and prides himself on voraciously consuming a wide variety of books, magazines, articles, TV shows, and podcasts. LinkedIn twice listed him as their #1 Top Voice for Global Economics and Worth profiled him on their list of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. He has taught at Yale and Harvard and has a PhD and two masters degrees from MIT. He is also the author of as well as . Follow him on or . You're currently a free subscriber to . Fellow Conservative,

My Democrat opponent’s shameless hypocrisy was on full display last week, as he wrote an op-ed about how he’s trying to reverse a Biden gun control plan he helped make law.

Let me say that again: New York’s third Senator voted for Biden’s gun control plan, but now that he’s up for re-election Jon Tester is trying to undo what he helped make law.

This, Fellow Conservative, is **shameless hypocrisy from a career politician at his finest.**

We’ve seen this song and dance from Jon Tester before. Here’s how it typically plays out. When he thinks no one is paying attention - years before his next race - _**Democrat Jon Tester will serve as New York’s third Senator**_ , supporting things like a ban on federal funds for gun safety programs in school. Then, when it’s time to start campaigning, **Democrat Jon Tester will do a complete flip-flop and pretend he’s been fighting for Montana values the whole time.**

We deserve better than the lip service we’re getting from the career politicians like Jon Tester.

America needs a new generation of conservative leaders who love our country. _**That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate.**_

**[I’m asking you to make a gift to my campaign today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e2a50c753454fa3be486af485918378&_e=qNRybv-WlGANX-CgHJ8_nHImiG130DKqssSbScHyT618DotRE_4Uae-_VfGO42IrUT4wht9VN4vw8frgokAmq92R_0pqYk8S7oUXGPXn0jeNdmIUFIC5_v5I7PYlxWRwQ8aOUrlB05hrISXdE24VrUTiQrqSoFUxM1ZCXbicb88JpzZWrtbg6heyVKNaPnAruSiypKHoomYgbbqkdDoWmm9UopXmxDd6h3MVINd67zRnn1TtfV7VjGyyQpSN02azBxK2IQsbDDvgG_RnopeDux2Yb3jDkkXeH4H-mDvGhI8KMJFDDgi5oZBZpxCKpLXjDlt8Pwfe6goe4eA2VbRZIC9vu6p3hoGoBi0UHloMoWMdbWTA-lR6FSOABWUal26yG6olIiFbfNCcRQYGUvBSsg%3D%3D)** Together we can ensure there will be one less hypocritical career politician in Washington come January 2025.

Peter,

Ever since I acted in self-defense in Kenosha, my life has been turned upside down. The media and gun-control lobby decided to make me their personal target to not only destroy my life... but strip Americans of their Second Amendment rights.

Well, I defeated them.

However, my story is far from over.

You and I have a new challenge to win to defend the Second Amendment:

My friend, Brandon Herrera, is running for Congress in Texas as a champion of the Second Amendment and the Constitution. _Brandon is running against a so-called "Republican" in the GOP primary, one who voted for Joe Biden's gun control and advocated for amnesty_.
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=45ceddbed6d84f9f82d054a082a9289f&_e=BQipddrKnPY-a3uRTxxhZaEvKZmbfaQgoYu7yn-SHSGlbKLx5vgq7hElBmQe438UE-Sxd86bvdB6LmilRmp33D944t-ZnLrFeM8n-S_ftooPxD9xJCtGCX8KJVRA2p0PqBHbj0eCEL0NJj8zywdT_yGfxdB-bVqgs_mitVq3l5cDX0puFzkqagfjdlLNXd2syo9fc4I5um_vr1HSssBRPwaBH-MID2rXToe8aqLB1XYFFoaqeoiFXq3mbp4Vr-hO)
_(Here I am with Brandon ... As you can see, we're proud supporters of the Second Amendment.)_
[I am asking everyone I know, all America-First patriots and all Second Amendment supporters, to help me raise $25,000 for Brandon Herrera's congressional campaign. name: Cori Bush
subject: New bill to end solitary confinement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
I introduced the End Solitary Confinement Act with colleagues, advocates, and survivors of solitary confinement. | |
---
Peter, Over 122,000 people are locked in solitary confinement for 22 hours or more each day across federal, state, and local prisons and jails. Even more people are in solitary inside immigration detention facilities, and many are stuck in torturous isolation for months or years. UN experts have condemned solitary as psychological torture -- and that’s exactly what it is. It’s traumatic and it rips away people’s humanity. It’s also disproportionately inflicted on Black and brown folks, young people, LGBTQ+ people, and other marginalized communities. So I introduced the **_End Solitary Confinement Act_** with colleagues, advocates, and survivors of solitary confinement to end this heinous and immoral practice. [**Please sign on today to support the _End Solitary Confinement Act_. Together we can save lives and stop torture.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mnGhTdRYWPaRZJRJCgnUXGYNgapqacPbwF-8lGd5JxoCbtjCwx8RwxXyUBJ6yaqbx0dbvq3gsdc3mU2BRJivliuWpJHQJpK59d-wSYmga58gJMxVqGiFmCr6em3iUSeWU96IUwoXuZV0a_swTIhUNn57vyxF_Ny6y32dlNcj3xaD9uNCo7X9JWeq18KmcqO_r5qvNTZbCOeKYYz2BMj360zhnO1Nh90DWbAJ0Qp17Y4gSeeV6vZP0GBzB673ue9phnAmUiRXpOfcqNNYWnK90Hy0uHLcmDlWzH-Aqkeel_3mJ0nNu-F8WICqBava5-pDNc6qC_1bHlP1ZZ4kyha9bfpeqaJaXG-dG6o5iJEmQJBocmxeWuFTg7LsBywfFElDcbuIYJ7CE1s1HvaoYeQJLCKO0-ezYhlpVKWv8BeJsqv_ywV84cO2baTGGJ2XGKbuxfm0PHmrZwRtsAXeX2Z7TvgZGM99ZhM3FDvt0ajBBsPXQrBCUO4CVpmgnd6s2qSF9/403/QhzFwC3aTqCtWWkJBhkGDQ/h0/Qxw252-KQjgO_K2ohDO2IyCdSWZ3gTuN229E0UTv4dM) **[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mnGhTdRYWPaRZJRJCgnUXGYNgapqacPbwF-8lGd5JxoCbtjCwx8RwxXyUBJ6yaqbx0dbvq3gsdc3mU2BRJivliuWpJHQJpK59d-wSYmga58gJMxVqGiFmCr6em3iUSeWU96IUwoXuZV0a_swTIhUNn57vyxF_Ny6y32dlNcj3xaD9uNCo7X9JWeq18KmcqO_r5qvNTZbCOeKYYz2BMj360zhnO1Nh90DWbAJ0Qp17Y4gSeeV6vZP0GBzB673ue9phnAmUiRXpOfcqNNYWnK90HzdBX4UFqxSQhsc6ED7Cou-2E5zn49G6_vBJNBKxsAJSR3d25rDCRAb0jyF0GH4aTQhBegp0M4iBZa-rTs7zWrA7jiETPpe6NQN_OQn5wewCB-V2aQNef0isLFGEn1QZsAQpF8XvPy-KG56BpqY9s_0KhIfRckVYI-Z_srL5EvE1Wi-fyrLd_1agMiwHwzNY9uGoupar93QpTv1BNJ8YTVRDSoDQtHCPP6Npp5ifQFnY/403/QhzFwC3aTqCtWWkJBhkGDQ/h1/-e22aJnhmrYM-gDwAeBryJNlnVNYQYffXFCJV6CyADo) ** We need justice for people like Kalief Browder, who was 16 years old when he was arrested for a crime he didn’t commit. He was held in solitary confinement for 700 days, and when he got out, he died by suicide. An inhumane, cruel, torturous system of criminalization and isolation killed Kalief, as it has killed so many others. To save lives, we urgently need to pass the _End Solitary Confinement Act_. If passed, the bill would:
* End solitary confinement in federal prisons, jails, and other detention settings -- with an exception for a maximum of 4 hours for emergency de-escalation (not punishment).

* Ensure all people incarcerated in federal facilities have meaningful access (at least 14 hours) to out-of-cell time, group programming, and basic needs and services each day.

* Expand due process protections for incarcerated people, including ensuring access to representation and neutral decision-makers.

* Create oversight and enforcement mechanisms, including a community monitoring body that could investigate complaints, and mandating regular reporting on the use of solitary and incidents of self-harm.

* Provide additional protections against placing vulnerable populations in solitary.

* Incentivize states and local governments to end solitary confinement in state and local facilities.

[**Add your name to be a grassroots co-sponsor of the _End Solitary Confinement Act_ , so we can put an end to solitary confinement once and for all.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mnGhTdRYWPaRZJRJCgnUXGYNgapqacPbwF-8lGd5JxoCbtjCwx8RwxXyUBJ6yaqbx0dbvq3gsdc3mU2BRJivliuWpJHQJpK59d-wSYmga58gJMxVqGiFmCr6em3iUSeWU96IUwoXuZV0a_swTIhUNn57vyxF_Ny6y32dlNcj3xaD9uNCo7X9JWeq18KmcqO_r5qvNTZbCOeKYYz2BMj360zhnO1Nh90DWbAJ0Qp17Y4gSeeV6vZP0GBzB673ue9phnAmUiRXpOfcqNNYWnK90H1Ez894iPKw9-Supd53t9FGRBC23eCEVHcyG62B_qrcaZDFvZJ7enIg55L-Dd46jCtYZ97pGLTjGKBDQYeARysyslNC3xsVq07w8W_hOq87xLGoJONBwsbxSwgEPKA0EFuSc8y9ANBWucckxxD-cvBwUy92HsL_8BSa6tn22gfJ1w_8N9pDUUdhy0KnEm8lKq3DE4Q7aHTXA36KguXAzqW5ZeNZzQWM_aopQRyTiP0gV/403/QhzFwC3aTqCtWWkJBhkGDQ/h2/-1JlETRXTAWx5FsiFhx5CjfmAawhfBWV558JRirRTO8) Genuine community safety will never be achieved so long as we rely on mass incarceration and torture. I’m pushing to end our country’s instinct to criminalize, incarcerate, and punish -- and instead build systems of care that see the humanity in every person. With love, Cori **[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsCngMvGFNWRSahYbk427D_kO3JsB5pWyniYlPCft2mJuUPMTUitH0zDZe_MQIFrzNc0Cs5kzEdn1H0VAu0tFIZrwu2_ISQG0sTzQKNGAPaQoMjtF47PtzBSzK2L0MVYZxXGJirGWVN1LrF-pBAnq8OjIxLjXKISKSG1VsBvxamOUWuh3Od0HMWpKZH5WF9zqGXZWd9Jyvar8S07Ou3jKI9tG2ggU-qZtekYlCrrmXnSn7dLLxkKZUXKCWBNigIad9I-H6PqgR98jlzsUA8XqsHPujOu8iGarTOqqR6pr-GqcewoukFn99nQ81p6bZ0Yi13o06v_3pSitS2wgPGtuQZR4qxPg6chCFtbl4CaQ-6UizEyRXjyR0SEw9Yhx319o/403/QhzFwC3aTqCtWWkJBhkGDQ/h3/Gzo63mybhxA_Acy4iFai2JeALE8EtgfP_2iUL7da3as) **

body:
| | | Friend, I’m reaching out to let you know that our EXTENDED deadline to take back the Senate expires **TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT.**

---
[**PITCH IN $10**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=eb3054284b9d4750bbaa210233582ea1&_e=-F9aTXApDtlzYHjzPbQyYkKSXmwmIroCFZyL9kdf1NEiLapk7HLoDUFoJRmN0FT5Ldhie9llTJLOKDiCs-eQXvOYyGYHyMaUHujkCFJWhKgQxf_uoFIQtNBrTo0jZxioEmt546F6YB9pyBHVMXKZZhSQlKZaQ7My7_UGbN-LaRYxsei-T2TmJzrKXghlt10La6Bm97b419r8_wJ1-qP5TaEnx6CoaxvaPZ_mu602h7fOo72W2w2q_N-YT8Rd7pt4rYOc6LaNQqogkqsbd-p4Vgxj70reabQp5fTSiFjSIEGDyXWUdT0Cy_z2C1lldSgZ-GdY-jcMV1EDsdi6YvAzzgplOccsaVVg6Quib6bJlhyQMdcEf-uuJodzoRuMJRqTCcDBCyYqhj7UJg14NaJLxA%3D%3D)
---
**Republican leaders need YOU to help them build their war chest to take back the Senate.** This race is going to come down to grassroots Americans like you.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Op-Ed: Mike Lawler is responsible for the chaos in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
There is no one to blame for the chaos in Washington except for Republican Congressmen like Mike Lawler.
Team,

Over the weekend, our federal government nearly shut down due to the actions of Republican Congressmen like Mike Lawler. And we may be back in this situation in a few short weeks. This shut down crisis is just the latest example of the chaos created by House Republicans.

**Enough is enough.** I wrote an op-ed in our local paper sharing my thoughts on the state of Congress under Republican leadership and why it’s time we hold Republicans in Washington responsible for this chaos. Please take a moment to read it below, **[and then share it with your friends:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70831159/430450376/103261226?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTI4ZjRkMy02YTYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u4IUjNn6b7itlOICMwPu5reKeuuHaXABl4hzVPKnqa8=&emci=5b319fcf-5c61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=0128f4d3-6a61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=24719896)**

* * *
**[We have to hold Republicans — including Rep. Mike Lawler — responsible for chaos in Congress](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70831160/430450377/103261226?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTI4ZjRkMy02YTYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u4IUjNn6b7itlOICMwPu5reKeuuHaXABl4hzVPKnqa8=&emci=5b319fcf-5c61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=0128f4d3-6a61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=24719896)**

"On Saturday, Republicans in Congress nearly shut down the federal government. Millions of federal workers, including thousands here in the Lower Hudson Valley, would have been sent home without a paycheck for the foreseeable future, and until House Speaker Kevin McCarthy’s extreme right-wing caucus got its act together. For this and other chaos in Washington, Washington Republicans like Rep. Michael Lawler, who represents the 17th District, covering much of the Lower Hudson Valley, are to blame.

Constituents who watched Lawler’s recent performances on CNN — in which he described his fellow Republican colleagues as “lunatics” who would bear responsibility for grinding our federal agencies to a halt — may ask when Lawler will acknowledge his role in creating this crisis. Don’t hold your breath.

A career political operative who worked to elect and re-elect Donald Trump, Lawler’s recent media appearances are part of a strategy of using empty words to appear reasonable in a district that rejected Trump while in fact enabling MAGA extremism on Capitol Hill. This near-government shutdown, like the baseless impeachment inquiry into President Joe Biden, and our nation’s credit downgrade by Fitch ratings agency because America nearly defaulted on its debt last spring, could all have been avoided. But not so long as Lawler continues serving in Congress.

Lawler has played an active role in enabling MAGA extremism by voting for McCarthy to be House Speaker 15 times in January. When McCarthy failed to garner the necessary votes on ballot after ballot, Lawler was there for him, despite knowing that McCarthy would be in the pockets of extreme MAGA Republicans like Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, Rep. Lauren Boebert and Rep. Matt Gaetz.

A closer look at Lawler’s record is revealing. He supported the baseless impeachment inquiry into President Biden announced last month. He voted to overturn the ATF’s gun brace regulation, intended to make us all safer from America’s epidemic of mass shootings, and he voted to make it harder for our military servicemembers to get an abortion, even for rape victims.

On Friday, Lawler voted for a cruel and devastating 30% cut in federal spending. According to the White House, the budget Lawler voted for would have cut 12,500 FBI agents and nearly 1,000 Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms and Explosives agents. His budget would have caused 250,000 children to lose access to child care and 3.2 million women, infants and children to lose nutrition assistance. Lawler’s budget would have defunded public education, with as many as 145,000 teachers and staff potentially getting taken out of the classroom. Moreover, Lawler would have defunded our seniors by closing up to 240 Social Security field offices or causing them to shorten the hours they are open to the public, and his budget would have cut one million seniors’ access to Meals on Wheels.

As the congressman for the 17th District until a few months ago, my focus was always on improving the lives of families in the Lower Hudson Valley. My colleagues and I rescued the U.S. economy from collapse at the height of COVID, kept our small businesses open, cut child poverty nearly in half for a time, and passed the Inflation Reduction Act to cap prescription drug costs for people on Medicare. As the youngest member of House leadership, I was especially proud to negotiate passage of the largest infrastructure law in generations. All of this legislation allowed me to bring hundreds of millions of dollars to our communities in the Lower Hudson Valley.

By contrast, Washington Republicans like Lawler tried to jam through legislation that would have hurt millions of Americans with cruel budget cuts as a condition for keeping the federal government open. Respectfully, they are not serious people. Moreover, the Republican Party is preparing to renominate the twice impeached, serially indicted Trump, who has vowed to pardon the insurrectionists who nearly took my life and the lives of many of my colleagues on January 6th.

In July, I announced my campaign to return to Congress to stop this madness, and to restore serious leadership. I will resume my focus on the kitchen-table issues concerning Lower Hudson Valley residents: lowering prescription drug costs for everyone and making child care, housing, and education more affordable. I intend to restore basic freedoms like abortion through passing a law that reinstates Roe v. Wade. Unlike Lawler, I understand that improving public safety means passing an assault weapons ban, which was effective the last time America had such a law in the early 2000s. Moreover, as Washington Republicans wage the worst assault on our democracy since the 1960s, I am running to pass voting rights and other democracy legislation that I co-authored last term.

I know it sounds like a cliché to say November 2024 will be, yet again, the most important election of our lifetimes. But consider who will be on the ballot."

_Mondaire Jones, a Democrat, represented New York's 17th Congressional District from 2021 to 2023._

| PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
---
P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591
---
If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://actions.mondaireforcongress.com/p/9V_g1W8hE0SEtVXc6ZCC0w2?unsubscribedata=P1LrfsDSYshrXhDHtqSBQXoQCCOLM%2Fe4FrvkgLBfvpaLiO9N0%2FuyKb1lmd0lvOps%2FL3tSH05%2B5uILIs%2BaU3sfYUQiWCXjJ%2Fv3ombrE51WWMhoX4Je1UMAldvC0lnKl7nPyGC0LT4%2Bilf68rDK8mfCj0Y2KfF9qBOKwv8fbP4DtYkUJtRl05yK4DlP5qF7iGQpCJDxT2BzRGeZMhMjKZDSAAB%2BK1kl1VmboOk9Y%2BfHmaS%2BNKHrf1zJxtGH1ULGW%2BGHZZ6UKYaUT8LZasvMufayY0JJKhnrkh6HX0D6kKQWKH2y9h2dQ7aHzAj93jUlce%2FOYBzFyxBeyYnGz6J748x54ChuJ%2FIl%2FIgEey8zaByjrZ5vKP87jgl8QFaJOLxWCcKm7FGXNK6Gnb4bqA5YwhiMt1DcCQcQOsu%2BEdXKvs2v7YsxAw3jUdIwXBKyXl2yMt%2F).

name: Ro Khanna
subject: It’s time for autoworkers to receive their fair share
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
I recently met striking autoworkers on the picket line in Wayne, Michigan.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70831305/430450689/-1645665386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjNhMDRiNTgtNmI2MS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-74if8Vo3rOEcZ3hcMhcMsIGZqyCIEfD6-rdOQ5JCOw=&emci=c6aee551-6b61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=b3a04b58-6b61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)
---
Friend, The sacrifices Autoworkers made in 2008 helped the auto industry survive the Great Recession. Now that the industry is back, the CEOs at some of the country’s largest car manufacturers are seeing a 40 percent increase in pay in just four years, while workers have been left behind. Right now, the average autoworker works 60 to 70 hours a week, sometimes for less than $20 an hour, while CEOs make 300 times more money. Speaking with striking auto workers in Wayne, Michigan, the consensus was clear: They deserve their fair share for what they do and what they’ve lost. **[WATCH: On the Picket Line in Wayne, MI](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70831306/430450690/-803653937?v=Sa0eFao5Kos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjNhMDRiNTgtNmI2MS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-74if8Vo3rOEcZ3hcMhcMsIGZqyCIEfD6-rdOQ5JCOw=&emci=c6aee551-6b61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=b3a04b58-6b61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)**
---
[| | |
---|---|---](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70831307/430450691/-803653937?v=Sa0eFao5Kos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjNhMDRiNTgtNmI2MS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-74if8Vo3rOEcZ3hcMhcMsIGZqyCIEfD6-rdOQ5JCOw=&emci=c6aee551-6b61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=b3a04b58-6b61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080 "Autoworkers are fighting for the ENTIRE working class")
Auto workers need to regain what they forfeited fifteen years ago. They need wages that support their families and reflect the industry’s success following the recession. They need a guarantee that their jobs are secure as we transition to electric vehicles. In short, their treatment must reflect the value they create for these companies. **[Sign if you agree: It’s time for UAW workers to get the wages they deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70831308/430450692/-315389377?contactdata=TO70BpZy3vbvdjrGLMSox9MXMbf8KJ6UKsM7SScvLhGweaFPuSbJEkL2SHR4EiwMlTwVgfjwUL0rnp0b6+UnDCM3bcDH3TDdPYp3hPe5IIl/uiuk2zFF0GMfyH0/anM9kDKKM5HFVuJMDQqOcRbgKQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjNhMDRiNTgtNmI2MS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-74if8Vo3rOEcZ3hcMhcMsIGZqyCIEfD6-rdOQ5JCOw=&emci=c6aee551-6b61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=b3a04b58-6b61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)**

subject: MISSING: Rep. Gonzales’ Vote on Border Security Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
Julie Clark wants to lead, Gonzales wants to campaign. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dc254f47901a/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12654527?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=284d02a31d&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| Where was Representative Gonzales when House Republicans passed a critical funding bill for border security? **Campaigning on Social Media at the Southern Border...** This is business as usual for politicians like Gonzales who use their establishment Republican title to fool Texans into turning a blind eye to their true intentions.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=6928cc2135&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| _**Our people will not be fooled.**_ While Rep. Gonzalez spends his time and money worrying about his image, he is ignoring what really matters to the people of his district, and _**would rather be seen visiting the Southern Border than actually voting to protect it.**_ In fact, out of 224 potential votes, **Rep. Gonzales has been absent for _70 votes_! **We must hold him accountable by coming together and demanding a strong leader who isn’t afraid to make tough decisions.

I will be that leader. When I get to Congress I will take a stand for our people, and our values. I will not be afraid to fight for our people and take action, rather than make empty promises. My people can rest assured that I will not be a **Republican In Name Only** , but stand up as a true conservative to protect the values we hold dear.
[**Peter, are you tired of leaders who talk the talk, but never walk the walk? Then join my fight below today and let’s give Texas the conservative leader it deserves!**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=6bb4de7e7a&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| [[JOIN MY FIGHT FOR TX ]](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=9c106a260c&e=c982eb7ad4 "\[JOIN MY FIGHT FOR TX \]")
---
| [[SUPPORT A TRUE CONSERVATIVE]](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=e3526253c2&e=c982eb7ad4 "\[SUPPORT A TRUE CONSERVATIVE\]")
---
| For Texas,

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23
[ClarkForCongress.com](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=0f8f050478&e=c982eb7ad4)
---

clean_body: Julie Clark wants to lead, Gonzales wants to campaign. | | | | | | | Dear Peter, | Where was Representative Gonzales when House Republicans passed a critical funding bill for border security? Campaigning on Social Media at the Southern Border... This is business as usual for politicians like Gonzales who use their establishment Republican title to fool Texans into turning a blind eye to their true intentions. | | Our people will not be fooled. While Rep. Gonzalez spends his time and money worrying about his image, he is ignoring what really matters to the people of his district, and would rather be seen visiting the Southern Border than actually voting to protect it. In fact, out of 224 potential votes, Rep. Gonzales has been absent for 70 votes! We must hold him accountable by coming together and demanding a strong leader who isn’t afraid to make tough decisions. I will be that leader. When I get to Congress I will take a stand for our people, and our values. I will not be afraid to fight for our people and take action, rather than make empty promises. My people can rest assured that I will not be a Republican In Name Only , but stand up as a true conservative to protect the values we hold dear. | [[JOIN MY FIGHT FOR TX ]]( "\[JOIN MY FIGHT FOR TX \]") | [[SUPPORT A TRUE CONSERVATIVE]]( "\[SUPPORT A TRUE CONSERVATIVE\]") | For Texas, Julie Clark Former Medina County Republican Chair Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark" | | Copyright © 2023 Conservatives for Julie Clark, All rights reserved.

Good morning, Peter! We are excited to share the historic news that California Gov. Gavin Newsom will appoint EMILYs List President Laphonza Butler to fill the seat of the late Sen. Dianne Feinstein.

**As EMILYs List founder Ellen Malcom said,_the governor has made an extraordinary choice_.** Laphonza was the first Black woman and the first mother to lead EMILYs List. She will become the only Black woman serving in the U.S. Senate and the first openly LGBTQ+ person to represent California in the chamber. **And as a champion for labor rights and working people everywhere, we know that she will serve the people of California honorably.**

So please, Peter, can you take a moment to sign our card congratulating Laphonza on her appointment to the U.S. Senate?
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70831319/430450705/-76673814?sourceid=1052083&refcode2=WTENE1007&refcode=20231002_LBCongratsRS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Zjc3NTEzNC02YjYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_WkD46vWBO4xCRJQ20L5FBQ1QmDJQ7q0xxM6cQfQ-o=&emci=2e7090dc-6661-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=7f775134-6b61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)
Thank you,

the EMILYs List team

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I just left the courthouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=0f3963ed4985461b8f86709a50215e8e&_e=_1MpaYNJr3Zy3EM00xylTdzxK7xs8cxFbOHXytrOYwQzvDbwHyrr-D3XoyRfPhDWeevQJhMTzXZwkafJPvThm64I8_tMLoONWUBcX7Or1JkFLFG8FrJnZpbaCwQB3BBs3GJPIx_DLV_rE87gtU_asLuW77YSuIAG1Xv4wJbGvvA09Br1zjjGz_-jnZEaupddO3QrJBQsdIjqMJUXw0juXrIDVVKz7emzUXB300crILjTPr8D57xBtcEBZ0DpbEYfHP-q_xqI4lL1iV2XFRV1bN7QflFi16W_8-FoQ6uT_XgJ5TjmPFwE-5Ck6xaxYMXL4r52zcyWxsiIOeAI4RS4G4T8OY4Q7J-fm5h7pRxC39_CAbsOSl9iIt3VVCYGww_CadqCcCb8iwjYpFFIK0WryXZmytIgvEO49VzSscc3-3JamTaSjzs01p3SsWOvuLKqutT-aN-nBwxwWrSHtqnoeMTSZMBdnzoxZ3BhyWKPfbUMCD5VtGhqLHQQ7I__ENol)
---
| | Patriot,

---
I just left the courthouse for the first day of my unjust trial in New York.
---
The lawsuit was incited by an Attorney General who actively campaigned on a PROMISE to sue me.
---
Or, as she put it in her own kind and gentle words... **_“we’re gonna definitely sue him. We’re gonna be a real pain in the...” (you know what... I’m not going to say it!)_**

---
**_Does that sound like someone who’s going to treat me fairly, honorably, and with no bias at all? I don’t think so!_**

---
Politicians, drunk with power, are weaponizing the legal system to try and completely destroy me – and, ultimately, imprison me for the rest of my life as an innocent man.
---
_And why do they want to stop me so bad?_
---

Team, it’s Raul. I know you’ve had to endure a flooded inbox these last few days, but I just wanted to reach out and say **_thank you!_**

Your support, and the support of hundreds of grassroots supporters across our district (_and the country!_) has made a critical impact in the early days of our re-election campaign.

Whether you stepped up with a donation of $1, $5, or $100 – I can’t thank you enough, nor begin to explain the lasting impact you’ll have on this race.

Folks, this race will only get more challenging from here as we fend off relentless attacks from National Republicans aiming to undo all the progress we’ve made.

But today – and every day – I’m confident that their efforts to defeat our movement will fail. Not because of the partisan lean of our district, or because of any fundraising measure, **_but because of grassroots supporters like you._**

You’ve always had my back, friend, and for that I can’t thank you enough.

Onward!

Fellow American,

**There's a new daddy in town.**

The U.S. military has one job: _to protect American citizens on our own soil._

It’s not just illegal migrants, human trafficking, and fentanyl pouring through our open border anymore. Now, we have armed cartel gunmen directly invading our homeland.

The cartels may be Mexican President Andrés Manuel López Obrador's sugar daddy now, but as President, I will call the President of Mexico in January 2025 to deliver a clear message that we will support you in decimating the cartels. Military force is both legally and morally justified. Time to end the crisis.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
It is important that only American citizens read this | Fellow American,

The United States of America as we know it is on the verge of complete and total destruction if we lose in 2024. We can’t keep doing the same thing - we need bold action.

[**That is why we need your opinion today, Fellow American. We need new, unique data to win in 2024.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=03a751e0bca348d0b065e239c7782a8f&_e=aNpYhWqpHJWFF_1KlDGbFFarEc5C0OwiSGtprAV3Q_1dT0hEdnRe33yzGd6eIdG5WUYw_W3C-yE96BEDXytghuTG5uRdLwLiposVXieB7a-zW5n_-9vM-3WqjY81MV2Vg2jVtuqd1XkG5jU3dVL-nlfzMTpJixqnfekp5EjoG5pstlODjJAlS_Z0EtTpeE9TliFZwRG0h-pNIjVo6Gx0k5ZVf67ez5RSi9gTtdPVVW7EOOivVveCj0AMfoztxuLyz1ww44fnePv16GZUMXka_M7oUdK9WfWcEYfgknOAQvQLV7Bv9ra0zqrNMZP7JXkkk_tZrChSiQcqpjSsJwdSKSvIxeIuQuOFAONrmJ4tJapzIlmNEvL5_lu39pg8GO1bHzu-pYehO3sXdI77bvXxBct9O5mc1GuTgQK3vVDzSB-ICBSNOO2U-hOf07YJ0i3gT7RFm3KBo-t9zjmYrYeOOg%3D%3D)

We’ve been conducting surveys like this for decades, and we have never seen anything like this before.

This survey is not for everyone. If you don’t want the truth, then this isn’t for you, **please don’t take it.** We don’t even care if you donate after this survey, but we hope that you will because you love your country so much.

**We’re only allowing supporters to take this survey if they give their express consent by using one of the secure links below. We can’t win in 2024 without better data, and we can’t win without your input.**

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I want to personally thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
This campaign has what it takes to win. I feel it in my bones.
| | |
---
Friend,
**I wanted to reach out personally to thank you for supporting my campaign through our first end-of-quarter deadline.**
This deadline was the first real test of our campaign. It was our chance to show Rick Scott, Mitch McConnell, the political pundits, and all of the GOP's megadonors the _true_ strength of our grassroots movement. I set an ambitious goal to meet this moment — and I knew that hitting it wouldn't be easy. But because supporters like you stepped up and believed in our campaign, we actually _exceeded_ our goal!
As I look at these numbers, hear from supporters like you, and talk to voters across our state, I've never been more certain: _**2024 will be the year that we flip Florida blue.**_
The enthusiasm and energy on the ground here is simply electric. Floridians are done with the extremism, the partisanship, the hatred, and the lies from Rick Scott. They're ready for real leadership who will fight to protect opportunities, bring communities together, and uplift every single family across our great state. **This campaign has what it takes to win. I feel it in my bones.**
None of this would have been possible without early supporters like you stepping up, chipping in, and believing in a better future, and better leadership, for Florida. So from the bottom of my heart, thank you.

I'll be in touch with more exciting updates about our campaign soon.
With gratitude and love,

Debbie
P.S.: We have a long campaign ahead of us. **[If you're able to, will you make your first donation to invest in our campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70831878/430452206/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk180-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2VhYTMzOWQtNmQ2MS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VFDkLm3_8ltQetfk65uLWzP-AwvIw4zEIxJkPlL4VAw=)** I'm counting on your help to compete with Rick Scott's personal fortune and defend our Senate majority.
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70831879/430452207/-31037693?refcode=jtk180-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2VhYTMzOWQtNmQ2MS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VFDkLm3_8ltQetfk65uLWzP-AwvIw4zEIxJkPlL4VAw=)

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Working Families Party
subject: Join a UAW picket line this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Right now, the United Auto Workers are on a historic strike. The reason why is simple. Despite making record profits of over a quarter of a trillion dollars in the last 10 years, the Big Three automotive companies — GM, Stellantis, and Ford — refuse to pay workers what they’re worth. In fact, while CEO pay is up 40% in four years, workers are making $10 less than they did in 2007 when you adjust for inflation. **United Auto Workers deserve better than this — all workers do.[If you agree, then come support the strike at a picket line near you. Union members are on the picket line 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, and you can make a real impact by joining them — as you are, or with people, pizza, water, snacks, or solidarity.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_S6H3DRwtp4TFDCcRQUVvFe3wtTTYvxCkSRhZEx_iwQVp3AoDKoA3t8BD7eUeKJ8ES1MN5FAmaVwdlYy0fw0OsN3UANgtWAJ9cqpoCZvN5gx5RNKl8_Xa2CWnBO-r0aBQ3h0wiykvieUJjbg0l1xq08tAZJc0OnfySX5KiRnMpn2aWyZBJMjy2EazLbSke6ODVg8I9PZTv_4T74c6qkM5piKZv3VmE1QR7cvotGtUUWTP0UCXaXuNoNEzTusblJl06JgZjsCj0wneW53l0XMfZeq_xVA8yp466v7kt0A_i72E/403/FyCDuGoETuGqzJxmugV3TA/h0/h2NnRV2AvEKKkMMUvGbNHNXlN7J7KHMaUuqN1-ZT0aI)** **[Find a picket line near you](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_S6H3DRwtp4TFDCcRQUVvFe0z3dfmTmmOa0WlfXFBNbByeZhqGT4Exar6H8euoXDIhrKb3mxf48W8qN6QjWlZThU_PpJqgz038psSm3ZMWzSYDCabD5CZOkl4zUS2a5BE8EC5zqXCI9qOqCrhCwdjyCGeHKOiVCu0UwWecW9P5PP2QcE94NDIUI7y9X8H9-_yHj4HnvNY8fbShcz5AkJE8U6B7LxoMEVxPUvg4bWpARSUmC664UFPm8A3a9DoDlnkc0jyEHqj2kkfZU8xHT1zh-d1GKpT_WdyYAHq68PaMO98/403/FyCDuGoETuGqzJxmugV3TA/h1/mwDRwzN_sdtgEle0LOBxBvA8i7qRHTe9XxEIGqDtAss)** No picket lines in your area? **[You can help strengthen the movement by joining or hosting a community canvass at a local Ford, GM, or Stellantis dealership or repair shop. Find a canvass near you or check out the full instructions and resources for how to do host one here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_S6H3DRwtp4TFDCcRQUVvFe3fThU-F3ZcXPQwTBh8fUmpVkxZLerftJppq-EVcI792eVszBRD2swJfSSKW8YKMod2GzGAaFNdRlI5AzajuIUNfAFySOFsZT7g0KqJfm3_s8lSVqDVk1-VTW50Jx07VpnF9nhz_KUahMiqHtr1Pjrz1Notgkx2-lDCmmt3KytWlY0GeMW5EPye86UC7UmK9ODjXzszOEfwWAUq7SKdEybNR2Tgm4L6M--mEYd3gYRRyMYqcmBzN7ri4xrmVolxBO1j8VnPpraWQXWInrvtDtUMcjQFCTHy2N_Uon28XaZeLg/403/FyCDuGoETuGqzJxmugV3TA/h2/Cg_Jjgj2Mt7Vuy8ogQPWLtj3m51YQqCk5x3HItBwDrA)** **[Hold a community canvass](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_S6H3DRwtp4TFDCcRQUVvFe3fThU-F3ZcXPQwTBh8fUmpvsh-8n-afcQ4AJJTWxBMXn2X02NLYmpqUV6399JJwFPiDB4zzop84NmqpoRYUaA6JGrtN6ZzY5QFa0B3-zjO-SxFIiIv0BdyXjwuKKSg-_OLNMl8msX7wyiWcHpj8hyZLXEDckwe2kcIYYuLoTvunnvlsqRYVZuRYjPjb6oqg3am6xlc4vWX7b0KPqhgYAgL500S-1PB-PwG7xAdeb8Z4IPoxAxLMKbmxkCGHVduzCOGCZxwaBWm5MdcJd_JW5jA8mWA5tPVSjLoyA5_goTG4g/403/FyCDuGoETuGqzJxmugV3TA/h3/pbeR3UKgYL_hnpVEGIbucumne5nsHxQK-Az9utVcL1M)** When the Great Recession of 2008 hit the auto industry hard, autoworkers made major sacrifices to help keep these companies afloat, including taking massively reduced pay, eliminated pensions, job cuts, and more. Meanwhile, these corporations were bailed out by the government, receiving billions of taxpayer dollars. **When times were tough, workers were willing to do what it took to keep this industry alive. But when their employers are making money hand over fist while union members are struggling, our movement has to take a stand.** That’s why for the first time in history, the United Auto Workers went on strike against the Big Three automakers all at once. **And they plan to stay strong until they win a fair contract that includes:**
* Fair pay with cost of living adjustments to protect from rising prices,
* An end to substandard wages and benefits for recently hired workers,
* Increased job security for all auto workers, and
* A just transition to electric vehicles, to make sure that the green jobs of the future are good, union jobs.

We’ve seen workers on strike win major victories this year, including Teamsters working for UPS and members of the Writers Guild of America just last week. **But victories like these can only happen with the support of people like you, showing companies that you’re on the side of workers.[Can you join a UAW picket line near you this week to show the Big Three the strength of this movement?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_S6H3DRwtp4TFDCcRQUVvFe3V8_Fv8g4P4Hd8HK76xhqXkVajzKXKfsw_Oxue6cFuVa4YBsm6XEIcaYHCcIzPrFleXcOj7uUAkd3RDDPM7cvg5X0lEs4X3K1gy_IAbbiQrcfMBYDM9-uGPEEXRrtCM5yHCxb1_oWo7bvlFh6_DlrSIg8CeS4Kb7OdG0mzoOhk2AmhUEXs007bYJoD9ysXlCltiEqAYIe8f3QRE5VdhHKgxXxdlN-HJRJ9zyM8nLIVYDJll9_PQkY-gx_SH7Q_8wT8ubjRrkWOuFewGWe_t1gi/403/FyCDuGoETuGqzJxmugV3TA/h4/6ZAY78Gs7Oh9sfmZ3Tia0XG97NS4zu3opfd5crG-dX0)** **[Find a picket line near you](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_S6H3DRwtp4TFDCcRQUVvFe2338D5M6YDN7T0mDhic2nwUWFZ3HD4eRRAiPmfmKXd01HbVcMLRgjTQtBc0c5DGDlfV5_yUkQPyRuCNuBrcvss_PJF-Nc6PV-kLHeHzLHZwm9QAyx0bAFOKJxNdRlgmf2vZXoDmVVDzN_FS7bO2fffHeuLK5L0zdLp6-PhyXIzTvauarEH8RFB0StIliS6db7dYO_h0Qh4BlHhZmgefIWxZHKuWRvcQgTLirIWKNO80qwQLZdNyC1N88Cn_pRZKIH8ZdIXrHHypIS6K68lKE5M/403/FyCDuGoETuGqzJxmugV3TA/h5/0Qb1nZq_NpEqzm8tbUMb7Jb4fMOEtIfzq303qy14oiw)** **[Or, check out instructions and resources for holding a community canvass and leaflet event at your local Big Three dealership or repair **[Hold a community clean_body: | | | Peter, Right now, the United Auto Workers are on a historic strike. The reason why is simple. Despite making record profits of over a quarter of a trillion dollars in the last 10 years, the Big Three automotive companies — GM, Stellantis, and Ford — refuse to pay workers what they’re worth. In fact, while CEO pay is up 40% in four years, workers are making $10 less than they did in 2007 when you adjust for inflation. United Auto Workers deserve better than this — all workers do. No picket lines in your area? When the Great Recession of 2008 hit the auto industry hard, autoworkers made major sacrifices to help keep these companies afloat, including taking massively reduced pay, eliminated pensions, job cuts, and more. Meanwhile, these corporations were bailed out by the government, receiving billions of taxpayer dollars. When times were tough, workers were willing to do what it took to keep this industry alive. But when their employers are making money hand over fist while union members are struggling, our movement has to take a stand. That’s why for the first time in history, the United Auto Workers went on strike against the Big Three automakers all at once. And they plan to stay strong until they win a fair contract that includes: Fair pay with cost of living adjustments to protect from rising prices, An end to substandard wages and benefits for recently hired workers, Increased job security for all auto workers, and A just transition to electric vehicles, to make sure that the green jobs of the future are good, union jobs. We’ve seen workers on strike win major victories this year, including Teamsters working for UPS and members of the Writers Guild of America just last week. But victories like these can only happen with the support of people like you, showing companies that you’re on the side of workers. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: John Padora
subject: Your support means everything to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
I wanted to reach out to thank you from the bottom of my heart for the support you’ve shown this campaign. Whether you came on board when we first launched, in the many months since, or if you’re a brand new supporter – having you on my team means everything to me. We just wrapped up our Q3 fundraising and we will see where we land in total fundraising – but I wanted to say that I couldn’t be more proud of this team and the campaign we’re building together.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=d47c14c350914104a4af5261a415de8b&_e=1C9CFJFAowce6xfXLLFB8knDxgl0OX4HG8Krlp-qNKUnz6fN5FJx11R0AV-DNSzb1euTUmSksP32N2smuo1L7FJsMd5kMtmUxJMcugQH1irzBNg3WAyIoMa5Rt32o8KnTgHA1IF2tDJVs4ytraxSbHGq08N4aS0rT9E7ocHJhgRq-ogn3c9RLcaCazNhZE9centM-EF_DOexDg_YWJpzWw%3D%3D) Folks, I wanted to reach out to thank you from the bottom of my heart for the support you’ve shown this campaign. Whether you came on board when we first launched, in the many months since, or if you’re a brand new supporter – **having you on my team means everything to me.** We just wrapped up our Q3 fundraising and we will see where we land in total fundraising – but I wanted to say that I couldn’t be more proud of this team and the campaign we’re building together. Ken Buck is a tough opponent – he’s been a politician for a long time. But I believe that our community is ready for someone who will fight for them for a change. **That’s exactly what I plan to do.** Our work is just beginning, and it’s imperative that we begin the final fundraising quarter of 2023 on a strong note. **[So before you go, I wanted to ask if you could pitch in a quick donation to get us started strong in October.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=d47c14c350914104a4af5261a415de8b&_e=1C9CFJFAowce6xfXLLFB8kvJdo34NJ-ZDhPy9VtITL5UxAenbt2i9tWZzW1StmFdCZOzIEaTO-12dqWxQHTu3ke2gGgfYSo8nqWcn_h6_VvNno8TN8N4FfqO_0zyJvlAFK0iyKwUpER6gDu4bij1vneP07hszhB_wh_KxgJgvtfZp3_sdOMgMgcREGSPj8md9WvV5oxaaFR2LjEHlbS3P3a0M-4SLQ6V15LAR46bAJ0ZDuBJ8OwR1Rf62VhtwgXRxKmxKt1Uxr5YA5l1WoxtvzM6pNDtM4Ao8RHS45Db6BJBAemTX_zCWSRu1Hy_cY6h_n7uxvxqMbv9GHEu_KQxblf3OXbrb2ZgzG2AJvXlwY4bWSWMi1JMzj9C6gh1CdHbT2qtn0c_k7pR9O9zLQDTxg%3D%3D)** Thank you so much for everything. I’m looking forward to the future. – John Paid for by Padora for Colorado

clean_body: I wanted to reach out to thank you from the bottom of my heart for the support you’ve shown this campaign. Whether you came on board when we first launched, in the many months since, or if you’re a brand new supporter – having you on my team means everything to me. We just wrapped up our Q3 fundraising and we will see where we land in total fundraising – but I wanted to say that I couldn’t be more proud of this team and the campaign we’re building together. | | | Folks, I wanted to reach out to thank you from the bottom of my heart for the support you’ve shown this campaign. Whether you came on board when we first launched, in the many months since, or if you’re a brand new supporter – having you on my team means everything to me. We just wrapped up our Q3 fundraising and we will see where we land in total fundraising – but I wanted to say that I couldn’t be more proud of this team and the campaign we’re building together. Ken Buck is a tough opponent – he’s been a politician for a long time. But I believe that our community is ready for someone who will fight for them for a change. That’s exactly what I plan to do. Our work is just beginning, and it’s imperative that we begin the final fundraising quarter of 2023 on a strong note. Thank you so much for everything. I’m looking forward to the future. – John Paid for by Padora for Colorado
