body:
I mean it. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70832456/430453708/1420976906?refcode=ea.cca4ceaf-6f61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cca4ceaf-6f61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2E0Y2VhZi02ZjYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=INUuy2pyLBvJMWZYS4SRm3C-MgZTpclvD_u3hypY9Yg=&emci=bf7f174b-3861-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=cca4ceaf-6f61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)
---
Hey, team. I want to take this moment to just say thank you. Thank you for standing by me during such a crucial campaign milestone. Overcoming our first FEC deadline of the campaign was no small feat, but thanks to all of the grassroots supporters who came together and chipped into our campaign, you proved that we are building an unstoppable people-powered movement. Look, our journey to the 2024 election will be challenging. This was only the first of many campaign hurdles to overcome. But if we stick together, it will all be worth it when we flip this district blue and take back the House for Democrats. I’ll be honest — we don't have a choice. This is a MUST-WIN seat if we want to put an end to the dysfunction happening in Washington. Speaker Kevin McCarthy and the House GOP (including my opponent, Anthony D’Esposito) launched a bogus impeachment to distract the American people, and their complete inability to govern almost plunged us into a full government shutdown. **They're more interested in siding with the MAGA movement than the American people.** If we want our democracy, our freedoms, and our shared American values to withstand, we have to take the House back. It’s that simple. **So, team, I need to know you're truly committed to this fight for the soul of our nation. I want to hear your voice loud and clear. Are you all in to help me flip the House blue in 2024?** | _[YES, I'M IN!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70832457/430453709/1490742628?refcode=ea.cca4ceaf-6f61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cca4ceaf-6f61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2E0Y2VhZi02ZjYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=INUuy2pyLBvJMWZYS4SRm3C-MgZTpclvD_u3hypY9Yg=)_

_[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70832458/430453710/1490742628?refcode=ea.cca4ceaf-6f61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cca4ceaf-6f61-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2E0Y2VhZi02ZjYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=INUuy2pyLBvJMWZYS4SRm3C-MgZTpclvD_u3hypY9Yg=)_

Thanks again for your support.
Onward,
Kevin Thomas

clean_body: I mean it. | Hey, team. I want to take this moment to just say thank you. Thank you for standing by me during such a crucial campaign milestone. Overcoming our first FEC deadline of the campaign was no small feat, but thanks to all of the grassroots supporters who came together and chipped into our campaign, you proved that we are building an unstoppable people-powered movement. Look, our journey to the 2024 election will be challenging. This was only the first of many campaign hurdles to overcome. But if we stick together, it will all be worth it when we flip this district blue and take back the House for Democrats. I’ll be honest — we don't have a choice. This is a MUST-WIN seat if we want to put an end to the dysfunction happening in Washington. Speaker Kevin McCarthy and the House GOP (including my opponent, Anthony D’Esposito) launched a bogus impeachment to distract the American people, and their complete inability to govern almost plunged us into a full government shutdown. They're more interested in siding with the MAGA movement than the American people. If we want our democracy, our freedoms, and our shared American values to withstand, we have to take the House back. It’s that simple. So, team, I need to know you're truly committed to this fight for the soul of our nation. I want to hear your voice loud and clear. Are you all in to help me flip the House blue in 2024? | = = Thanks again for your support. Onward, Kevin Thomas = | Kevin Thomas is running to flip New York’s 4th Congressional District blue. name: Derek Tran
subject: I’m running for Congress in the most competitive House seat — and we can win. But I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
They won’t be eager to let me win, so I need your support.
| Friend, my name is Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, a father, and a Consumer Rights attorney – **and I just launched my campaign for Congress in California’s 45th district, one of the most competitive districts in the country.** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53910?t=6&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8) [**I’ve focused my entire career on fighting for workers and their families, and now I’m ready to take the fight all the way to Washington, D.C. Taking back Congress from big corporations and their hand-picked politicians will take all of us – will you stand with me by chipping in $10 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project now to become a Founding Donor? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53910?t=7&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8) | [$25,000 LAUNCH DAY GOAL: CHIP IN $10 NOW TO BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53910?t=8&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8)
---
I was raised to understand the value of hard work and the importance of community.

My parents put _everything_ on the line to immigrate to the United States for a shot at the American dream – and because of their perseverance, and with community support, they were able to open a small business and raise our family.

I joined the military to carry on that legacy. And, after finishing law school, I became an employment discrimination attorney to continue fighting for working families just like mine.

**Now, I’m running for Congress to stand against big corporations who think they can get away with exploiting our communities without consequences.**

_It’s time to get dark money out of politics, protect workers’ rights, and make our economy work for everyday Americans again._

Corporations like the ones I’ve fought against my entire career have an iron grip on Congress – __and they won’t be eager to let me win.__

[**This district will be a battleground that could entirely determine control of Congress. I’m running to put power where it belongs:**in the hands of the people.** But I’ll only succeed with enough early grassroots support to counter whatever big business throws our way – so will you stand with me by chipping in $10 today and become a Founding Donor of my campaign? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53910?t=9&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Derek Tran and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53915?t=10&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53916?t=11&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53913?t=12&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53914?t=13&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53910?t=14&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8)
Together, we’ll make sure working families finally have a strong voice in Congress,

Derek Tran
Derek Tran was a member of the United States Army Reserve. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=10840%2E878179%2Eke0jR8)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Can you spot the differences in these headlines?
body:
Headlines and the words behind them tell a story of their own.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1659%2E120351%2EBDsb3t)
Peter,
The New York Times has become so ubiquitous in our media landscape, that it’s often called the “newspaper of record.”
Despite this, the Times' headlines often miss the mark and fail to tell the whole story.
**So, what happens when news organizations like The New York Times fall short in their headlines? Take a look for yourself: ⬇️**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20231002?refcode=em20231002&amount=&refcode2=1659_120351_BDsb3t&akid=1659%2E120351%2EBDsb3t)
**The result:** The Times and other news organizations often write headlines that sand down the sharp edges of the GOP’s extremism and fail to provide the essential context needed to understand a story.
**Unlike the Times and other mainstream outlets, at Courier, we’re committed to writing headlines and stories that _not only_ tell the full story but won’t whitewash the GOP’s extremism. Take a look at the difference, Peter.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20231002?refcode=em20231002&amount=&refcode2=1659_120351_BDsb3t&akid=1659%2E120351%2EBDsb3t)
[**If you're ready to support honest, good journalism that won't water down the truth, can you chip in $5 today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20231002?refcode=em20231002&amount=5&refcode2=1659_120351_BDsb3t&akid=1659%2E120351%2EBDsb3t)
The Times' timid approach to its headlines spreads far beyond its readership because many other news organizations follow its lead and mimic this misguided approach. It’s this same method that provides an opening to right-wing bad actors and others by allowing them to propagate and spread misinformation.
Our growing network of nine newsrooms nationwide offers an alternative to the mainstream media’s overly sensationalized headlines and profit-driven intent. And we will never compromise our values to make a quick buck. As a result, we rely on grassroots supporters like you to power the reporting that comes from our newsrooms. [**If you're able to, can you pitch in anything you can today to support our values-driven reporting?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20231002?refcode=em20231002&amount=5&refcode2=1659_120351_BDsb3t&akid=1659%2E120351%2EBDsb3t)
**[Donate now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20231002?refcode=em20231002&amount=&refcode2=1659_120351_BDsb3t&akid=1659%2E120351%2EBDsb3t)**
Together,
Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1659&t=2&refcode2=1659_120351_BDsb3t&akid=1659%2E120351%2EBDsb3t)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1659%2E120351%2EBDsb3t)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

**In 2022,** Michigan voters overwhelmingly passed a sweeping ballot initiative,_Promote the Vote_ , that:
* Boosts the number of ballot dropboxes,
* Expands elections to nine days of early, in-person voting,
* Requires state-funded postage for absentee ballots and absentee ballot applications

**But now,** anti-democracy Republicans in the state are trying to undermine voters by pushing a lawsuit to OVERTURN this initiative – despite the fact that it passed with 60 percent of the vote!
**Yet again, the GOP is showing us they have no interest in expanding voting rights -- they’re only interested in suppressing them.**
[**We’re putting together a petition to denounce this anti-democratic lawsuit, and we need 5,000 grassroots signatures today. Can you add your name now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70833197/430456240/1105399099?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWY4OWFhOS03MjYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZbOluMPiiqWBleUWrqLpp7rbUF3O-HQWT7u437m_CtI=&emci=dff89aa9-7261-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=e1f89aa9-7261-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=26828920)

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: A different kind of ask
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Let us explain.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=819%2E552475%2EAfeNAA)
Peter, we're just over 13 months from Election Day, and your support now makes all the difference:
The #1 way to support our campaign to defend Pennsylvania’s Senate seat is by **[starting a small, recurring monthly donation of even just $3.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231002-1?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=em20231002-1&refcode2=819_552475_AfeNAA&akid=819%2E552475%2EAfeNAA)**
**[Yes, I'll chip in monthly ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231002-1?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=em20231002-1&refcode2=819_552475_AfeNAA&akid=819%2E552475%2EAfeNAA)**
Let us explain, and we apologize if this gets a little nerdy:
Our campaign to re-elect Bob Casey runs on a budget. Unlike one-time donations, **monthly donations ensure we have support month after month** , and that allows us to plan how we will make investments in turning out voters well in advance.
Therefore, monthly donations will make a big impact on how much we are able to organize, advertise, and get around to talk with voters across Pennsylvania — and ultimately give us the support we’ll need to defend this seat and the Senate from the GOP.
The stakes couldn’t be higher in Pennsylvania — and today, you can help ensure we win this competitive Senate battleground race by starting a recurring contribution.
**[Will you start a monthly contribution to our campaign to re-elect Bob Casey? Even a few dollars each month will help build a powerful campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231002-1?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=em20231002-1&refcode2=819_552475_AfeNAA&akid=819%2E552475%2EAfeNAA)**
**[Yes, I'll chip in monthly ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231002-1?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=em20231002-1&refcode2=819_552475_AfeNAA&akid=819%2E552475%2EAfeNAA)**
**[Not today, but I’ll make a one-time donation ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231002-1?refcode=em20231002-1&refcode2=819_552475_AfeNAA&akid=819%2E552475%2EAfeNAA)**
Thank you,
Team Casey

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=819%2E552475%2EAfeNAA)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=819%2E552475%2EAfeNAA)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

clean_body: Becoming a weekly donor is the best way you can help support Andy's campaign We have just over one month until Election Day, Peter! The clock is ticking down, and this race could still go either way. We know it will be close between Andy and his opponent until the very end, so we can't let our foot off the gas until the last ballot is counted. = = = Becoming a weekly donor is the best way you can help support Andy's campaign in this final stretch. Knowing that we can count on your continued support – no matter how big or small – helps us plan our budget in these final weeks and ensure we're ready for anything that comes our way. Andy's opponent and the six super PACs supporting him are pouring millions into Kentucky, and we know they won't slow down. The only way we can keep up and win this tough race is with the help of this grassroots team. = = = Thanks, Team Beshear | | P.S. Can't become a recurring donor right now? That's okay! Your one-time donation will help protect Kentucky's progress! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1267%2E35263%2EvktkwA)
Hi Peter, Tammy Baldwin here! This morning, my team reached out to let me know that we didn’t just catch up to our end-of-quarter goal over the weekend, but we _exceeded_ it. **That’s big news, and it’s all thanks to you.** So today, I wanted to reach out and personally thank you for your ongoing support of my reelection campaign. Early donations from grassroots supporters like you make all the difference for our team — helping us reach voters early on, run digital ads, hire more campaign staff, and so much more. As you may know, we have a lot of work in front of us to protect this seat and the Democratic Senate majority. Republicans have made it clear they’ll spend whatever it takes to defeat me and flip one of the seats they need to win back Senate control — meaning this could be my most expensive election yet. But, Peter, as long as I have grassroots supporters like you in my corner, I am confident that we can win this race and continue to deliver the progress our working families are counting on. So from the bottom of my heart, thanks again for your support. I’m so grateful to have you on the team. — Tammy | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-oct23.ejjIam&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20231002_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1267%2E35263%2EvktkwA)

body:
Peter,
This weekend, we had our most important quarterly fundraising deadline yet – and we hit our goal and then some! I want to say a big thank you for all the support you gave us. THANK YOU!
Our campaign has never been about me. It’s always been about all of us fighting for immigrants, women, our LGBTQ+ family, our unions, and working families. Like we’ve done so many times before when we all come together, we can fight back against the hate, the big corporate donors, the threats to our democracy, and even the threats to our environment. We beat them before, and we’ll do it again.

I have been so humbled to see so many friends and so many new friends join our campaign. If we stick together, support each other, and wake up every day with that sí se puede energy, we can make it to Congress.

Thank you!
Raquel

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_100223_thankyou]

Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.
For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today!

Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States
Paid for by Terán for Congress
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/quHjdOlmTESlm5aDEC5Smg2?unsubscribedata=4FWGJT3%2B002nd5l9dptbtIKepNzfxmZUkmYJCSBYPBDFhC%2FIutMu3y3aH0OnwYYdWFkCpk%2FCwiY5II%2B8NUpgxJg81yOH6d9bY8jrNIGNbDvAvPk8FWpJmdxDzYAvn%2BZYA5Z8E9c9LtvTikaKdjZmNBfT%2FjV1y1sMB9dswGeQopDzWH90uoUBazl5UsD2tJg6eSOX5ZF4uO2a5oNn6FQGYUcZBx9OmCqKFPEBLxzbt3oihJgNO0UXbpJGux4Vi6eNlNI%2FOSPhf1%2FngkgfaSuAJ5MrgajWLzqe%2F1LIpKbC8PBD8MyofOQeaEVTUbsAKgG8AvlsTwyrrwHYb9yGwiH2k51Fj35jtuIR8s5P1UU3MPjO2fNGcAxIadu%2BuI%2BROw%2FS9Se4pI72myKMzqGPnCG%2BsT8V7tbIz9eAJkW6RFbPGzt5aeQRDQ0a0y6slR6mNCes .

name: LCV Rapid Response
subject: DEVELOPING... MAGA extremists to push devastating environmental cuts after shutdown averted for now
body:
__TIME SENSITIVE |
---

|
**DEVELOPING ...** you've seen the news -- in a last-minute deal to avert a shutdown, Congress agreed to keep the government open for another 45 days.

Extreme MAGA lawmakers tried to reverse the affordable clean energy plan we passed last year.
They tried to cut the EPA's budget by an unbelievable 39%.
To slash billions of dollars for the Greenhouse Gas Reduction Fund.
To mandate a massive expansion of oil and gas leases.
To zero out funding for environmental justice.

**They 've just revealed that they will attempt over the next 45 days to get each and every one of these priorities into the final deal, even if it means removing their own House leadership.** What happens now will depend on us, Peter.

Blocking this pro-polluter agenda now is going to be like running back-to-back marathons, but the truth is, if the environmental movement lets up now, EVERYTHING will fall apart in the next 45 days.

We just received permission to extend our triple match through the end of October. **Please, Peter -- we haven't heard from you yet:**

[The best thing you can do right now is renew your LCV membership to power our campaigns. Even $5 will have a huge impact. A group of donors is triple matching every gift through the end of the month -- that means whatever you give today will be TRIPLED.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdw~)

Peter -- I really hope you'll take this opportunity to triple your impact -- because as urgent as these budget negotiations are, it's not the only environmental fight we're up against. There are so many reasons to pitch in -- because there are so many ways your support will make a difference. Here are just a few:
1. **Because the Biden administration released a final plan for offshore drilling** and is considering additional protections for public lands and waters. Fossil fuel extraction on public lands generates _a quarter_ of U.S. greenhouse gas emissions. [This could be HUGE, but only if the environmental movement shows up >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdw~)
2. **Because Republicans are threatening our voting rights** -- and the newly-reintroduced John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act could be the most significant federal voting reform bill since the Voting Rights Act. The ONLY way this passes Congress is with a major grassroots push. [Your support defends the freedom to vote. Donate today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdw~)
3. **Because LCV is pressuring the Biden administration to finalize the strongest possible fuel efficiency standards** for clean cars in order to protect our communities from pollution and drive the clean energy transition. [Your support makes that happen. Donate today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdw~)
4. **Because a group of donors is triple-matching every contribution this month.** Bottom line, your contribution goes further to win environmental campaigns that matter if you give now. [Renew your LCV membership for $5 and triple your impact today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdw~)

We need to go all out right now -- to win each and every one of these fights. But it's only going to happen if the environmental movement shows up during the moments that matter most.

**Thank you, thank you, thank you for everything that you do for the environment, Peter.**

Onward,

Alex, Annie, Shae, and Norita
LCV Rapid Response Team ____ |

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10039728&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDA1Mjk5NgS2&spReportId=MTg0MDA1Mjk5NgS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10039728&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDA1Mjk5NgS2&spReportId=MTg0MDA1Mjk5NgS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/vNR6fe-) |

body:
Our strategy from here on out:

Peter, we just got out of an important all-staff meeting where we discussed the results of our latest research. As one of Shawn’s top supporters, you deserve to know exactly what we talked about. **This is an email intended for you specifically, Peter, so please don’t forward it.** **Here are the toplines you need to know:**
* Early voting started this weekend! Democrat Shawn Wilson is on the ballot – along with a long list of Republicans vying to be the next governor. Shawn and Jeff Landry (a MAGA extremist Republican with the backing of Donald Trump) are likely going to be the top two candidates, meaning they’ll head to a runoff on Nov. 18th.
* Our research indicates that when voters learn more about Shawn and Jeff, the polls will show them in a dead heat.
* We can win this race, but it comes down to having the resources we need to get Shawn's story and Landry’s horrible record out in front of voters.

Once we come out of the primary, we'll need to be ready to hit the ground running before the runoff. subject: SURVEY: Is Joe Biden too old to run for a second term?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
Alarm bells are ringing! A recent CBS News Poll has unveiled a startling reality: | | | | |
---
_The very fabric of our democracy is at risk in the 2024 elections. Democrats must unite with unparalleled energy to prevent Donald Trump from reclaiming office in 2024. But if our call to action is not for you,_[_click here to unsubscribe immediately_](https://weloveyoujoe.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=848bb045aea47ef3366ff1c66&id=c3e7b65f9e&e=9a598fbc14&c=5cb4b15aba) _._
Peter: Alarm bells are ringing! A recent CBS News Poll has unveiled a startling reality: If the elections were held today, Donald Trump would narrowly edge out Joe Biden, 50-49.
Can you fathom the implications?
A return of Donald Trump to the White House, leading our nation from January 2025 to January 2029.
The urgency of now is palpable. Your voice isn't just needed; it's essential. We implore you: Act swiftly and share your invaluable insight before it's too late.
**Is Joe Biden too old to run for a second term?**
| [Yes](https://weloveyoujoe.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=848bb045aea47ef3366ff1c66&id=b4c9707b90&e=9a598fbc14)
---
| [No](https://weloveyoujoe.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=848bb045aea47ef3366ff1c66&id=913ae053f0&e=9a598fbc14)
---
We stand at a precipice, with time slipping like sand between our fingers. America cries out, yearning for clarity, direction, hope. Your voice isn't just wanted; it's desperately needed now more than ever.
Thank you for being a passionate Democrat.
-WeLoveYouJoe.com

[**P.S. We hope you’ll join us in defeating Trump in 2024, but if you’d prefer not to hear from us, click here to unsubscribe.**](https://weloveyoujoe.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=848bb045aea47ef3366ff1c66&id=c3e7b65f9e&e=9a598fbc14&c=5cb4b15aba)

Hi there,

I want to take a quick moment to say thank you. Thanks to your support in the last days, weeks, and months -- we met our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.

Now, we are that much closer to flipping AZ-01 blue and giving this district the leadership it deserves.

I am also so proud of our House Democrats, who were the adults in the room on Saturday and helped prevent a disastrous government shutdown. **Republicans like our far-right opponent David Schweikert did nothing but fan the flames of extremism at the expense of hardworking Arizonans.**

So as we look ahead to the last months before 2024, I hope you will continue to support our grassroots efforts. **This is a top-targeted seat for control of the House majority, and if the GOP showed us anything this weekend, it is that they are unable to lead our country.**

With thanks,

Marlene

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Did you know this was the hottest summer on record?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=30804%2E3422442%2E9rIhGe)
Our planet just experienced the hottest summer on record, and still, Republicans are siding with their donors over at Big Oil and refusing to take action.
**Standing up to this BS and protecting our planet will be one of Katie’s top priorities in the U.S. Senate** —that’s why she refuses campaign contributions from Big Oil CEOs, corporate PACs, and federal lobbyists.
She’s fighting to:
* Pass the Green New Deal.
* Adequately fund the Environmental Protection Agency.
* Create a National Disaster Safety Board to improve preparedness for natural disasters.
* Support climate legislation that doesn’t leave any community behind.

[**Derek, c an you add your name in support of Katie’s fight to protect our planet?**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-protect-our-planet/?source=EMAM02_1_CLI_20231002_V1_F&akid=30804%2E3422442%2E9rIhGe)
[Add your name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-protect-our-planet/?source=EMAM02_1_CLI_20231002_V1_F&akid=30804%2E3422442%2E9rIhGe)
Extreme heat costs our economy $100 billion per year. Climate change-related natural disasters have already cost us trillions in taxpayer dollars. And extreme weather events take and upend lives. Congress must take further action.
[Add your name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-protect-our-planet/?source=EMAM02_1_CLI_20231002_V1_F&akid=30804%2E3422442%2E9rIhGe)
Thanks for reading,
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM02_1_CLI_20231002_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=30804_3422442_9rIhGe&akid=30804%2E3422442%2E9rIhGe)**

body:
Pajama Day

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d525e69a733a4bc0ab7d428d08961033&_e=GykCRlD_fYOUG5oKx5UfTrUGsPwuC7x6sqFk-4vF_m2f4xq3XZCnEGCtvjSvHQNPQnYoO2bpChSp57_MX36RsRDNAv_SVwCs5kCAgTsCnKukvMeZOFjf6mpdGMPtU0OzZj6mfZvXAK6e77r22NTFKn6uJQS-B0mlEUO1yFkgbQWfd4Nzgj3mmVObXfE5qnBKYFb0udf3yX-S96mnKbD7722aHoIoNIpbSplSRRv22NESGwySFUdLYNSaG9RwGMn45YFMPam1qe6nYl2Pxv_u5HARt2qdEwCjlD9HAnUsEvOWqqx138yjwfLxfmBq1pyDg474kRRj5y2UpxAJz3RmJQHHAqFMM8WnbngcqofeKVPA6vrZW6yQugbXH7NQv4ks)
---
Folks,

**I 'm all for comfort. **

I love a comfy pair of gym shorts to watch my Saints on Sunday.

Or a T-shirt in the summer when I'm mowing the lawn.

But here's the thing: both of those instances are in the privacy of my home. _**Not on the floor of The United States Senate.**_
Now, maybe newcomers do not have a proper understanding of what we do here. Or perhaps they don't really take it seriously.

My stance remains the same: getting rid of a dress code on the Senate floor disrespects where we serve and the American families we represent.

Knock yourself out in gym shorts, hoodies, and t-shirts anywhere else. But here, you have to take things seriously.

**[Help me restore Common Sense& Courtesy, Friend.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d525e69a733a4bc0ab7d428d08961033&_e=GykCRlD_fYOUG5oKx5UfTrUGsPwuC7x6sqFk-4vF_m2f4xq3XZCnEGCtvjSvHQNPQnYoO2bpChSp57_MX36RsRDNAv_SVwCs5kCAgTsCnKukvMeZOFjf6mpdGMPtU0OzZj6mfZvXAK6e77r22NTFKn6uJQS-B0mlEUO1yFkgbQWfd4Nzgj3mmVObXfE5qnBK2fEHBFXu6YXkaCGDdCMwZiOvzIO0DIiBOwtFawKljgLIlUZjDRYUSeXngXrKJQUjsx0C2FnjUkXjKQrMnG50qP6tDl-BP-zEiurGwZxYCHMtDgQDzwhbR8ix1ca4uO1bY0l3sj_96Z5JUJjDKdtuvRiH9xH21BuiTe2Cw7oF1w0%3D)**

clean_body: Pajama Day | Folks, I 'm all for comfort. I love a comfy pair of gym shorts to watch my Saints on Sunday. Or a T-shirt in the summer when I'm mowing the lawn. But here's the thing: both of those instances are in the privacy of my home. Not on the floor of The United States Senate. Now, maybe newcomers do not have a proper understanding of what we do here. Or perhaps they don't really take it seriously. My stance remains the same: getting rid of a dress code on the Senate floor disrespects where we serve and the American families we represent. Knock yourself out in gym shorts, hoodies, and t-shirts anywhere else. But here, you have to take things seriously. | Thank you, Senator John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?**

| | Friend, Team Kelly was all over New Hampshire last week! We started off the week by releasing endorsements from all three Coos County Commissioners! They know that Kelly will fight for the North Country and work with them to tackle the issues facing the region. If you'd like to support Kelly by joining our endorsement list please [sign up here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/0aOhNqciw/c?w=J0w6bJVncHKxKaXJa-3_ldhvS5ZwKgBfBc0XJUUcXZM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9rZWxseWZvcm5oLmNvbS9hY3Rpb24tY2VudGVyLyIsInIiOiJmYzcwYzFjOS0xY2M3LTQ4M2EtOWYwNi1iYjY0ODdmZjEyM2IiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyYjA4ZTcwMy1hNjI3LTQ2ZjMtYmU4YS01ZDU2NTQ0MjYyMDIifQ). Last week, Kelly joined Republicans in Manchester to support Jay Ruais for Mayor and conservatives running for office across the city. In September, Kelly was endorsed by every Republican State Representative from Manchester, along with Alderman-at-Large Joe Kelly Levasseur. Kelly made a trip up to the NASWA Resort in Laconia to pay a visit to Hope and Cynthis Makris, stopped by the grand re-opening of the Granite State Gun Shop in Hudson, attended the Veterans Count Annual Red White and Brew event in Laconia, and walked around the Deerfield Fair. Kelly finished the week by running in the 17th Annual Footrace for the Fallen with the Hillsborough County Sheriff's Dept. Team. Keep up with all of our campaign updates on our [Facebook](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/0aOhNqciw/c?w=pQY5IWCQa9XaUVy_ppIPbG8Axn22oy7ZOGVETzs6vQw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0tlbGx5QXlvdHRlRm9yTkgiLCJyIjoiZmM3MGMxYzktMWNjNy00ODNhLTlmMDYtYmI2NDg3ZmYxMjNiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0) page. Best, Team Kelly
---
| | |
---
| | News Highlights
---
| |
---
| | “I am proud to have the support of the Coos County Commissioners. They know that as Governor, I will fight for the North Country and work with them to tackle the issues facing the region, including job creation, housing, the opioid epidemic, and the growing crisis at our northern border. Together, we will keep New Hampshire safe, prosperous and free.” [Read the full article from the Manchester Ink Link here.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/0aOhNqciw/c?w=8xacx4eEUiuW7T-UMogyWznFgNnlinoLaJxyd0H3W-s.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5jaGVzdGVyaW5rbGluay5jb20vYXlvdHRlLWVuZG9yc2VkLWJ5LWNoYWlybWFuLXRvbS1icmFkeS8iLCJyIjoiOTA4Mzc2NTQtNTk5Mi00ZWU3LWJlNjctM2JjNjBhMjVhNTcyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0)
---
| |
---
| | On Thursday Kelly joined Lawrence Jones live from the Copper Door in Bedford for an interview on Fox and Friends to discuss the Joe Biden Economy and our Northern Border. [Watch Kelly's full Fox and Friends Interview here.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/0aOhNqciw/c?w=35GoKeah61uPQaws12RqNpzdlbkiW4OQl-o6Gwl8vjI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vdmlkZW8vNjMzODAxMDAwNTExMiIsInIiOiIzZGRiNjE1YS04NDBkLTQzZGMtYWJlNi0wZWEyNTMwNGVkNjMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyYjA4ZTcwMy1hNjI3LTQ2ZjMtYmU4YS01ZDU2NTQ0MjYyMDIifQ)
---
| | |
---
| | Letter to the Editor Highlight
---
| |
---
| | "Our next NH governor needs to take a strong stand to stop the increasing flow of fentanyl into our state. Kelly has already proven her effectiveness by supporting law enforcement as NH Attorney General. Regarding sanctuary cities, we are now seeing that every state is affected by Biden’s failed open border policies. Kelly’s position is clear on this: “NH is not a sanctuary state.” In NH and around the country Democrats ask for more taxes but here in NH Kelly will support our state’s commitment to no income tax. Kelly has the smarts, strength, and experience to lead our state. Support Kelly Ayotte on state primary day." [Read the full letter to the editor in the Seacoast Online here.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/0aOhNqciw/c?w=rLkiqplATqASXueMOySI2XiHH5iiwU9IbS6JHpA8jMY.)

name: George Whitesides
subject: A personal thank you.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70834529/430460060/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmNlZTkwNi03ODYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8V5P96olzTDDst9Fs-WJto2VPU7p0dNpNd2rmo7CJo=)
Peter,

I want to personally thank you for your support of our campaign to flip CA-27 blue and oust GOP Rep. Mike Garcia from office. **Thanks to your support in the past few weeks and months, my finance team tells me we met our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.**

When we launched this campaign just several months ago, I could never have imagined the breadth of support we’d received from people in the Santa Clarita and Antelope Valleys -- as well as nationwide.

Thanks to your support, our campaign is in a great position for these last critical months before the election year. **In a toss-up race like ours, every dollar and every supporter makes a real difference.**

We are hitting the campaign trail hard in CA-27 to spread the word about our grassroots movement. I hope you will continue to follow our progress as we gear up to challenge Mike Garcia and give CA-27 the representation it deserves.

Thank you,

George

name: Team Emerge
subject: We need to hear from you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
Will you take our survey?
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70834573/430460208/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1321-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiMDY1OTE4LTc4NjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=awa9_unhp1JVhiJ2y3NQ9XSqV4jXrl5-fNj0TkhHHjY=&emci=3600ae91-f35e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=7b065918-7861-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)
---
We need your input, Peter.
Now that we are in the home stretch of the November elections, we are one step closer to this year's fight to transform politics – and we need your help.

Here at Emerge, 2022 was _huge_ : Our alums had a 71 percent win rate in elections nationwide, and 97 percent of incumbents who ran for reelection won. In the spring 2023 primaries, Emerge women achieved a stunning 91 percent win rate. And what's more, we have 200+ Emerge alums nationally on the ballot this fall! Our winning strategy is working!

But the work continues in 2023: We're taking every opportunity to empower Democratic women who will fight for our communities at every level.
**That’s why we’re asking our top supporters to take the Emerge Community Survey today. ****Right now, we’re still 51 responses short of our goal, and we’re counting on your feedback before our survey closes at midnight. Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. name: Greg Casar
subject: What. A. Mess.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter, the federal government is open...thanks to Democrats.
After weeks of games from Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans, we were able to avoid a costly and unnecessary government shutdown.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70834735/430460848/1011784208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjk0MzhkNS03ODYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00OERHLcyNOvDPkcUiKBVkIT_Wsw1wR4PvaTGRDB35E=)
McCarthy and his far-right caucus tried to hold the government hostage, demanding MASSIVE cuts to essential programs and extreme anti-immigrant measures in exchange for doing their jobs.
But Democrats stood firm. We rejected their games and forced McCarthy to cave. And thanks to Democrats, the government stayed open, public workers and service members will continue to be paid, and none of the extreme Republican demands were enacted.
But this fight isn’t over. Congress will be forced to deal with another funding deadline in 45 days—so it’s critical we have the support of the American people heading into this fight.
[**Can you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to support Team Casar as we push back against Republican extremism and fight for progressive change in Congress? Your support helps us stand our ground against Kevin McCarthy and the extreme House Republican conference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70834736/430460849/1011784208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjk0MzhkNS03ODYxLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00OERHLcyNOvDPkcUiKBVkIT_Wsw1wR4PvaTGRDB35E=)

name: Derek Tran
subject: I’m running for Congress in the most competitive House seat — and we can win. But I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
They won’t be eager to let me win, so I need your support.

| Peter, my name is Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, a father, and a Consumer Rights attorney – **and I just launched my campaign for Congress in California’s 45th district, one of the most competitive districts in the country.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70834834/430461153/-1931736823?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20231002_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1YjNmNjgxLTc5NjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q-4yDTGk9Rq5bNuuIlfqu9dYa33Ploc8vbjkHzM2JNo=) [**I’ve focused my entire career on fighting for workers and their families, and now I’m ready to take the fight all the way to Washington, D.C. Taking back Congress from big corporations and their hand-picked politicians will take all of us – will you stand with me by splitting $10 with my campaign and Upset the Setup now to become a Founding Donor »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70834835/430461154/-1931736823?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20231002_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1YjNmNjgxLTc5NjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q-4yDTGk9Rq5bNuuIlfqu9dYa33Ploc8vbjkHzM2JNo=) | ****[$25,000 LAUNCH DAY GOAL: CHIP IN $10 NOW TO BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70834836/430461155/-1931736823?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20231002_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1YjNmNjgxLTc5NjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q-4yDTGk9Rq5bNuuIlfqu9dYa33Ploc8vbjkHzM2JNo=)****

Peter, I was raised to understand the value of hard work and the importance of community.

My parents put _everything_ on the line to immigrate to the United States for a shot at the American dream – and because of their perseverance, and with community support, they were able to open a small business and raise our family.

I joined the military to carry on that legacy. And, after finishing law school, I became an employment discrimination attorney to continue fighting for working families just like mine.

**Now, I’m running for Congress to stand against big corporations who think they can get away with exploiting our communities without consequences.**

_It’s time to get dark money out of politics, protect workers’ rights, and make our economy work for everyday Americans again._

Corporations like the ones I’ve fought against my entire career have an iron grip on Congress – _and they won’t be eager to let me win._

[**This district will be a battleground that could entirely determine control of Congress. I’m running to put power where it belongs:_in the hands of the people._ But I’ll only succeed with enough early grassroots support to counter whatever big business throws our way – so will you stand with me by splitting $10 with my campaign and Upset the Setup today and become a Founding Donor? »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70834837/430461156/-1931736823?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20231002_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1YjNmNjgxLTc5NjEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q-4yDTGk9Rq5bNuuIlfqu9dYa33Ploc8vbjkHzM2JNo=)

clean_body: They won’t be eager to let me win, so I need your support. | Peter, my name is Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, a father, and a Consumer Rights attorney – and I just launched my campaign for Congress in California’s 45th district, one of the most competitive districts in the country. = = | **= Peter, I was raised to understand the value of hard work and the importance of community. My parents put everything on the line to immigrate to the United States for a shot at the American dream – and because of their perseverance, and with community support, they were able to open a small business and raise our family. I joined the military to carry on that legacy. And, after finishing law school, I became an employment discrimination attorney to continue fighting for working families just like mine. Now, I’m running for Congress to stand against big corporations who think they can get away with exploiting our communities without consequences. It’s time to get dark money out of politics, protect workers’ rights, and make our economy work for everyday Americans again. Corporations like the ones I’ve fought against my entire career have an iron grip on Congress – and they won’t be eager to let me win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Derek Tran and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: = = = = = Together, we’ll make sure working families finally have a strong voice in Congress, Derek Tran DISCLAIMER: Derek Tran was a member of the United States Army Reserve. Peter, I wanted to take a moment to say **thank you** for your incredible support ahead of Saturday night’s FEC fundraising deadline. We’ll have more to share soon, but we can say this: with your support, we _exceeded_ our third quarter fundraising goal, and we're on track to set another fundraising record in the 41st District! Whether you made a donation, shared a post on Facebook, or just told a friend about our campaign, it all led to this success. **This campaign is truly stronger because of you, Peter.** I ran for Congress because I love this country, and I believe we need a new generation of leaders who will put politics aside and deliver for the American people – not for corporate interests and not for an extreme agenda. One area of optimism we can be hopeful about are the countless young voters in our community who agree. They too believe we need less performative politics and more substance and results; and that if we’re going to change the status quo we need to change who is making the decisions. So today I have a special request to make: I’m hoping you’ll join me in supporting the next generation of Democratic leaders here at home. | **Peter — In June, I proudly reintroduced the Equality Act,** a hugely important set of reforms that would finally prohibit discrimination on the basis of sex, sexual orientation and gender identity.

****[**Peter, as a member of the LGBTQ+ community, nothing would mean more to me than your support of this critical legislation. Peter, as a gay man, I was publicly outed against my will by my Republican opponent when I ran for Congress in 1994.

I get constant homophobic hate for my support of LGBTQ+ communities.

I grew up in an America that denied me the right to marry.

**And I’m not going back.** That’s why I introduced the Equality Act to Congress.

But Republicans are dead set on seeing this bill FAIL! So, along with my reintroduction of the Equality Act, _**I need a groundswell of support from folks like you to prove to Republicans that they’re on the wrong side of this issue.**_

[**Peter, take 5 seconds to cosponsor the Equality Act NOW! www.marktakano.com

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. I get constant homophobic hate for my support of LGBTQ+ communities. I grew up in an America that denied me the right to marry. And I’m not going back. That’s why I introduced the Equality Act to Congress. But Republicans are dead set on seeing this bill FAIL! So, along with my reintroduction of the Equality Act, I need a groundswell of support from folks like you to prove to Republicans that they’re on the wrong side of this issue. Thank you, Peter, I can’t do this without you. — Mark Congressman, California's 39th District | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. **And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation.**
Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, 67 million people receive benefits — _that's 1 in every 5 Americans!_

name: Abortion Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Virginia is the last state in the South without an abortion ban...
body:
We can’t let Gov. Youngkin and extreme Republicans gain any more power. Will you step up to help elect state Democrats in 36 days and beyond? | | |
---
| |
---|---
Reproductive care should not be up for debate. **It’s a medical matter and a fundamental freedom. ** And yet, Republicans are dead-set on attacking abortion at _every opportunity_ – and their threats are getting serious ahead of Virginia’s elections. Republican Gov. Youngkin is trying to pass an **extreme abortion ban** that could include **JAIL TIME** for doctors who provide abortions. But he’s not alone – _every_ Virginia Republican state legislator who is running for re-election is **on the record with explicit anti-abortion positions.** **Virginia is the last state in the South without an abortion ban,** and it’s under direct attack this November. Republicans have raised over $19 million this cycle from right-wing donors, and they’ll use these funds to fight tooth-and-nail for their anti-abortion agenda. There is too much at risk to sit these elections out, so we need your help to rush resources to elect Democrats in places like Virginia so they can **protect abortion and reproductive care nationwide.** [Can you chip in $7 today to join this fight? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xJdM4UPBsteMLVkfmLiDV3AYV6Ajmkcu1v1riNeitrElHqNa-H593fy4dxsz0Wku6D3fmS20sUhvC0vZDSrMssXShyeE49GkAeUbcS2e-wU63CwQbmbrk4gIg3P-waOvbkjin5RoX8osjEiTioCyjXmm04fuP1Qh2J2xdcRWbOTUwl5Z5KcUkGOdhu2qFl4YsOLiH4jzKEVzhV5dygt6_wyfvWOR9jpmCbrbqek3eHrG-72_KaskXx-OIBuFoncCCKlyU0yL3Y-oxhMnTK3LmeGzKm_FSqxhm84EOsldHOp-1e6JNTu2TTie5PjEES3xSAI_0J9e-c4VRSgfmTP4BGi7A1WaJ0vKF5QucgOTZw81B3o6fgx1OByrLjZwWkq-ILxqWcowb5ZgvCGAKdlNM1w8n2hh7PLB9CFd0mvY-86u8ezzeYn5eAA-v_jFrAHxQ/403/JR1F-Gx8T5SOVaBgn1-wVw/h0/_JgtpfMJA_msgkofzybrBtlYaGgBQdeWQmIwfSboOR4) **With only 36 days until Election Day in Virginia, it could not be a more critical moment.** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.
